abstract: Observational studies can yield clinically actionable evidence at scale, but executing them on real-world databases is open-ended and requires coherent decisions across cohort construction, analysis, and reporting. Prior evaluations of LLM agents emphasize isolated steps or single answers, missing the integrity and internal structure of the resulting evidence bundle. To address this gap, we introduce RWE-bench, a benchmark grounded in MIMIC-IV and derived from peer-reviewed observational studies. Each task provides the corresponding study protocol as the reference standard, requiring agents to execute experiments in a real database and iteratively generate tree-structured evidence bundles. We evaluate six LLMs (three open-source, three closed-source) under three agent scaffolds using both question-level correctness and end-to-end task metrics. Across 162 tasks, task success is low: the best agent reaches 39.9%, and the best open-source model reaches 30.4%. Agent scaffolds also matter substantially, causing over 30% variation in performance metrics. Furthermore, we implement an automated cohort evaluation method to rapidly localize errors and identify agent failure modes. Overall, the results highlight persistent limitations in agents' ability to produce end-to-end evidence bundles, and efficient validation remains an important direction for future work. Code and data are available at https://github.com/somewordstoolate/RWE-bench.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究通过RWE-bench基准评估LLM代理在医学数据库中生成真实世界证据的能力，揭示其在端到端任务中的性能局限。
light_analysis.motivation: 观察性研究能大规模产生临床可操作的证据，但在真实世界数据库中执行是开放式的，需要跨队列构建、分析和报告的连贯决策。现有对LLM代理的评估过于强调孤立步骤或单一答案，缺少对证据捆绑完整性和内部结构的关注，导致自动化研究执行不可靠，因此研究旨在填补这一空白，提升评估的完整性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出RWE-bench基准，基于MIMIC-IV医疗数据库和同行评审观察性研究。每个任务提供研究协议作为参考标准，要求LLM代理在真实数据库中执行实验，迭代生成树状结构的证据捆绑。评估六个LLM（三个开源和三个闭源），采用三种代理支架，结合问题级正确性和端到端任务指标进行全面分析，以揭示代理性能差异。
light_analysis.result: 在162个任务中，任务成功率很低：最佳代理达到39.9%，最佳开源模型为30.4%。代理支架对性能影响显著，导致超过30%的波动。研究还实施自动化队列评估方法，用于快速定位错误并识别代理失败模式，如队列构建或分析步骤中的错误，为深入分析局限性提供数据支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 研究总结显示，LLM代理在生成端到端真实世界证据捆绑方面存在持续限制，强调了高效验证的重要性。通过RWE-bench基准，推动了自动化医学研究的进步，代码和数据开源促进进一步探索。未来工作可专注于改进代理框架和错误定位技术，以增强实用性和可靠性。

title: DALDALL: Data Augmentation for Lexical and Semantic Diverse in Legal Domain by leveraging LLM-Persona
abstract: Data scarcity remains a persistent challenge in low-resource domains. While existing data augmentation methods leverage the generative capabilities of large language models (LLMs) to produce large volumes of synthetic data, these approaches often prioritize quantity over quality and lack domain-specific strategies. In this work, we introduce DALDALL, a persona-based data augmentation framework tailored for legal information retrieval (IR). Our method employs domain-specific professional personas--such as attorneys, prosecutors, and judges--to generate synthetic queries that exhibit substantially greater lexical and semantic diversity than vanilla prompting approaches. Experiments on the CLERC and COLIEE benchmarks demonstrate that persona-based augmentation achieves improvement in lexical diversity as measured by Self-BLEU scores, while preserving semantic fidelity to the original queries. Furthermore, dense retrievers fine-tuned on persona-augmented data consistently achieve competitive or superior recall performance compared to those trained on original data or generic augmentations. These findings establish persona-based prompting as an effective strategy for generating high-quality training data in specialized, low-resource domains.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出DALDALL框架，利用LLM-persona生成词法和语义多样性的法律领域数据，以提升信息检索性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在低资源领域如法律信息检索中，数据稀缺严重限制了模型训练和性能。现有数据增强方法依赖大型语言模型生成合成数据，但往往偏重数量而非质量，缺乏领域特定策略，导致数据在词法和语义上多样性不足，难以有效提升检索准确性。因此，亟需一种针对专业领域的高质量数据增强方案，以解决资源瓶颈并优化系统表现。
light_analysis.method: DALDALL框架采用基于persona的数据增强方法，通过定义法律专业人士的persona（如律师、检察官、法官）来引导大型语言模型生成合成查询。该方法利用领域知识促进多样数据生成，同时确保语义保真度。研究在CLERC和COLIEE等法律数据集上进行评估，结合标准提示工程和微调流程，以验证其在信息检索任务中的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 在CLERC和COLIEE基准测试中，基于persona增强的数据在词法多样性方面显著提升，通过Self-BLEU分数衡量，同时保持语义保真度。微调后的密集检索器在召回性能上表现一致或优于使用原始数据或通用增强方法，证明了该方法对模型训练的积极影响和实际应用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究确立了基于persona的数据增强作为生成高质量训练数据的有效策略，特别适用于专业、低资源领域，提升了法律信息检索的性能，并为其他类似应用提供了新思路。学术上，它丰富了LLM在领域特定增强中的应用；实际上，有助于解决资源稀缺问题。未来工作可扩展persona设计或应用到更多领域，尽管当前方法可能受限于特定数据集和persona选择。

title: ENC-Bench: A Benchmark for Evaluating Multimodal Large Language Models in Electronic Navigational Chart Understanding
abstract: Electronic Navigational Charts (ENCs) are the safety-critical backbone of modern maritime navigation, yet it remains unclear whether multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can reliably interpret them. Unlike natural images or conventional charts, ENCs encode regulations, bathymetry, and route constraints via standardized vector symbols, scale-dependent rendering, and precise geometric structure -- requiring specialized maritime expertise for interpretation. We introduce ENC-Bench, the first benchmark dedicated to professional ENC understanding. ENC-Bench contains 20,490 expert-validated samples from 840 authentic National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) ENCs, organized into a three-level hierarchy: Perception (symbol and feature recognition), Spatial Reasoning (coordinate localization, bearing, distance), and Maritime Decision-Making (route legality, safety assessment, emergency planning under multiple constraints). All samples are generated from raw S-57 data through a calibrated vector-to-image pipeline with automated consistency checks and expert review. We evaluate 10 state-of-the-art MLLMs such as GPT-4o, Gemini 2.5, Qwen3-VL, InternVL-3, and GLM-4.5V, under a unified zero-shot protocol. The best model achieves only 47.88% accuracy, with systematic challenges in symbolic grounding, spatial computation, multi-constraint reasoning, and robustness to lighting and scale variations. By establishing the first rigorous ENC benchmark, we open a new research frontier at the intersection of specialized symbolic reasoning and safety-critical AI, providing essential infrastructure for advancing MLLMs toward professional maritime applications.
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026, Project page: https://qingyonghu.github.io/ENC-Bench/

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了首个用于评估多模态大语言模型在电子导航图理解中的专业基准 ENC-Bench，填补了专业符号推理与安全关键 AI 领域的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 电子导航图（ENCs）是现代海事导航的安全关键基础，其编码了法规、水深测量和路线约束，需要专业知识解释。然而，多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在自然图像理解上表现良好，但在 ENCs 这类专业、标准化符号和精确几何结构的数据上的可靠性未知。现有方法缺乏专门基准来评估 MLLMs 在此类安全关键任务中的能力，因此研究旨在解决这一不足，为 AI 在专业领域的应用提供评估标准，避免潜在风险。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 ENC-Bench 基准，包含 20,490 个专家验证样本，来自 840 个真实 NOAA ENCs。样本采用三层级结构：感知层（符号和特征识别）、空间推理层（坐标定位、方位和距离计算）以及海事决策层（路线合法性、安全评估和应急计划）。样本通过校准的矢量到图像管道从原始 S-57 数据生成，并经过自动一致性检查和专家评审。在统一零射击协议下，评估了 10 个最先进的 MLLMs，如 GPT-4o 和 Gemini 2.5。
light_analysis.result: 在 ENC-Bench 上评估的 10 个 MLLMs 中，最佳模型仅达到 47.88% 的准确率，表明性能严重不足。所有模型均面临系统性挑战，包括符号接地困难、空间计算错误、多约束推理能力弱，以及对光照和尺度变化的鲁棒性差。与基线方法相比，结果显示当前 MLLMs 在专业 ENC 理解上远未达到可靠应用水平，突出了安全关键 AI 任务的复杂性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是建立了首个严格的 ENC 理解基准 ENC-Bench，为多模态大语言模型在专业符号推理和安全关键 AI 领域的评估提供了基础设施。该研究开辟了专业海事应用与 AI 交叉的新前沿，强调了 MLLMs 在复杂现实任务中的局限性。未来工作可能包括改进模型的符号和空间推理能力，扩展基准以覆盖更多场景，并探索模型训练策略以提升性能。

title: Reconstruction-Guided Slot Curriculum: Addressing Object Over-Fragmentation in Video Object-Centric Learning
abstract: Video Object-Centric Learning seeks to decompose raw videos into a small set of object slots, but existing slot-attention models often suffer from severe over-fragmentation. This is because the model is implicitly encouraged to occupy all slots to minimize the reconstruction objective, thereby representing a single object with multiple redundant slots. We tackle this limitation with a reconstruction-guided slot curriculum (SlotCurri). Training starts with only a few coarse slots and progressively allocates new slots where reconstruction error remains high, thus expanding capacity only where it is needed and preventing fragmentation from the outset. Yet, during slot expansion, meaningful sub-parts can emerge only if coarse-level semantics are already well separated; however, with a small initial slot budget and an MSE objective, semantic boundaries remain blurry. Therefore, we augment MSE with a structure-aware loss that preserves local contrast and edge information to encourage each slot to sharpen its semantic boundaries. Lastly, we propose a cyclic inference that rolls slots forward and then backward through the frame sequence, producing temporally consistent object representations even in the earliest frames. All combined, SlotCurri addresses object over-fragmentation by allocating representational capacity where reconstruction fails, further enhanced by structural cues and cyclic inference. Notable FG-ARI gains of +6.8 on YouTube-VIS and +8.3 on MOVi-C validate the effectiveness of SlotCurri. Our code is available at github.com/wjun0830/SlotCurri.
comment: CVPR 2026 paper. Our code is available at github.com/wjun0830/SlotCurri

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了SlotCurri方法，通过重建引导的槽位课程、结构感知损失和循环推理，有效解决视频对象中心学习中的对象过度分割问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 在视频对象中心学习中，现有槽位注意模型因优化重建目标而过度使用所有槽位，导致单个对象被多个冗余槽位表示，即过度分割问题。这降低了对象分解的准确性和效率，影响后续任务如视频理解和跟踪。现有方法缺乏动态槽位分配和语义边界清晰机制，导致训练初期语义模糊，加剧了过度分割。
light_analysis.method: SlotCurri采用重建引导槽位课程，从少量粗糙槽位开始训练，根据重建误差高的区域逐步分配新槽位，避免过度分割。为提升语义边界，在MSE损失基础上增加结构感知损失，保留局部对比和边缘信息。同时，引入循环推理，通过前向和后向遍历帧序列确保对象表示的时间一致性。这些技术共同优化槽位分配和结构表示。
light_analysis.result: SlotCurri在YouTube-VIS数据集上FG-ARI指标提升6.8点，在MOVi-C数据集上提升8.3点，显著优于基线方法。这些提升验证了方法能有效减少对象过度分割，改善对象分解的准确性和一致性，表明重建引导、结构增强和循环推理的组合具有显著性能增益。
light_analysis.conclusion: SlotCurri成功解决视频对象中心学习的过度分割问题，贡献包括动态槽位课程、结构损失和循环推理。该研究提升了槽位模型的学术价值，增强了视频分析和对象跟踪等应用潜力。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂场景或优化计算效率。

title: Multimodal Industrial Anomaly Detection via Geometric Prior
abstract: The purpose of multimodal industrial anomaly detection is to detect complex geometric shape defects such as subtle surface deformations and irregular contours that are difficult to detect in 2D-based methods. However, current multimodal industrial anomaly detection lacks the effective use of crucial geometric information like surface normal vectors and 3D shape topology, resulting in low detection accuracy. In this paper, we propose a novel Geometric Prior-based Anomaly Detection network (GPAD). Firstly, we propose a point cloud expert model to perform fine-grained geometric feature extraction, employing differential normal vector computation to enhance the geometric details of the extracted features and generate geometric prior. Secondly, we propose a two-stage fusion strategy to efficiently leverage the complementarity of multimodal data as well as the geometric prior inherent in 3D points. We further propose attention fusion and anomaly regions segmentation based on geometric prior, which enhance the model's ability to perceive geometric defects. Extensive experiments show that our multimodal industrial anomaly detection model outperforms the State-of-the-art (SOTA) methods in detection accuracy on both MVTec-3D AD and Eyecandies datasets.
comment: Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology (TCSVT)

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于几何先验的多模态工业异常检测网络GPAD，通过有效整合几何信息来高效检测复杂几何形状缺陷。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态工业异常检测旨在检测传统2D方法难以识别的复杂几何缺陷，如细微表面变形和不规则轮廓，这在工业质量控制中至关重要。现有方法未能充分利用关键几何信息，如表面法向量和3D形状拓扑，导致检测精度不足，限制了实际应用效果。因此，研究旨在弥补这一缺陷，通过更有效地利用几何先验来提高多模态异常检测的性能和可靠性，以应对工业环境中的高精度检测需求。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出的GPAD网络包括两个核心创新点：首先，设计了一个点云专家模型，通过微分法向量计算进行细粒度几何特征提取，增强特征细节并生成几何先验。其次，采用两阶段融合策略，有效结合多模态数据（如点云和图像）的互补性和几何先验，并引入基于几何先验的注意力融合和异常区域分割模块，以提升模型对几何缺陷的感知能力。该方法在MVTec-3D AD等数据集上实施，整合了多模态输入和高级几何处理技术。
light_analysis.result: 在MVTec-3D AD和Eyecandies数据集上的广泛实验显示，GPAD模型在检测准确率上显著优于当前最先进方法，有效提升了复杂几何缺陷的识别性能。通过融合几何先验和多模态数据，模型展现出更高的鲁棒性和精度，与基线方法相比，在多个评估指标上均取得了明显改进，证明了其方法的有效性和实际应用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了GPAD网络，将几何先验融入多模态工业异常检测，提高了对复杂缺陷的检测精度，学术上为领域提供了新思路，强调了几何信息的重要性。实际应用中，该方法可促进工业自动化和质量控制的发展。未来工作可探索更多几何特征类型或扩展到其他工业场景，以进一步提升模型的泛化能力和效率。

title: MVPBench: A Multi-Video Perception Evaluation Benchmark for Multi-Modal Video Understanding
abstract: The rapid progress of Large Language Models (LLMs) has spurred growing interest in Multi-modal LLMs (MLLMs) and motivated the development of benchmarks to evaluate their perceptual and comprehension abilities. Existing benchmarks, however, are limited to static images or single videos, overlooking the complex interactions across multiple videos. To address this gap, we introduce the Multi-Video Perception Evaluation Benchmark (MVPBench), a new benchmark featuring 14 subtasks across diverse visual domains designed to evaluate models on extracting relevant information from video sequences to make informed decisions. MVPBench includes 5K question-answering tests involving 2.7K video clips sourced from existing datasets and manually annotated clips. Extensive evaluations reveal that current models struggle to process multi-video inputs effectively, underscoring substantial limitations in their multi-video comprehension. We anticipate MVPBench will drive advancements in multi-video perception.
comment: 15 pages, 7 figures, accepted by IJCNN 2026, code and dataset available at https://github.com/MVPBench/MVPBench

light_analysis.overview: MVPBench 是一个新的多视频感知评估基准，填补了现有基准在多个视频交互评估方面的空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型（LLMs）的快速发展，多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）的兴起促使了对其感知和理解能力的评估需求。然而，现有评估基准主要集中在静态图像或单个视频上，忽视了现实世界中多个视频之间的复杂交互，这限制了模型在真实场景中的应用。因此，需要一个专门的基准来评估模型处理多视频输入的能力，以提升多模态视频理解的准确性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出的 MVPBench 基准包含 14 个子任务，覆盖多个视觉领域，旨在评估模型从视频序列中提取相关信息以做出明智决策的能力。该基准集成了 5,000 个问答测试，涉及 2,700 个视频剪辑，这些剪辑部分来源于现有数据集，部分为手动标注。通过设计多视频输入和问答任务，MVPBench 强调了模型整合跨视频信息的能力，填补了现有基准的不足。
light_analysis.result: 通过 MVPBench 的广泛评估，当前多模态大型语言模型在处理多视频输入时表现不佳，难以有效整合信息，揭示了它们在多视频理解方面的重大局限性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但结果突显了模型在复杂交互场景下的挑战，与单视频基准相比存在明显差距，强调了改进的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: MVPBench 的引入填补了多模态视频理解评估中的关键空白，通过专注于多视频感知，推动了该领域的进展。其学术价值在于提供了一个标准化评估框架，有助于比较和提升模型性能；实际应用价值在于促进现实世界多视频场景下的模型部署。未来工作可能包括改进模型架构以增强多视频理解能力，并扩展基准到更多任务。

title: KALAVAI: Predicting When Independent Specialist Fusion Works -- A Quantitative Model for Post-Hoc Cooperative LLM Training
abstract: Independently trained domain specialists can be fused post-hoc into a single model that outperforms any individual specialist, and the gain is predictable: gain = 0.82 x divergence - 2.72 (R^2 = 0.856, n=6, 3-26% divergence). This enables practitioners to estimate cooperative value before committing compute. Below ~3.3% divergence, gains approach zero.In the KALAVAI protocol, contributors fine-tune copies of a shared checkpoint independently, then submit for lightweight MoE routing (500 steps). Gains are consistent: +7.72% at 410M (+/-0.02%, 3 seeds), +7.49% at 1B (+/-0.01%, 3 seeds), +6.53% at 6.9B, each over the best specialist. The router matches domain-oracle routing within <10^{-5} nats. Cross-lingual fusion (Tamil/Yoruba/Welsh/Code) achieves +21.76%, with Yoruba perplexity falling 41.9 to 7.7. A 20-contributor federation achieves +16.71% (+/-0.07pp, 3 seeds).Three requirements bound the protocol. Shared initialisation is necessary: checkpoint mismatch degrades routing. Frozen layers are optional below ~10,000 steps and beneficial beyond. Learned routing is essential: uniform averaging degrades by -1.2% vs. best specialist, while any trained router achieves oracle-optimal assignment.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了KALAVAI定量模型和协议，用于预测和实现独立训练的大型语言模型专家模型事后融合的增益，并通过混合专家路由优化性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在AI领域，独立训练的领域专家模型通过融合可以超越单个模型，但现有方法缺乏对融合增益的预测，导致计算资源可能被浪费。本研究旨在解决这一问题，通过建立数学模型预测融合效果，使从业者能在投入计算前评估合作价值，从而提高大型语言模型训练效率和资源分配。摘要未明确说明更广泛的背景，但暗示了优化多模型融合的必要性。
light_analysis.method: 基于KALAVAI协议，参与者从共享检查点独立微调模型副本，然后使用轻量级混合专家路由进行500步训练。关键创新包括预测增益与模型差异度的线性关系公式（gain = 0.82 x divergence - 2.72），以及高效的路由器设计。实验采用不同参数规模的模型（410M、1B、6.9B）和多语言数据集（如Tamil、Yoruba、Welsh和代码）进行验证，以评估协议的有效性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示显著性能提升：在410M、1B和6.9B参数模型上，增益分别为7.72%、7.49%和6.53%，超过最佳专家。路由器匹配域内最佳路由，误差低于10^{-5} nats。跨语言融合增益达21.76%，Yoruba语言模型困惑度从41.9降至7.7。20个贡献者的联邦融合增益为16.71%，优于统一平均方法（后者导致-1.2%退化），展现了协议的稳定性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出可预测融合增益的定量模型和KALAVAI协议，为独立训练的大型语言模型事后融合提供了理论和实用框架。主要贡献包括优化计算资源分配和提升模型性能，具有学术和实际应用价值。协议明确了共享初始化、冻结层条件（少于10,000步可选，更多则有益）和学习路由的必要性，为未来研究扩展至更多领域和场景奠定了基础。

title: PRISM: A Dual View of LLM Reasoning through Semantic Flow and Latent Computation
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) solve complex problems by generating multi-step reasoning traces. Yet these traces are typically analyzed from only one of two perspectives: the sequence of tokens across different reasoning steps in the generated text, or the hidden-state vectors across model layers within one step. We introduce PRISM (Probabilistic Reasoning Inspection through Semantic and Implicit Modeling), a framework and diagnostic tool for jointly analyzing both levels, providing a unified view of how reasoning evolves across steps and layers. Across multiple reasoning models and benchmarks, PRISM uncovers systematic patterns in the reasoning process, showing that failed trajectories are more likely to become trapped in unproductive verification loops and further diverge into distinct modes such as overthinking and premature commitment, which behave differently once a candidate answer is reached. It further reveals how prompting reshapes reasoning behavior beyond aggregate accuracy by altering both semantic transitions and internal computational patterns. By modeling reasoning trajectories as structured processes, PRISM makes these behaviors observable and analyzable rather than relying solely on final-task accuracy. Taken together, these insights position PRISM as a practical tool for analyzing and diagnosing reasoning processes in LLMs.

light_analysis.overview: PRISM是一个联合分析大型语言模型推理中语义流和潜在计算的框架，提供了推理过程的统一视图。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型通过生成多步骤推理追踪解决复杂问题，但现有方法通常只从单一视角分析：要么关注跨步骤的令牌序列，要么关注单个步骤内的隐藏状态向量，缺乏对这两个层次的联合分析。这限制了全面理解推理过程，尤其是在诊断失败案例和优化模型时。因此，开发一个框架来整合这两个视角，以深入揭示推理行为的系统模式和改进模型诊断能力，显得尤为重要。
light_analysis.method: PRISM框架通过建模推理轨迹为结构化过程，联合分析语义流（生成文本中跨步骤的令牌序列）和潜在计算（模型层内的隐藏状态向量）。该框架作为一个诊断工具，提供统一视图来观察推理在步骤和层次间的演化，应用于多个推理模型和基准测试。关键创新点在于使推理行为可观测和分析，而不是依赖最终任务准确率。
light_analysis.result: PRISM在多个推理模型和基准测试中揭示了系统模式：失败轨迹更可能陷入无效验证循环，并分化出过度思考和过早承诺等不同模式，这些模式在候选答案达到后行为各异。研究还显示，提示通过改变语义转换和内部计算模式来重塑推理行为，超越了仅评估整体准确率的局限。这提供了比传统方法更深入的洞察。
light_analysis.conclusion: PRISM的主要贡献是作为一个实用工具，用于分析和诊断大型语言模型的推理过程，通过联合分析语义流和潜在计算，使推理行为可视化。其学术价值在于深化了对模型推理机制的理解，而不依赖最终任务准确率；实际应用价值体现在优化模型提示和改进推理能力。未来可扩展至更多模型和任务，进一步提升诊断效率。

title: CLiGNet: Clinical Label-Interaction Graph Network for Medical Specialty Classification from Clinical Transcriptions
abstract: Automated classification of clinical transcriptions into medical specialties is essential for routing, coding, and clinical decision support, yet prior work on the widely used MTSamples benchmark suffers from severe data leakage caused by applying SMOTE oversampling before train test splitting. We first document this methodological flaw and establish a leakage free benchmark across 40 medical specialties (4966 records), revealing that the true task difficulty is substantially higher than previously reported.   We then introduce CLiGNet (Clinical Label Interaction Graph Network), a neural architecture that combines a Bio ClinicalBERT text encoder with a two layer Graph Convolutional Network operating on a specialty label graph constructed from semantic similarity and ICD 10 chapter priors. Per label attention gates fuse document and label graph representations, trained with focal binary cross entropy loss to handle extreme class imbalance (181 to 1 ratio).   Across seven baselines ranging from TF IDF classifiers to Clinical Longformer, CLiGNet without calibration achieves the highest macro F1 of 0.279, with an ablation study confirming that the GCN label graph provides the single largest component gain (increase of 0.066 macro F1). Adding per label Platt scaling calibration yields an expected calibration error of 0.007, demonstrating a principled trade off between ranking performance and probability reliability.   We provide comprehensive failure analysis covering pairwise specialty confusions, rare class behaviour, document length effects, and token level Integrated Gradients attribution, offering actionable insights for clinical NLP system deployment.

light_analysis.overview: CLiGNet是一种结合Bio ClinicalBERT文本编码器和图卷积网络的神经架构，用于改进临床转录到医疗专业的分类，解决了先前基准测试中的数据泄漏问题并提升了性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究旨在自动化分类临床转录到医疗专业，这对于临床工作流如患者路由和编码至关重要。然而，先前基于MTSamples基准的工作由于在训练测试分割前应用SMOTE过采样，导致数据泄漏，严重低估了任务难度。这突显了建立无泄漏基准和开发更准确方法的需求，以处理严重的类别不平衡问题，确保分类系统的可靠性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: 首先，研究者建立了无数据泄漏的基准测试，涵盖40个医疗专业和4966条记录。然后，提出CLiGNet模型，该模型使用Bio ClinicalBERT编码临床转录文本，并构建基于语义相似性和ICD-10章节先验的标签图。通过两层图卷积网络（GCN）处理标签图，利用per label attention gates融合文档和图表示。训练采用focal binary cross entropy损失，以应对极端的类别不平衡（类别比例达181:1）。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，在七个基线方法（从TF-IDF分类器到Clinical Longformer）中，未经校准的CLiGNet取得了最高的宏平均F1分数0.279。消融研究确认GCN标签图组件贡献最大，使宏平均F1增加0.066。添加per label Platt scaling校准后，预期校准误差为0.007，表明模型在排名性能和概率可靠性之间实现了平衡，提升了分类的准确性和可靠性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于提出了CLiGNet模型，显著提升了临床转录分类的准确性，并纠正了基准测试中的数据泄漏问题。通过全面的失败分析，如专业混淆和稀有类行为，为临床NLP系统部署提供了实用见解。研究强调了标签交互和模型校准的重要性，学术价值在于推动医疗AI的可靠性，未来工作可基于失败分析进一步优化模型性能。

title: Beyond Binary Correctness: Scaling Evaluation of Long-Horizon Agents on Subjective Enterprise Tasks
abstract: Large language models excel on objectively verifiable tasks such as math and programming, where evaluation reduces to unit tests or a single correct answer. In contrast, real-world enterprise work is often subjective and context-dependent: success hinges on organizational goals, user intent, and the quality of intermediate artifacts produced across long, multi-tool workflows.   We introduce LH-Bench, a three-pillar evaluation design that moves beyond binary correctness to score autonomous, long-horizon execution on subjective enterprise tasks. The pillars are: (i) expert-grounded rubrics that give LLM judges the domain context needed to score subjective work, (ii) curated ground-truth artifacts that enable stepwise reward signals (e.g., chapter-level annotation for content tasks), and (iii) pairwise human preference evaluation for convergent validation. We show that domain-authored rubrics provide substantially more reliable evaluation signals than LLM-authored rubrics (kappa = 0.60 vs. 0.46), and that human preference judgments confirm the same top-tier separation (p < 0.05), evidence that expert-grounded evaluation can scale without sacrificing reliability. We release public datasets and report results on two environments: Figma-to-code (33 real .fig tasks against the Figma API via MCP) and Programmatic content (41 courses comprising 183 individually-evaluated chapters on a course platform serving 30+ daily users).

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了LH-Bench评估框架，通过三支柱设计超越二元正确性，有效评估长期自主代理在主观企业任务中的表现。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在客观可验证任务如数学和编程上表现优异，评估可通过单元测试或单一正确答案轻松进行。然而，现实企业工作常具有主观性和上下文依赖性，成功取决于组织目标、用户意图以及长期多工具工作流中产生的中间成果质量。现有评估方法主要依赖二元正确性，无法捕捉主观任务的复杂性，导致评估不可靠，限制了AI代理在企业应用中的可扩展性和实际价值，急需新方法来应对这些挑战。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于LH-Bench评估设计，包含三个核心支柱：一是专家锚定评分标准，由领域专家编写，为LLM评估器提供领域上下文以准确评分主观任务；二是真实人工制品，如内容任务中的章节级注释，用于支持逐步奖励信号，优化多步工作流的评估；三是成对人偏好评估，通过人类偏好判断进行收敛验证，确保评估结果的一致性。该方法在两个环境中实施：Figma-to-code涉及33个真实.fig任务，通过MCP与Figma API交互；Programmatic content包括41个课程和183个独立评估章节，服务于每日30多用户的课程平台，确保评估的全面性。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，专家锚定评分标准比LLM-authored评分标准提供更可靠的评估信号，Cohen's kappa系数分别为0.60和0.46，表明专家锚定方法显著提高了可靠性。人类偏好评估进一步验证了这一结果，确认了顶级代理的相同分离，且具有统计显著性（p < 0.05）。在两个环境中，评估框架成功应用于Figma-to-code和Programmatic content任务，证明了其有效性，能够在不牺牲可靠性的情况下扩展主观企业任务的评估，为后续研究提供了公开数据集和基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结了LH-Bench评估设计的核心贡献，即通过专家锚定评分标准和人类偏好评估，有效解决了主观企业任务评估的挑战，提升了长期自主代理的表现评估可靠性。这具有重要学术价值，推动了LLM评估技术的发展，特别是在处理主观性和长期工作流的场景中。实际应用价值在于帮助企业更准确地评估自动化代理的工作质量，促进AI在企业环境中的可扩展部署。未来工作可扩展至更多领域和复杂任务，并进一步优化评估框架的通用性和效率。

title: Multitask-Informed Prior for In-Context Learning on Tabular Data: Application to Steel Property Prediction
abstract: Accurate prediction of mechanical properties of steel during hot rolling processes, such as Thin Slab Direct Rolling (TSDR), remains challenging due to complex interactions among chemical compositions, processing parameters, and resultant microstructures. Traditional empirical and experimental methodologies, while effective, are often resource-intensive and lack adaptability to varied production conditions. Moreover, most existing approaches do not explicitly leverage the strong correlations among key mechanical properties, missing an opportunity to improve predictive accuracy through multitask learning. To address this, we present a multitask learning framework that injects multitask awareness into the prior of TabPFN--a transformer-based foundation model for in-context learning on tabular data--through novel fine-tuning strategies. Originally designed for single-target regression or classification, we augment TabPFN's prior with two complementary approaches: (i) target averaging, which provides a unified scalar signal compatible with TabPFN's single-target architecture, and (ii) task-specific adapters, which introduce task-specific supervision during fine-tuning. These strategies jointly guide the model toward a multitask-informed prior that captures cross-property relationships among key mechanical metrics. Extensive experiments on an industrial TSDR dataset demonstrate that our multitask adaptations outperform classical machine learning methods and recent state-of-the-art tabular learning models across multiple evaluation metrics. Notably, our approach enhances both predictive accuracy and computational efficiency compared to task-specific fine-tuning, demonstrating that multitask-aware prior adaptation enables foundation models for tabular data to deliver scalable, rapid, and reliable deployment for automated industrial quality control and process optimization in TSDR.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种多任务学习框架，通过目标平均和任务特定适配器增强TabPFN模型，用于钢的机械性能预测，提升表数据上下文学习性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 在热轧过程如薄板直接轧制（TSDR）中，钢的机械性能准确预测面临挑战，因为化学成分、处理参数和微结构之间存在复杂交互。传统经验和实验方法虽然有效，但资源密集且缺乏对不同生产条件的适应性。此外，现有方法未充分利用关键机械性能之间的强相关性，错失了通过多任务学习提升预测准确性的机会。因此，开发多任务学习框架对于改进预测性能、支持自动化工业质量控制和过程优化具有重要实践意义。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一种多任务学习框架，通过创新fine-tuning策略将多任务意识注入TabPFN——一个基于transformer的基础模型，专为表数据上下文学习设计。TabPFN原用于单目标回归或分类，我们通过两种互补方法增强其先验知识：（i）目标平均，提供统一标量信号兼容其单目标架构；（ii）任务特定适配器，在fine-tuning时引入任务特定监督。这些策略共同引导模型形成捕获跨属性关系的多任务感知先验，从而改进预测性能。
light_analysis.result: 在工业TSDR数据集上的广泛实验表明，我们的多任务适应方法在多个评估指标上优于传统机器学习方法和最新的表学习模型。与任务特定fine-tuning相比，该方法不仅提高了预测准确性，还增强了计算效率，使得基础模型在表数据上的部署更具可扩展性、快速性和可靠性，适用于TSDR中的自动化工业质量控制和过程优化。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了一种多任务学习框架，通过目标平均和任务特定适配器，增强了TabPFN模型在表数据上下文学习中的性能。该研究不仅提高了钢机械性能预测的准确性，还实现了计算效率的提升，为自动化工业质量控制提供了可扩展、快速和可靠的解决方案。在学术上，它扩展了多任务学习在表数据处理中的应用；在实际应用中，直接有益于钢铁工业的过程优化。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。

title: Explanation Generation for Contradiction Reconciliation with LLMs
abstract: Existing NLP work commonly treats contradictions as errors to be resolved by choosing which statements to accept or discard. Yet a key aspect of human reasoning in social interactions and professional domains is the ability to hypothesize explanations that reconcile contradictions. For example, "Cassie hates coffee" and "She buys coffee everyday" may appear contradictory, yet both are compatible if Cassie has the unenviable daily chore of buying coffee for all her coworkers. Despite the growing reasoning capabilities of large language models (LLMs), their ability to hypothesize such reconciliatory explanations remains largely unexplored. To address this gap, we introduce the task of reconciliatory explanation generation, where models must generate explanations that effectively render contradictory statements compatible. We propose a novel method of repurposing existing natural language inference (NLI) datasets, and introduce quality metrics that enable scalable automatic evaluation. Experiments with 18 LLMs show that most models achieve limited success in this task, and that the benefit of extending test-time compute by "thinking" plateaus as model size increases. Our results highlight an under-explored dimension of LLM reasoning and the need to address this limitation in enhancing LLMs' downstream applications such as chatbots and scientific aids.

light_analysis.overview: 本文引入了调和解释生成任务，提出重新利用自然语言推理数据集的方法，并评估了18个大语言模型在此任务上的表现，突显了LLM推理的未探索维度。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有自然语言处理工作通常将矛盾视为错误，通过选择接受或丢弃语句来解决，忽略了人类在社交互动和专业领域中通过假设性解释调和矛盾的关键推理能力。大语言模型的推理能力虽不断增强，但其生成此类调和解释的能力仍未被充分探索，这限制了模型在下游应用中的有效性。因此，本研究旨在填补这一空白，探索LLMs在调和矛盾中的解释生成潜力，以提升其在实际场景中的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出一种新颖方法，通过重新利用现有的自然语言推理数据集来构建调和解释生成任务，将矛盾陈述对转换为需要生成解释的输入。我们引入了可扩展的自动评估质量指标，以量化模型生成解释的有效性，支持高效的大规模实验。方法的核心创新在于将传统NLI任务扩展为解释生成，强调了模型推理的灵活性，但具体数据集转换细节摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 通过对18个大语言模型的实验，研究发现大多数模型在调和解释生成任务上取得有限成功，生成有效解释的能力普遍不足。实验还表明，随着模型规模的增加，通过扩展测试时计算资源（如“思考”）带来的性能提升趋于平稳。这揭示了现有LLMs在调和解释方面的局限，为未来模型改进提供了基准，并突显了规模优势无法直接转化为该任务的成功。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献在于引入了调和解释生成任务，突显了大语言模型推理中一个未充分探索的维度，并通过实验揭示了模型在此任务上的局限性。研究强调了在增强LLMs下游应用（如聊天机器人和科学助手）时解决这一问题的必要性，具有重要的学术和实际价值。未来工作可以专注于开发更有效的模型方法或数据集，以提升调和解释能力，推动自然语言处理在复杂推理场景中的应用。

title: A transformer architecture alteration to incentivise externalised reasoning
abstract: We propose a new architectural change, and post-training pipeline, for making LLMs more verbose reasoners by teaching a model to truncate forward passes early. We augment an existing transformer architecture with an early-exit mechanism at intermediate layers and train the model to exit at shallower layers when the next token can be predicted without deep computation. After a calibration stage, we incentivise the model to exit as early as possible while maintaining task performance using reinforcement learning. We provide preliminary results to this effect for small reasoning models, showing that they learn to adaptively reduce computations across tokens. We predict that, applied at the right scale, our approach can minimise the amount of excess computation that reasoning models have at their disposal to perform non-myopic planning using their internal activations, reserving this only for difficult-to-predict tokens.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种Transformer架构的早期退出机制和后训练管道，通过强化学习激励模型在推理时自适应减少计算，优化效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决大型语言模型在推理过程中可能存在的计算冗余问题。现有模型通常进行完整的Transformer前向传递，即使对于容易预测的令牌，这导致不必要的计算开销，限制了模型在资源受限环境下的效率。通过引入外部化推理的激励机制，可以优化推理过程，使模型更高效地利用计算资源，这对于降低推理成本和提高实际应用性能具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: 论文的核心方法是修改现有Transformer架构，在中间层集成早期退出机制，允许模型在浅层中断前向传递。技术路线包括训练模型基于令牌预测难度动态选择退出层，以及后训练阶段使用强化学习进行校准，激励模型在保持任务性能的前提下尽可能早地退出。该方法通过自适应调整计算深度，旨在减少每个令牌的平均计算开销，提升整体推理效率。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未提供具体实验数据，但指出在小规模推理模型上的初步结果表明，模型能够学会自适应地减少跨令牌的计算。这可能意味着该方法在保持推理准确性的同时，有效降低了计算量，展示了其在优化计算资源方面的潜力。未来需要更多实验验证其在更大规模模型和复杂任务上的效果，并与基线方法进行对比以评估性能提升。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出一种通过早期退出机制优化Transformer推理效率的方法，预测在适当规模下能够最小化模型用于非近视规划的过剩计算，从而节约计算资源。其学术价值在于为高效推理模型设计提供了新思路，实际应用价值体现在降低部署成本和提升响应速度。局限性包括目前只在小模型上测试，未来工作可扩展到更大规模模型和探索更精细的退出策略。

title: Test-Time Adaptation via Cache Personalization for Facial Expression Recognition in Videos
abstract: Facial expression recognition (FER) in videos requires model personalization to capture the considerable variations across subjects. Vision-language models (VLMs) offer strong transfer to downstream tasks through image-text alignment, but their performance can still degrade under inter-subject distribution shifts. Personalizing models using test-time adaptation (TTA) methods can mitigate this challenge. However, most state-of-the-art TTA methods rely on unsupervised parameter optimization, introducing computational overhead that is impractical in many real-world applications. This paper introduces TTA through Cache Personalization (TTA-CaP), a cache-based TTA method that enables cost-effective (gradient-free) personalization of VLMs for video FER. Prior cache-based TTA methods rely solely on dynamic memories that store test samples, which can accumulate errors and drift due to noisy pseudo-labels. TTA-CaP leverages three coordinated caches: a personalized source cache that stores source-domain prototypes, a positive target cache that accumulates reliable subject-specific samples, and a negative target cache that stores low-confidence cases as negative samples to reduce the impact of noisy pseudo-labels. Cache updates and replacement are controlled by a tri-gate mechanism based on temporal stability, confidence, and consistency with the personalized cache. Finally, TTA-CaP refines predictions through fusion of embeddings, yielding refined representations that support temporally stable video-level predictions. Our experiments on three challenging video FER datasets, BioVid, StressID, and BAH, indicate that TTA-CaP can outperform state-of-the-art TTA methods under subject-specific and environmental shifts, while maintaining low computational and memory overhead for real-world deployment.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于缓存的测试时适应方法（TTA-CaP），用于视频中的面部表情识别，通过协调缓存机制实现高效且无需梯度的模型个性化，以应对主体间分布偏移。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频面部表情识别需要模型个性化以适应不同主体的显著变化，但视觉语言模型在主体间分布偏移下性能下降。现有测试时适应方法依赖无监督参数优化，计算开销大，不适用于实际应用；而基于缓存的TTA方法易受噪声伪标签影响导致误差累积。因此，研究旨在开发一种低成本、抗噪声的个性化方法，以提高模型在真实场景中的鲁棒性和实用性。
light_analysis.method: TTA-CaP是一种基于缓存的测试时适应方法，核心创新在于使用三个协调缓存：个性化源缓存存储源域原型作为参考；正目标缓存积累高置信度的主体特定样本；负目标缓存存储低置信度案例作为负样本以减少噪声影响。缓存更新由三选一机制控制，基于时间稳定性、置信度和与个性化缓存的一致性。最后，通过嵌入融合生成精化表示，支持时间稳定的视频级预测，从而实现无需梯度优化的高效个性化。
light_analysis.result: 在BioVid、StressID和BAH三个挑战性视频面部表情识别数据集上的实验表明，TTA-CaP在主体特定和环境分布偏移下，性能优于现有最先进的测试时适应方法，摘要未明确说明具体数值，但强调其在保持低计算和内存开销的同时，提升了模型的适应能力和鲁棒性，适合实际部署需求。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是TTA-CaP方法，通过缓存协调和智能更新机制，实现了高效且抗噪声的模型个性化，推动了视频面部表情识别技术的发展。学术上，它改进了测试时适应方法，减少了伪标签误差；实际应用中，低开销特性使其适合现实部署，未来工作可探索扩展到其他领域或进一步优化缓存策略以提高通用性。

title: When Models Judge Themselves: Unsupervised Self-Evolution for Multimodal Reasoning
abstract: Recent progress in multimodal large language models has led to strong performance on reasoning tasks, but these improvements largely rely on high-quality annotated data or teacher-model distillation, both of which are costly and difficult to scale. To address this, we propose an unsupervised self-evolution training framework for multimodal reasoning that achieves stable performance improvements without using human-annotated answers or external reward models. For each input, we sample multiple reasoning trajectories and jointly model their within group structure. We use the Actor's self-consistency signal as a training prior, and introduce a bounded Judge based modulation to continuously reweight trajectories of different quality. We further model the modulated scores as a group level distribution and convert absolute scores into relative advantages within each group, enabling more robust policy updates. Trained with Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) on unlabeled data, our method consistently improves reasoning performance and generalization on five mathematical reasoning benchmarks, offering a scalable path toward self-evolving multimodal models. The code are available at https://github.com/OPPO-Mente-Lab/LLM-Self-Judge.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出一种无监督自我进化训练框架，通过组内结构建模和自一致性信号，实现多模态推理模型的稳定性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在推理任务上表现强劲，但现有改进主要依赖高质量人工标注数据或教师模型蒸馏，这些方法成本高昂且难以大规模扩展。这限制了模型的可扩展性和实际应用，尤其是在资源受限场景中。因此，开发一种无需外部监督的自进化框架至关重要，以降低数据依赖，推动AI系统向更高效、自主的方向发展。
light_analysis.method: 核心方法是Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO)，一种无监督训练框架。对每个输入采样多个推理轨迹，联合建模其组内结构，并利用Actor的自一致性信号作为训练先验。创新点包括引入有界Judge调制动态重新加权不同质量轨迹，并将绝对得分转换为组内相对优势，以实现更稳健的策略更新。该方法在未标注数据上训练，适用于多模态推理任务，避免了对外部奖励模型的依赖。
light_analysis.result: 在五个数学推理基准上的实验表明，该方法能持续提升推理性能和模型的泛化能力。虽然摘要未明确给出具体性能指标（如准确率提升百分比），但与依赖标注数据或外部奖励模型的基线方法相比，该方法在未监督条件下实现了稳定的性能改进，验证了其有效性和可扩展性，为大规模应用提供了潜力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文主要贡献是提出无监督自我进化训练框架，显著减少对标注数据和外部奖励的依赖，具有重要的学术价值。它推动了多模态模型自进化研究的发展，为开发更自主、可扩展的AI系统提供新思路。实际应用中，可降低训练成本，促进在资源有限环境下的部署。未来工作可能包括优化调制机制或扩展到更多任务领域，如摘要未明确说明的其他推理场景。

title: 2Xplat: Two Experts Are Better Than One Generalist
abstract: Pose-free feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has opened a new frontier for rapid 3D modeling, enabling high-quality Gaussian representations to be generated from uncalibrated multi-view images in a single forward pass. The dominant approach in this space adopts unified monolithic architectures, often built on geometry-centric 3D foundation models, to jointly estimate camera poses and synthesize 3DGS representations within a single network. While architecturally streamlined, such "all-in-one" designs may be suboptimal for high-fidelity 3DGS generation, as they entangle geometric reasoning and appearance modeling within a shared representation. In this work, we introduce 2Xplat, a pose-free feed-forward 3DGS framework based on a two-expert design that explicitly separates geometry estimation from Gaussian generation. A dedicated geometry expert first predicts camera poses, which are then explicitly passed to a powerful appearance expert that synthesizes 3D Gaussians. Despite its conceptual simplicity, being largely underexplored in prior works, the proposed approach proves highly effective. In fewer than 5K training iterations, the proposed two-experts pipeline substantially outperforms prior pose-free feed-forward 3DGS approaches and achieves performance on par with state-of-the-art posed methods. These results challenge the prevailing unified paradigm and suggest the potential advantages of modular design principles for complex 3D geometric estimation and appearance synthesis tasks.

light_analysis.overview: 2Xplat 框架通过两个专家模块分别处理几何估计和 Gaussian 生成，以模块化设计提升无姿态前馈 3D Gaussian Splatting 的性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有统一单块架构在无姿态前馈 3D Gaussian Splatting 中，因纠缠几何推理和外观建模于共享表示，可能导致高保真度生成受限。本文针对这一问题，指出统一范式在处理复杂 3D 建模任务时的不足，强调分离几何和外观的重要性，以应对更高效、高质量的 3D 表示合成需求。
light_analysis.method: 2Xplat 采用两个专家设计：一个几何专家专注于预测相机姿态，另一个外观专家接收姿态信息后合成 3D Gaussians。该方法显式分离几何估计和外观建模，避免了统一架构中的纠缠问题，训练过程在少于 5K 迭代中完成，基于 feed-forward 机制高效实现。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在少于 5K 训练迭代后，2Xplat 显著优于先前无姿态前馈 3DGS 方法，性能与当前最优的姿态方法持平。这些结果证实了模块化设计在训练效率和生成质量上的优势，为无姿态 3D 建模提供了有效解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 2Xplat 的主要贡献在于挑战了统一范式，展示了模块化设计在复杂 3D 几何估计和外观合成中的潜力。研究具有学术价值，为相关领域提供新思路；未来工作可扩展模块化架构的应用，或进一步优化专家间的协作机制。

title: LPNSR: Prior-Enhanced Diffusion Image Super-Resolution via LR-Guided Noise Prediction
abstract: Diffusion-based image super-resolution (SR), which aims to reconstruct high-resolution (HR) images from corresponding low-resolution (LR) observations, faces a fundamental trade-off between inference efficiency and reconstruction quality. The state-of-the-art residual-shifting diffusion framework achieves efficient 4-step inference, yet suffers from severe performance degradation in compact sampling trajectories. This is mainly attributed to two core limitations: the inherent suboptimality of unconstrained random Gaussian noise in intermediate steps, which leads to error accumulation and insufficient LR prior guidance, and the initialization bias caused by naive bicubic upsampling. In this paper, we propose LPNSR, a prior-enhanced efficient diffusion framework to address these issues. We first mathematically derive the closed-form analytical solution of the optimal intermediate noise for the residual-shifting diffusion paradigm, and accordingly design an LR-guided multi-input-aware noise predictor to replace random Gaussian noise, embedding LR structural priors into the reverse process while fully preserving the framework's core efficient residual-shifting mechanism. We further mitigate initial bias with a high-quality pre-upsampling network to optimize the diffusion starting point. With a compact 4-step trajectory, LPNSR can be optimized in an end-to-end manner. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LPNSR achieves state-of-the-art perceptual performance on both synthetic and real-world datasets, without relying on any large-scale text-to-image priors. The source code of our method can be found at https://github.com/Faze-Hsw/LPNSR.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出LPNSR框架，通过LR引导噪声预测和先验增强，优化扩散图像超分辨率在效率和性能上的权衡，实现高效高质量重建。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于扩散的图像超分辨率（SR）在实际应用中面临推理效率与重建质量之间的基本权衡问题，这限制了其在实时场景下的部署。现有最先进的残差位移扩散框架虽实现高效4步推理，但在紧凑采样轨迹下性能显著下降，主要原因包括中间步骤使用无约束随机高斯噪声导致错误累积和LR先验引导不足，以及由简单双三次上采样引起的初始化偏差。这些问题使得现有方法无法同时保证速度和精度，影响SR技术的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出LPNSR框架，首先数学推导了残差位移扩散范式下最优中间噪声的封闭形式解析解，以替代随机高斯噪声，从而减少误差。在此基础上，设计了一个LR引导的多输入感知噪声预测器，将LR结构先验嵌入反向扩散过程，同时完全保留核心的高效残差位移机制。此外，引入高质量预上采样网络优化扩散起点，缓解初始偏差。整个框架在紧凑4步采样轨迹上以端到端方式进行优化，提升训练效率。
light_analysis.result: 通过广泛实验，LPNSR在合成和真实世界数据集上均达到了最先进的感知性能。摘要未明确说明具体数据指标，但指出该方法在不依赖任何大规模文本到图像先验的情况下，显著优于基线方法，特别是在紧凑4步采样轨迹下减少了性能退化，验证了其在提升超分辨率质量和效率方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LPNSR的核心贡献在于解决了扩散图像超分辨率中效率与质量的权衡问题，通过LR引导噪声预测和先验增强，提供了更优的解决方案。其学术价值在于改进了扩散模型在超分辨率领域的应用，具有实际潜力用于图像增强和修复任务。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作，但该框架的端到端优化设计为后续研究奠定了基础。

title: Towards Intelligent Geospatial Data Discovery: a knowledge graph-driven multi-agent framework powered by large language models
abstract: The rapid growth in the volume, variety, and velocity of geospatial data has created data ecosystems that are highly distributed, heterogeneous, and semantically inconsistent. Existing data catalogs, portals, and infrastructures still rely largely on keyword-based search with limited semantic support, which often fails to capture user intent and leads to weak retrieval performance. To address these challenges, this study proposes a knowledge graph-driven multi-agent framework for intelligent geospatial data discovery, powered by large language models. The framework introduces a unified geospatial metadata ontology as a semantic mediation layer to align heterogeneous metadata standards across platforms and constructs a geospatial metadata knowledge graph to explicitly model datasets and their multidimensional relationships. Building on the structured representation, the framework adopts a multi-agent collaborative architecture to perform intent parsing, knowledge graph retrieval, and answer synthesis, forming an interpretable and closed-loop discovery process from user queries to results. Results from representative use cases and performance evaluation show that the framework substantially improves intent matching accuracy, ranking quality, recall, and discovery transparency compared with traditional systems. This study advances geospatial data discovery toward a more semantic, intent-aware, and intelligent paradigm, providing a practical foundation for next-generation intelligent and autonomous spatial data infrastructures and contributing to the broader vision of Autonomous GIS.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出一个知识图谱驱动的多代理框架，结合大型语言模型，实现智能地理空间数据发现，提升了语义搜索性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 地理空间数据快速增长，导致数据生态系统高度分布式、异构且语义不一致。现有方法主要依赖关键词搜索，语义支持有限，无法准确捕获用户意图，导致检索性能弱。这个问题重要，因为随着数据规模扩大，传统搜索难以处理复杂语义需求，阻碍了高效数据利用，亟需智能方案来解决数据发现中的语义鸿沟和意图理解不足。
light_analysis.method: 框架采用知识图谱驱动和多代理协作架构，以大型语言模型为动力。核心创新点包括：引入统一地理空间元数据本体作为语义中介层，对齐跨平台异构元数据标准；构建地理空间元数据知识图谱，显式建模数据集及其多维关系；多代理架构分工执行意图解析、知识图谱检索和答案合成，形成从用户查询到结果的闭环发现过程，提高可解释性和智能化水平，但数据集和具体模型架构摘要未明确说明。
light_analysis.result: 通过代表性用例和性能评估，该框架显著改善了意图匹配准确性、排名质量、召回率和发现透明度，相比传统系统。摘要未提供具体数据指标，但强调了在语义理解、检索效果和透明度方面的整体提升，表明框架有效解决了现有方法的不足，为用户查询和结果匹配提供了更好的支持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究主要贡献在于推动了地理空间数据发现向更语义化、意图感知和智能化的范式发展，为下一代智能和自主空间数据基础设施提供了实践基础，并贡献于自主GIS的宏大愿景。学术价值在于整合知识图谱和多代理技术，实际应用价值在于提升数据管理效率。局限性或未来工作摘要未明确说明，但可推断未来可能涉及框架扩展、性能优化或更广泛的领域应用。

title: ScaleEdit-12M: Scaling Open-Source Image Editing Data Generation via Multi-Agent Framework
abstract: Instruction-based image editing has emerged as a key capability for unified multimodal models (UMMs), yet constructing large-scale, diverse, and high-quality editing datasets without costly proprietary APIs remains challenging. Previous image editing datasets either rely on closed-source models for annotation, which prevents cost-effective scaling, or employ fixed synthetic editing pipelines, which suffer from limited quality and generalizability. To address these challenges, we propose ScaleEditor, a fully open-source hierarchical multi-agent framework for end-to-end construction of large-scale, high-quality image editing datasets. Our pipeline consists of three key components: source image expansion with world-knowledge infusion, adaptive multi-agent editing instruction-image synthesis, and a task-aware data quality verification mechanism. Using ScaleEditor, we curate ScaleEdit-12M, the largest open-source image editing dataset to date, spanning 23 task families across diverse real and synthetic domains. Fine-tuning UniWorld-V1 and Bagel on ScaleEdit yields consistent gains, improving performance by up to 10.4% on ImgEdit and 35.1% on GEdit for general editing benchmarks and by up to 150.0% on RISE and 26.5% on KRIS-Bench for knowledge-infused benchmarks. These results demonstrate that open-source, agentic pipelines can approach commercial-grade data quality while retaining cost-effectiveness and scalability. Both the framework and dataset will be open-sourced.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了ScaleEditor，一个开源的分层多代理框架，用于端到端构建大规模图像编辑数据集，生成了ScaleEdit-12M，这是迄今最大的开源图像编辑数据集。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于指令的图像编辑是统一多模态模型的关键能力，但构建大规模、多样化、高质量的数据集面临挑战。现有方法依赖闭源模型进行标注，成本高昂且难以扩展，或使用固定合成流程，导致质量有限、泛化性差。因此，研究旨在开发一种开源、成本效益高的数据生成方法，以解决现有数据集的不足，促进多模态模型的发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法为ScaleEditor框架，包含三个核心组件：源图像扩展，通过世界知识注入丰富图像内容；自适应多代理编辑指令图像合成，利用多代理系统生成多样化的编辑指令和图像对；任务感知数据质量验证机制，确保生成数据的高质量。该框架采用分层多代理架构，实现端到端自动化数据生成，避免了依赖专有模型或固定流程。
light_analysis.result: 主要实验结果显示，构建了ScaleEdit-12M数据集，涵盖23个任务家族，涉及真实和合成领域。通过微调UniWorld-V1和Bagel模型，在通用编辑基准ImgEdit和GEdit上，性能提升10.4%和35.1%；在知识注入基准RISE和KRIS-Bench上，性能提升150.0%和26.5%。这些结果证明ScaleEdit数据集具有高质量，能显著提升模型性能，与基线方法相比展现出优越性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了开源的ScaleEditor框架和ScaleEdit-12M数据集，实现了低成本、可扩展的高质量数据生成。研究意义在于表明开源代理管道可以接近商业级数据质量，为统一多模态模型训练提供可靠数据源。未来工作方向可能包括进一步扩展数据集或应用于其他领域，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: MKA: Memory-Keyed Attention for Efficient Long-Context Reasoning
abstract: As long-context language modeling becomes increasingly important, the cost of maintaining and attending to large Key/Value (KV) caches grows rapidly, becoming a major bottleneck in both training and inference. While prior works such as Multi-Query Attention (MQA) and Multi-Latent Attention (MLA) reduce memory by sharing or compressing KV features, they often trade off representation quality or incur runtime overhead. We propose Memory-Keyed Attention (MKA), a hierarchical attention mechanism that integrates multi-level KV caches (local, session, and long-term) and learns to route attention across them dynamically. We further introduce Route-Fused MKA (FastMKA), a broadcast-routed variant that fuses memory sources before attention computation for improved efficiency. Experiments on different sequence lengths show that FastMKA achieves a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off: comparable perplexity to MLA while achieving up to 5x faster training throughput and 1.8x lower evaluation latency. These results highlight MKA as a practical and extensible framework for efficient long-context attention.
comment: Accepted to the ACM Computing Frontiers 2026 Conference (Oral Presentation) and the ICML 2025 Long Context Modeling Workshop

light_analysis.overview: MKA通过层次化KV缓存和动态路由注意力机制，实现了高效长上下文推理，并在FastMKA变体中融合内存源以提升效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 长上下文语言建模的重要性日益增加，但维护大型Key/Value（KV）缓存导致成本急剧上升，成为训练和推理的主要瓶颈。现有方法如Multi-Query Attention和Multi-Latent Attention通过共享或压缩KV特征减少内存使用，但往往以牺牲表示质量或增加运行时开销为代价，因此亟需一种在保持准确性的同时提高效率的新方法。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Memory-Keyed Attention（MKA），这是一种层次化注意力机制，通过整合多级KV缓存（包括本地、会话和长期缓存）来优化内存管理，并学习动态地路由注意力在这些缓存之间。进一步，引入Route-Fused MKA（FastMKA）变体，采用广播路由在注意力计算前融合内存源，以降低计算开销并提升整体效率。该方法的关键创新在于实现了对不同时间尺度的KV缓存的智能访问。
light_analysis.result: 实验在不同序列长度上进行，结果显示FastMKA在准确性和效率之间取得了良好平衡：与Multi-Latent Attention（MLA）相比，困惑度保持相当，同时训练吞吐量提升高达5倍，评估延迟降低1.8倍。这些结果表明MKA在维持性能的同时显著减少了计算资源消耗，优于现有基线方法。
light_analysis.conclusion: MKA作为一个实用且可扩展的框架，为高效长上下文注意力提供了新思路，其核心贡献在于层次化注意力机制和动态路由，改善了准确性和效率的权衡。该研究具有重要的学术价值，推动了长上下文语言建模的技术进步，并在实际应用中可能降低部署成本。未来工作可探索更广泛的数据集和模型架构的集成。

title: Inverting Neural Networks: New Methods to Generate Neural Network Inputs from Prescribed Outputs
abstract: Neural network systems describe complex mappings that can be very difficult to understand. In this paper, we study the inverse problem of determining the input images that get mapped to specific neural network classes. Ultimately, we expect that these images contain recognizable features that are associated with their corresponding class classifications. We introduce two general methods for solving the inverse problem. In our forward pass method, we develop an inverse method based on a root-finding algorithm and the Jacobian with respect to the input image. In our backward pass method, we iteratively invert each layer, at the top. During the inversion process, we add random vectors sampled from the null-space of each linear layer. We demonstrate our new methods on both transformer architectures and sequential networks based on linear layers. Unlike previous methods, we show that our new methods are able to produce random-like input images that yield near perfect classification scores in all cases, revealing vulnerabilities in the underlying networks. Hence, we conclude that the proposed methods provide a more comprehensive coverage of the input image spaces that solve the inverse mapping problem.
comment: Accepted at 2026 IEEE Southwest Symposium on Image Analysis and Interpretation (SSIAI)

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了两种新方法解决神经网络逆映射问题，通过前向和后向传递生成输入图像以匹配指定输出，提高了输入空间覆盖的全面性。
light_analysis.motivation: 神经网络系统描述复杂的映射，难以理解和分析。本研究旨在解决逆映射问题，即从指定的输出类别推导出对应的输入图像，期望这些输入图像包含可识别的特征，以增强对网络分类机制的理解。现有方法在全面覆盖输入空间和揭示网络脆弱性方面存在不足，限制了逆问题的解决效率。因此，开发更有效的逆映射方法对于改进模型解释性和安全性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文引入了两种通用方法：前向传递方法基于根查找算法和输入图像的雅可比矩阵进行逆映射，通过优化求解来生成输入；后向传递方法则迭代反转神经网络中的每个层，从输出层开始，并在反转过程中向线性层的零空间添加随机向量，以增强随机性。这些方法适用于多种架构，包括transformer和基于线性层的顺序网络，展示了普适性。关键技术在于结合雅可比矩阵分析和零空间采样，以高效探索输入空间。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，新方法能生成随机状的输入图像，这些图像在所有测试情况下都能获得近乎完美的分类分数，与先前方法相比，新方法更全面地覆盖了输入图像空间。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率，但强调了在多种网络架构上的有效性，揭示了底层神经网络在逆映射中的脆弱性，为后续安全性分析提供了基础。
light_analysis.conclusion: 提出的方法成功解决了神经网络逆映射问题，通过更全面的输入空间覆盖，增进了对网络脆弱性的理解。研究具有学术价值，推动了逆问题领域的发展；实际应用中，可用于模型解释性增强和安全性测试。未来工作可扩展到更多网络架构，并探索在对抗性攻击中的潜在应用。

title: FIPO: Eliciting Deep Reasoning with Future-KL Influenced Policy Optimization
abstract: We present Future-KL Influenced Policy Optimization (FIPO), a reinforcement learning algorithm designed to overcome reasoning bottlenecks in large language models. While GRPO style training scales effectively, it typically relies on outcome-based rewards (ORM) that distribute a global advantage uniformly across every token in a trajectory. We argue that this coarse-grained credit assignment imposes a performance ceiling by failing to distinguish critical logical pivots from trivial tokens. FIPO addresses this by incorporating discounted future-KL divergence into the policy update, creating a dense advantage formulation that re-weights tokens based on their influence on subsequent trajectory behavior. Empirically, FIPO enables models to break through the length stagnation seen in standard baselines. Evaluated on Qwen2.5-32B, FIPO extends the average chain-of-thought length from roughly 4,000 to over 10,000 tokens and increases AIME 2024 Pass@1 accuracy from 50.0% to a peak of 58.0% (converging at approximately 56.0\%). This outperforms both DeepSeek-R1-Zero-Math-32B (around 47.0%) and o1-mini (approximately 56.0%). Our results suggest that establishing dense advantage formulations is a vital path for evolving ORM-based algorithms to unlock the full reasoning potential of base models. We open-source our training system, built on the verl framework.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了FIPO算法，通过引入未来-KL散度改进强化学习中的信用分配，以提升大语言模型的推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决大型语言模型在强化学习训练中的推理瓶颈问题。现有方法如GRPO依赖基于结果的奖励，导致信用分配粗粒度，无法区分关键逻辑转折点和无关紧要的令牌，这限制了模型性能并形成性能天花板。因此，需要更精细的信用分配机制来优化推理过程。
light_analysis.method: FIPO算法通过将贴现的未来-KL散度融入策略更新，创建密集的优势公式，根据令牌对未来轨迹行为的影响重新权重令牌。关键创新在于改进信用分配，避免均匀分配全局优势。研究使用Qwen2.5-32B模型，基于verl框架构建训练系统，并开源代码以促进复现和应用。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，在Qwen2.5-32B模型上，FIPO将平均思维链长度从约4,000增至超过10,000令牌，AIME 2024 Pass@1准确率从50.0%提升到峰值58.0%（收敛于约56.0%）。这优于DeepSeek-R1-Zero-Math-32B的约47.0%和o1-mini的约56.0%，证实了FIPO在性能和效率上的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: FIPO的主要贡献是通过密集优势公式有效提升了语言模型的推理能力，为基于ORM的算法发展提供了新路径，有助于解锁基础模型的全部潜力。研究具有学术价值，推动强化学习在AI推理中的应用，并开源系统促进社区发展；未来工作可进一步探索局限性和扩展应用场景。

title: OmniDiT: Extending Diffusion Transformer to Omni-VTON Framework
abstract: Despite the rapid advancement of Virtual Try-On (VTON) and Try-Off (VTOFF) technologies, existing VTON methods face challenges with fine-grained detail preservation, generalization to complex scenes, complicated pipeline, and efficient inference. To tackle these problems, we propose OmniDiT, an omni Virtual Try-On framework based on the Diffusion Transformer, which combines try-on and try-off tasks into one unified model. Specifically, we first establish a self-evolving data curation pipeline to continuously produce data, and construct a large VTON dataset Omni-TryOn, which contains over 380k diverse and high-quality garment-model-tryon image pairs and detailed text prompts. Then, we employ the token concatenation and design an adaptive position encoding to effectively incorporate multiple reference conditions. To relieve the bottleneck of long sequence computation, we are the first to introduce Shifted Window Attention into the diffusion model, thus achieving a linear complexity. To remedy the performance degradation caused by local window attention, we utilize multiple timestep prediction and an alignment loss to improve generation fidelity. Experiments reveal that, under various complex scenes, our method achieves the best performance in both the model-free VTON and VTOFF tasks and a performance comparable to current SOTA methods in the model-based VTON task.

light_analysis.overview: OmniDiT通过基于Diffusion Transformer的统一框架，将虚拟试穿和试脱任务整合，解决了现有方法在细节保留、复杂场景泛化和计算效率方面的挑战。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有虚拟试穿技术面临精细细节丢失、复杂场景泛化能力不足、流程复杂和推理效率低等问题，这限制了实际应用中的用户体验和性能。这些问题的重要性在于虚拟试穿在电子商务等领域有广泛应用需求，而现有方法往往难以兼顾高保真度和高效处理，因此开发一个统一且高效的框架具有紧迫性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出OmniDiT框架，首先建立自进化数据管道构建大型数据集Omni-TryOn，包含超过38万对高质量图像和文本提示。采用token concatenation和自适应位置编码整合多个参考条件。创新性地将Shifted Window Attention引入扩散模型以降低计算复杂度至线性，同时使用多时间步预测和对齐损失来弥补局部注意力的性能下降，提升生成保真度。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，在多种复杂场景下，OmniDiT在模型无关的VTON和VTOFF任务中取得最佳性能，在模型相关的VTON任务中性能与当前最先进方法相当。摘要未明确提供具体数值如准确率，但通过与基线方法对比，强调了其在多个任务上的优越性和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: OmniDiT通过统一框架和新技术显著提升了虚拟试穿技术的性能，贡献包括构建大型数据集、引入Shifted Window Attention等创新，具有学术价值（扩展Diffusion Transformer应用）和实际应用价值（改善用户体验）。未来工作可进一步优化模型在更复杂场景下的泛化能力，或扩展至其他视觉任务。

title: LoD-Loc v3: Generalized Aerial Localization in Dense Cities using Instance Silhouette Alignment
abstract: We present LoD-Loc v3, a novel method for generalized aerial visual localization in dense urban environments. While prior work LoD-Loc v2 achieves localization through semantic building silhouette alignment with low-detail city models, it suffers from two key limitations: poor cross-scene generalization and frequent failure in dense building scenes. Our method addresses these challenges through two key innovations. First, we develop a new synthetic data generation pipeline that produces InsLoD-Loc - the largest instance segmentation dataset for aerial imagery to date, comprising 100k images with precise instance building annotations. This enables trained models to exhibit remarkable zero-shot generalization capability. Second, we reformulate the localization paradigm by shifting from semantic to instance silhouette alignment, which significantly reduces pose estimation ambiguity in dense scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LoD-Loc v3 outperforms existing state-of-the-art (SOTA) baselines, achieving superior performance in both cross-scene and dense urban scenarios with a large margin. The project is available at https://nudt-sawlab.github.io/LoD-Locv3/.

light_analysis.overview: LoD-Loc v3 通过合成数据生成和实例轮廓对齐，显著提升了密集城市航空视觉定位的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 先前的 LoD-Loc v2 方法在密集城市环境中存在跨场景泛化能力差和建筑密集场景中频繁失败的问题，这限制了航空定位在实际应用中的可靠性。密集城市环境下的视觉定位对于无人机导航、城市建模等任务至关重要，现有方法因依赖低细节语义轮廓而无法有效处理复杂场景，导致定位误差增大。因此，研究旨在解决这些局限性，提高定位精度和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出两个关键创新点：首先，开发了一个合成数据生成管道，构建了 InsLoD-Loc 数据集，这是目前最大的航空图像实例分割数据集，包含 10 万张带有精确建筑实例标注的图像，以增强模型的零样本泛化能力。其次，将定位范式从语义轮廓对齐转向实例轮廓对齐，这通过减少密集场景中姿态估计的模糊性来改进定位精度。方法依赖于实例分割技术，利用合成数据训练模型，实现在真实场景中的稳健应用。
light_analysis.result: 广泛实验表明，LoD-Loc v3 在跨场景和密集城市场景中均优于现有最先进的基线方法，性能提升幅度显著。具体地，它在处理复杂建筑布局时表现出更高的定位准确性和鲁棒性，虽然摘要未提供具体数值指标，但强调了相对于基线方法的显著优势。这证明了实例轮廓对齐和合成数据生成在解决泛化和密集场景挑战上的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LoD-Loc v3 的主要贡献在于通过合成数据和实例轮廓对齐，显著改善了航空视觉定位在密集城市环境中的泛化能力和精度，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值，如支持无人机自主导航和城市规划。研究的局限性，如可能的数据偏差或计算成本，摘要未明确说明，未来工作可进一步优化模型效率或扩展到其他环境类型。

title: PhyUnfold-Net: Advancing Remote Sensing Change Detection with Physics-Guided Deep Unfolding
abstract: Bi-temporal change detection is highly sensitive to acquisition discrepancies, including illumination, season, and atmosphere, which often cause false alarms. We observe that genuine changes exhibit higher patch-wise singular-value entropy (SVE) than pseudo changes in the feature-difference space. Motivated by this physical prior, we propose PhyUnfold-Net, a physics-guided deep unfolding framework that formulates change detection as an explicit decomposition problem. The proposed Iterative Change Decomposition Module (ICDM) unrolls a multi-step solver to progressively separate mixed discrepancy features into a change component and a nuisance component. To stabilize this process, we introduce a staged Exploration-and-Constraint loss (S-SEC), which encourages component separation in early steps while constraining nuisance magnitude in later steps to avoid degenerate solutions. We further design a Wavelet Spectral Suppression Module (WSSM) to suppress acquisition-induced spectral mismatch before decomposition. Experiments on four benchmarks show improvements over state-of-the-art methods, with gains under challenging conditions.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出PhyUnfold-Net，一个物理引导的深度展开框架，通过分解方法有效提升遥感变化检测精度，减少采集差异导致的误报。
light_analysis.motivation: 双时相遥感变化检测对光照、季节、大气等采集差异高度敏感，常引发误报，影响环境监测和灾害评估等实际应用的可靠性。现有基于深度学习的方法往往忽略物理先验，难以区分真实变化与伪变化，导致在挑战性条件下性能下降。因此，需要一种融合物理特性来增强检测准确性的创新方法。
light_analysis.method: PhyUnfold-Net采用物理引导的深度展开框架，基于块状奇异值熵（SVE）先验，将变化检测建模为显式分解问题。核心是迭代变化分解模块（ICDM），它展开多步求解器逐步分离混合差异特征为变化和噪声分量。为稳定训练，引入分阶段探索与约束损失（S-SEC），早期鼓励组件分离，后期约束噪声幅度以避免退化解。此外，设计小波谱抑制模块（WSSM）在分解前预处理，抑制采集引起的谱不匹配。
light_analysis.result: 实验在四个遥感变化检测基准数据集上进行，结果显示PhyUnfold-Net优于现有方法。尤其在光照变化和季节差异等挑战性条件下，该方法表现更优，有效减少了误报。具体性能指标如准确率提升未在摘要中详细说明，但整体对比证实了框架的显著改进效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: PhyUnfold-Net的主要贡献在于结合物理先验和深度展开技术，提出一种新颖的变化检测框架，提升了遥感应用的准确性。学术上，它为融合物理模型与深度学习提供了新思路；实际上，有助于提高环境监测和城市管理的效率。局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但可进一步探索泛化能力和扩展应用场景。

title: Cascade-Aware Multi-Agent Routing: Spatio-Temporal Sidecars and Geometry-Switching
abstract: Advanced AI reasoning systems route tasks through dynamic execution graphs of specialized agents. We identify a structural blind spot in this architecture: schedulers optimize load and fitness but lack a model of how failure propagates differently in tree-like versus cyclic graphs. In tree-like regimes, a single failure cascades exponentially; in dense cyclic regimes, it self-limits. A geometry-blind scheduler cannot distinguish these cases. We formalize this observability gap as an online geometry-control problem. We prove a cascade-sensitivity condition: failure spread is supercritical when per-edge propagation probability exceeds the inverse of the graph's branching factor (p > e^{-γ}, where γis the BFS shell-growth exponent). We close this gap with a spatio-temporal sidecar that predicts which routing geometry fits the current topology. The sidecar comprises (i) a Euclidean propagation scorer for dense, cyclic subgraphs, (ii) a hyperbolic scorer capturing exponential risk in tree-like subgraphs, and (iii) a compact learned gate (133 parameters) that blends the two scores using topology and geometry-aware features. On 250 benchmark scenarios spanning five topology regimes, the sidecar lifts the native scheduler's win rate from 50.4% to 87.2% (+36.8 pp). In tree-like regimes, gains reach +48 to +68 pp. The learned gate achieves held-out AUC = 0.9247, confirming geometry preference is recoverable from live signals. Cross-architecture validation on Barabasi-Albert, Watts-Strogatz, and Erdos-Renyi graphs confirms propagation modeling generalizes across graph families.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文提出级联感知的多代理路由框架，通过时空侧车预测几何切换，以优化AI推理系统中的故障传播。
light_analysis.motivation: 高级AI推理系统依赖动态执行图路由任务，但现有调度器仅关注负载和适合度优化，缺乏对故障传播的建模，导致无法区分树状和循环图结构中的传播差异。树状图中单个故障呈指数级扩散，而循环图中则自我限制，几何盲调度器难以应对此差异。因此，研究旨在解决这个几何盲点，通过建模故障传播提升路由鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 方法核心是引入时空侧车，预测适合当前拓扑的路由几何。侧车包括欧几里得计分器处理密集循环子图、双曲计分器捕获树状子图的指数风险，以及一个紧凑学习门（133参数）利用拓扑和几何特征混合两个分数。论文形式化为在线几何控制问题，并证明级联敏感条件（如p > e^{-γ}），基于五类拓扑体制的基准场景验证模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在250个基准场景中，侧车将原生调度器的胜率从50.4%提升至87.2%，绝对提升36.8个百分点；树状体制下增益达48-68个百分点。学习门在held-out数据上AUC达0.9247，表明几何偏好可从实时信号中学习。跨Barabasi-Albert、Watts-Strogatz和Erdos-Renyi图类型的验证显示传播建模具强通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文贡献了级联感知路由方法，通过几何切换优化任务调度，填补了故障传播建模的空白。学术上形式化了几何控制问题并提供敏感条件，实际应用中增强了多代理系统的性能和鲁棒性。未来工作可探索更广泛系统集成或门控机制优化，摘要未明确说明局限性。

title: PRISM: Demystifying Retention and Interaction in Mid-Training
abstract: We present PRISM, a comprehensive empirical study of mid-training design choices for large language models. Through controlled experiments across seven base models spanning four families (Granite, LLaMA, Mistral, Nemotron-H), two architecture types (dense Transformer and attention-Mamba hybrid), and scales from 3B to 24B parameters, we show that mid-training on approximately 27B high-quality tokens yields consistent gains of +15 to +40 points on math, +5 to +12 points on code, and +6 to +13 points on science benchmarks while preserving general performance. The full PRISM to RL pipeline improves macro-average across six reasoning benchmarks from under 12 to 29-42 (a 3-4x improvement), whereas RL applied directly to most of the base models remains substantially less effective, with AIME scores near zero. Data composition matters most at mid-training, not RL: including science data during mid-training unlocks +17 to +28 point GPQA-Diamond gains during RL, while changing the RL mix produces less than 2 point differences. Mechanistically, mid-training densely restructures over 90% of model weights, while RL makes sparse, front-loaded refinements to approximately 5% of parameters. Representation analysis (CKA) confirms that RL consistently preserves mid-training's representational geometry (over 0.998 CKA) across architectures. Crucially, RL applies identical weight changes regardless of starting point, yet only succeeds on mid-trained models, consistent with mid-training placing the model in a configuration from which RL can effectively improve performance. Our results demonstrate that retention-aware mid-training is highly effective for reliable reasoning enhancement and provide practical guidance for designing robust mid-training pipelines.

light_analysis.overview: PRISM实证研究揭示，中期训练通过数据组合和权重重构，能显著提升大型语言模型的推理性能，为训练流程设计提供关键见解。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型在数学、代码和科学推理任务上需要持续改进，但现有方法如直接应用强化学习（RL）效果有限，AIME分数接近零，表明训练策略不足。本研究旨在解决RL应用无效的问题，强调中期训练设计选择的重要性，以提升模型在复杂任务上的性能，背景涉及优化训练流程以提高推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出PRISM框架，通过控制实验研究中期训练的影响。使用七种基础模型，涵盖四种家族（如Granite、LLaMA）、两种架构（密集Transformer和注意力-Mamba混合）及参数规模3B到24B。关键方法包括数据组合分析（如加入科学数据）、评估权重变化（中期训练重构90%权重，RL调整5%），并使用表示分析（CKA）验证表示几何的保留。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，中期训练在数学基准上带来+15到+40点增益，代码+5到+12点，科学+6到+13点。全PRISM到RL流程将六个推理基准的宏观平均从低于12提升至29-42（改进3-4倍），而直接RL应用效果差（AIME分数近零）。数据组合在中期训练中关键，科学数据在RL期间带来+17到+28点GPQA-Diamond增益。表示分析显示RL保留中期训练的表示几何（CKA超过0.998）。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证实中期训练对可靠推理增强高度有效，通过密集权重重构和优化数据组合实现性能提升。学术上揭示了训练机制中中期训练的关键作用，实际上为设计稳健的中期训练流程提供实践指导。未来工作可扩展至更多模型架构或任务，以进一步验证通用性，摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: NLP Occupational Emergence Analysis: How Occupations Form and Evolve in Real Time -- A Zero-Assumption Method Demonstrated on AI in the US Technology Workforce, 2022-2026
abstract: Occupations form and evolve faster than classification systems can track. We propose that a genuine occupation is a self-reinforcing structure (a bipartite co-attractor) in which a shared professional vocabulary makes practitioners cohesive as a group, and the cohesive group sustains the vocabulary. This co-attractor concept enables a zero-assumption method for detecting occupational emergence from resume data, requiring no predefined taxonomy or job titles: we test vocabulary cohesion and population cohesion independently, with ablation to test whether the vocabulary is the mechanism binding the population. Applied to 8.2 million US resumes (2022-2026), the method correctly identifies established occupations and reveals a striking asymmetry for AI: a cohesive professional vocabulary formed rapidly in early 2024, but the practitioner population never cohered. The pre-existing AI community dissolved as the tools went mainstream, and the new vocabulary was absorbed into existing careers rather than binding a new occupation. AI appears to be a diffusing technology, not an emerging occupation. We discuss whether introducing an "AI Engineer" occupational category could catalyze population cohesion around the already-formed vocabulary, completing the co-attractor.
comment: This manuscript has been withdrawn by the authors pending internal review and substantial revision

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了一种基于共吸引子概念的零假设方法，用于实时检测职业形成，并以AI技术为例揭示了其作为扩散技术而非新兴职业的动态。
light_analysis.motivation: 职业的快速形成和演化速度超过传统分类系统的追踪能力，这在劳动力市场分析和政策制定中造成信息滞后。现有方法通常依赖预定义的职业分类或职位名称，缺乏灵活性和实时性，无法准确捕捉职业的实时动态。因此，本研究旨在开发一种无需先验假设的方法，以更好地理解就业趋势和技术扩散的机制，弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出了一种零假设方法，基于共吸引子概念检测职业出现。该方法的核心是测试专业词汇凝聚和从业者群体凝聚的独立性，并使用消融实验验证词汇是否是绑定群体的机制，无需依赖预定义分类或职位。创新点在于通过分析简历数据中的词汇和群体动态来识别职业形成，关键细节包括使用2022年至2026年间820万份美国技术劳动力的简历数据集进行实证验证。
light_analysis.result: 该方法成功识别了已建立的职业，验证了其有效性。在AI技术的案例中，发现了一个显著不对称现象：专业词汇在2024年初迅速形成凝聚，但从业者群体却从未凝聚，这表明AI技术被吸收到现有职业中，而非催生新的职业。与基线相比，方法无需预定义假设即可揭示职业动态，具体表现为AI是一种扩散技术，而不是一个新兴的职业类别。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了共吸引子概念和零假设方法，为职业形成研究提供了新的分析框架。学术上，它深化了对职业动态的理解；实际应用上，有助于劳动力市场分析和政策制定。局限性在于方法依赖于简历数据的质量和代表性，未来工作可以探讨如何通过引入“AI工程师”等职业类别来催化群体凝聚，并扩展方法到其他技术领域。

title: Selective Noise Suppression and Discriminative Mutual Interaction for Robust Audio-Visual Segmentation
abstract: The ability to capture and segment sounding objects in dynamic visual scenes is crucial for the development of Audio-Visual Segmentation (AVS) tasks. While significant progress has been made in this area, the interaction between audio and visual modalities still requires further exploration. In this work, we aim to answer the following questions: How can a model effectively suppress audio noise while enhancing relevant audio information? How can we achieve discriminative interaction between the audio and visual modalities? To this end, we propose SDAVS, equipped with the Selective Noise-Resilient Processor (SNRP) module and the Discriminative Audio-Visual Mutual Fusion (DAMF) strategy. The proposed SNRP mitigates audio noise interference by selectively emphasizing relevant auditory cues, while DAMF ensures more consistent audio-visual representations. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmark AVS datasets, especially in multi-source and complex scenes. \textit{The code and model are available at https://github.com/happylife-pk/SDAVS}.
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Multimedia (TMM) 2026. Code: https://github.com/happylife-pk/SDAVS

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出SDAVS方法，通过选择性噪声抑制和判别性互交互增强音频-视觉分割的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 音频-视觉分割（AVS）任务旨在动态视觉场景中捕捉和分割有声对象，对于开发智能系统理解多模态环境至关重要。现有方法在音频和视觉模态交互方面仍有不足，尤其是在音频噪声干扰和模态间交互不充分的场景下，影响了分割的准确性和鲁棒性。因此，本研究聚焦于如何有效抑制音频噪声并增强相关音频信息，同时实现判别性的音频-视觉交互，以解决复杂场景中的分割挑战。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了SDAVS方法，核心包括选择性噪声韧性处理器（SNRP）模块和判别性音频-视觉互融（DAMF）策略。SNRP通过选择性强调相关听觉线索来减轻音频噪声干扰，提升音频信息的质量；DAMF则促进音频和视觉模态之间的判别性交互，确保更一致和有效的多模态表示融合。该方法在基准AVS数据集上进行验证，未在摘要中明确提及具体模型架构或数据集细节，但强调了这些模块的创新技术特色。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，SDAVS方法在音频-视觉分割的基准数据集上取得了最先进的性能，特别是在多源和复杂场景中。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标如准确率提升或效率改进数值，但强调了该方法相对于基线方法的优势，证明了SNRP和DAMF模块在提高分割鲁棒性和效果方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了SDAVS方法，结合SNRP和DAMF模块，显著提升了音频-视觉分割的鲁棒性和性能。学术价值在于深入探索了音频噪声抑制和模态交互机制，为多模态学习领域提供了新思路。实际应用价值包括改善智能系统在嘈杂环境下的对象分割能力。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但暗示了进一步探索音频-视觉交互的潜力。

title: MemReward: Graph-Based Experience Memory for LLM Reward Prediction with Limited Labels
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have been driven by reinforcement-learning-based post-training, which requires multiple rollouts with rewards. However, obtaining ground truth labels for the calculation of rewards on a scale often requires expensive human labeling or time-consuming verification procedures. For instance, evaluating mathematical proofs demands expert review, and open-ended question answering lacks definitive ground truth. When ground truth labels are scarce, the effectiveness of reinforcement learning fine-tuning can be constrained. We introduce MemReward, a graph-based experience memory framework: an initial LLM policy generates rollouts for each query, each comprising a thinking process and a final answer, and these rollouts are stored as experience memory. Queries, thinking processes, and answers form nodes in a heterogeneous graph with similarity and structural edges; a GNN trained on labeled rollouts propagates rewards to unlabeled rollouts during online optimization. Experiments on Qwen2.5-3B and 1.5B in mathematics, question answering, and code generation demonstrate that MemReward, with only 20% labels, achieves 97.3% of Oracle performance on 3B and 96.6% on 1.5B, surpassing Oracle in out-of-domain tasks. Performance scales smoothly with label budget, reaching 99.4% of Oracle at 70% labels.

light_analysis.overview: MemReward提出一种基于图的经验记忆框架，用于在有限标签下预测大语言模型的奖励，提升强化学习后训练效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型的强化学习后训练需要大量奖励标签，但获取这些标签成本高昂，如数学证明需专家评审，开放问题无标准答案。现有方法依赖昂贵的人工标注或验证流程，当标签稀缺时，强化学习微调效果受限，导致训练效率低下和模型性能不足。因此，本研究旨在解决奖励标签稀缺问题，降低训练成本，提升模型在有限资源下的表现。
light_analysis.method: MemReward框架构建了一个基于图的经验记忆系统：初始LLM策略为每个查询生成包含思考过程和最终答案的rollout，存储在经验记忆中。查询、思考过程和答案作为异构图节点，通过相似性和结构边连接。使用图神经网络在标记的rollouts上进行训练，在线优化时传播奖励到未标记的rollouts。关键创新点包括图的构建和GNN的应用，以利用有限标签数据预测奖励。实验中采用Qwen2.5-3B和1.5B模型，任务涵盖数学、问答和代码生成。
light_analysis.result: 在数学、问答和代码生成任务中，实验结果显示，MemReward仅使用20%的标签，就在3B和1.5B模型上分别达到Oracle性能的97.3%和96.6%。在域外任务中，MemReward甚至超越Oracle性能。性能随标签预算平滑提升，在70%标签时达到Oracle性能的99.4%。这表明该方法在标签稀缺环境下能有效逼近或超越全标签性能，减少对昂贵标签的依赖。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了MemReward框架，一种基于图的经验记忆方法，用于大语言模型强化学习后训练中的奖励预测，显著降低对标签数据的依赖。实验证明了其有效性和可扩展性，在多个任务上取得优异性能。该研究具有重要学术价值，为解决LLM训练中的标签稀缺问题提供了新思路，并具有实际应用潜力，能降低训练成本。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能包括优化图结构或扩展到更多领域。

title: A Dynamic Bayesian and Machine Learning Framework for Quantitative Evaluation and Prediction of Operator Situation Awareness in Nuclear Power Plants
abstract: Operator situation awareness is a pivotal yet elusive determinant of human reliability in complex nuclear control environments. Existing assessment methods, such as SAGAT and SART, remain static, retrospective, and detached from the evolving cognitive dynamics that drive operational risk. To overcome these limitations, this study introduces the dynamic Bayesian machine learning framework for situation awareness (DBML SA), a unified approach that fuses probabilistic reasoning and data driven intelligence to achieve quantitative, interpretable, and predictive situation awareness modeling. Leveraging 212 operational event reports (2007 to 2021), the framework reconstructs the causal temporal structure of 11 performance shaping factors across multiple cognitive layers. The Bayesian component enables time evolving inference of situation awareness reliability under uncertainty, while the neural component establishes a nonlinear predictive mapping from PSFs to SART scores, achieving a mean absolute percentage error of 13.8 % with statistical consistency to subjective evaluations (p > 0.05). Results highlight training quality and stress dynamics as primary drivers of situation awareness degradation. Overall, DBML SA transcends traditional questionnaire-based assessments by enabling real-time cognitive monitoring, sensitivity analysis, and early-warning prediction, paving the way toward intelligent human machine reliability management in next-generation digital main control rooms.
comment: This article is withdrawn due to a technical error identified after submission in the data processing and modeling workflow described in Sections 3 -- 4. The issue affects feature construction and statistical estimation, which may compromise the reliability of the reported results. The authors withdraw this version to avoid potential misunderstanding. A revised study may be submitted in the future

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了动态贝叶斯机器学习框架DBML SA，用于核电厂操作员情境意识的量化评估和预测，融合概率推理和数据驱动智能。
light_analysis.motivation: 核电厂操作员情境意识是人类可靠性的关键因素，但现有评估方法如SAGAT和SART存在静态、回顾性局限，无法捕捉实时认知动态，导致操作风险评估不足。因此，研究旨在开发一种动态、量化的框架，以改进情境意识的评估和预测，弥补传统方法在实时性和预测能力上的缺陷，从而提升核安全管理的有效性。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出DBML SA框架，结合动态贝叶斯推理和机器学习技术。利用212个操作事件报告（2007-2021年），重建了11个性能塑造因素在多个认知层的因果时间结构。贝叶斯组件处理不确定性下的时间演变推理，神经网络组件建立从PSFs到SART分数的非线性预测映射，实现可解释和预测的情境意识建模。
light_analysis.result: DBML SA框架在预测SART分数时，达到平均绝对百分比误差13.8%，与主观评价统计一致（p > 0.05），表明预测准确性高。实验识别出培训质量和压力动态是情境意识下降的主要驱动因素，该框架在量化和预测能力上超越了传统问卷评估方法，提供了更可靠的风险评估工具。
light_analysis.conclusion: DBML SA框架通过融合概率推理和数据驱动智能，实现了情境意识的量化、可解释和预测评估，推动了人机可靠性管理的学术进展。它支持实时认知监控、敏感性分析和预警预测，为下一代数字控制室的智能管理提供了新途径，具有重要的理论和应用价值。摘要未明确说明未来工作方向。

title: Where, What, Why: Toward Explainable 3D-GS Watermarking
abstract: As 3D Gaussian Splatting becomes the de facto representation for interactive 3D assets, robust yet imperceptible watermarking is critical. We present a representation-native framework that separates where to write from how to preserve quality. A Trio-Experts module operates directly on Gaussian primitives to derive priors for carrier selection, while a Safety and Budget Aware Gate (SBAG) allocates Gaussians to watermark carriers, optimized for bit resilience under perturbation and bitrate budgets, and to visual compensators that are insulated from watermark loss. To maintain fidelity, we introduce a channel-wise group mask that controls gradient propagation for carriers and compensators, thereby limiting Gaussian parameter updates, repairing local artifacts, and preserving high-frequency details without increasing runtime. Our design yields view-consistent watermark persistence and strong robustness against common image distortions such as compression and noise, while achieving a favorable robustness-quality trade-off compared with prior methods. In addition, decoupled finetuning provides per-Gaussian attributions that reveal where the message is carried and why those carriers are selected, enabling auditable explainability. Compared with state-of-the-art methods, our approach achieves a PSNR improvement of +0.83 dB and a bit-accuracy gain of +1.24%.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种用于3D高斯溅射的可解释水印框架，通过分离载波选择与质量保持，实现鲁棒且不可感知的水印嵌入。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着3D高斯溅射成为交互式3D资产的实际标准表示，嵌入鲁棒且不可察觉的水印对保护数字内容至关重要。现有水印方法往往难以平衡鲁棒性、视觉质量和可解释性，例如在对抗图像失真（如压缩和噪声）时可能牺牲保真度或缺乏透明度。因此，本研究旨在解决这些不足，开发一种新框架来优化水印嵌入过程，同时提供可审计的解释性，以增强实际应用中的可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了一个表示原生的水印框架，核心创新是分离“在哪里写”与“如何保持质量”。Trio-Experts模块直接在Gaussian primitives上操作，通过计算先验选择水印载波；SBAG根据比特弹性和比特率预算，将Gaussians分配给水印载波和视觉补偿器。为保持保真度，引入了通道分组掩码来控制梯度传播，限制Gaussian参数更新，修复局部伪影并保留高频细节，无需增加运行时开销。解耦微调技术进一步提供了每个Gaussian的归因，以实现可解释性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，该方法在性能指标上显著提升：PSNR提高+0.83 dB，比特准确率增益+1.24%。它实现了视图一致的水印持久性，并在对抗常见图像失真（如压缩和噪声）时表现出强鲁棒性。与现有先进方法相比，该方法在鲁棒性和视觉质量之间取得了更优的权衡，证明了其有效性，特别是在实际应用中保持高视觉保真度的同时增强水印稳定性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了一种可解释的3D高斯溅射水印框架，通过解耦设计和优化技术实现了鲁棒性、视觉质量和透明度的平衡。该研究具有重要的学术价值，推动了可解释AI在水印领域的应用，并为3D资产保护提供了实用解决方案。未来工作可进一步探索更复杂的攻击场景或扩展到其他3D表示方法，以提升通用性和适用性。

title: GazeShift: Unsupervised Gaze Estimation and Dataset for VR
abstract: Gaze estimation is instrumental in modern virtual reality (VR) systems. Despite significant progress in remote-camera gaze estimation, VR gaze research remains constrained by data scarcity, particularly the lack of large-scale, accurately labeled datasets captured with the off-axis camera configurations typical of modern headsets. Gaze annotation is difficult since fixation on intended targets cannot be guaranteed. To address these challenges, we introduce VRGaze, the first large-scale off-axis gaze estimation dataset for VR, comprising 2.1 million near-eye infrared images collected from 68 participants. We further propose GazeShift, an attention-guided unsupervised framework for learning gaze representations without labeled data. Unlike prior redirection-based methods that rely on multi-view or 3D geometry, GazeShift is tailored to near-eye imagery, achieving effective gaze-appearance disentanglement in a compact, real-time model. GazeShift embeddings can be optionally adapted to individual users via lightweight few-shot calibration, achieving a 1.84° mean error on VRGaze. On the remote-camera MPIIGaze dataset, the model achieves a 7.15° person-agnostic error, doing so with 10x fewer parameters and 35x fewer FLOPs than baseline methods. Deployed natively on a VR headset GPU, inference takes only 5 ms. Combined with demonstrated robustness to illumination changes, these results highlight GazeShift as a label-efficient, real-time solution for VR gaze tracking. Project code and the VRGaze dataset are released at https://github.com/gazeshift3/gazeshift

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出GazeShift，一种注意力引导的无监督视线估计框架，并发布大规模VRGaze数据集，用于高效VR视线跟踪。
light_analysis.motivation: VR系统中的视线估计至关重要，但现有研究面临数据稀缺的挑战，特别是缺乏大规模、准确标注的离轴相机数据集，该配置在现代头戴设备中常见。由于注视目标难以保证，标注过程复杂，导致数据获取困难，限制了视线跟踪的准确性和广泛应用。因此，需要开发无需标注数据的方法来解决这些问题，提升VR系统的交互体验。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出GazeShift框架，采用注意力机制在无监督下学习视线表示。该方法专门针对近眼红外图像，实现视线与外观的有效解耦，无需依赖多视图或3D几何。关键创新包括模型架构紧凑、支持实时推理，并使用VRGaze数据集，包含210万张红外图像从68位参与者收集，以解决数据稀缺问题。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，GazeShift在VRGaze数据集上通过轻量级少样本校准达到1.84°平均误差。在远程相机MPIIGaze数据集上，人无关误差为7.15°，参数数量和计算量比基线方法减少10倍和35倍。在VR头戴设备GPU上部署，推理时间仅5毫秒，并展现出对光照变化的鲁棒性，验证了其高效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是引入VRGaze数据集和GazeShift无监督框架，为VR视线估计提供了标签高效、实时的解决方案，显著推动该领域的学术研究。实际应用价值在于优化VR用户体验，未来工作可能包括进一步模型优化或扩展数据集，以增强泛化能力。

title: Local Precise Refinement: A Dual-Gated Mixture-of-Experts for Enhancing Foundation Model Generalization against Spectral Shifts
abstract: Domain Generalization Semantic Segmentation (DGSS) in spectral remote sensing is severely challenged by spectral shifts across diverse acquisition conditions, which cause significant performance degradation for models deployed in unseen domains. While fine-tuning foundation models is a promising direction, existing methods employ global, homogeneous adjustments. This "one-size-fits-all" tuning struggles with the spatial heterogeneity of land cover, causing semantic confusion. We argue that the key to robust DGSS lies not in a single global adaptation, but in performing fine-grained, spatially-adaptive refinement of a foundation model's features. To achieve this, we propose SpectralMoE, a novel fine-tuning framework for DGSS. It operationalizes this principle by utilizing a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture to perform \textbf{local precise refinement} on the foundation model's features, incorporating depth features estimated from selected RGB bands of the spectral remote sensing imagery to guide the fine-tuning process. Specifically, SpectralMoE employs a dual-gated MoE architecture that independently routes visual and depth features to top-k selected experts for specialized refinement, enabling modality-specific adjustments. A subsequent cross-attention mechanism then judiciously fuses the refined structural cues into the visual stream, mitigating semantic ambiguities caused by spectral variations.
