Extensive experiments show that SpectralMoE sets a new state-of-the-art on multiple DGSS benchmarks across hyperspectral, multispectral, and RGB remote sensing imagery.

light_analysis.overview: SpectralMoE通过双门控MoE架构和交叉注意力机制实现局部特征细化，提升基础模型在光谱遥感中对光谱偏移的泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 在光谱遥感中，域泛化语义分割（DGSS）因光谱偏移导致模型在未见域中性能显著下降，影响实际应用如环境监测。现有方法采用全局、同质调整策略，忽视了土地覆盖的空间异质性，容易引发语义混淆。因此，需要一种细粒度、空间自适应的调整方法，以增强模型鲁棒性和跨域适应性。
light_analysis.method: SpectralMoE采用基于Mixture-of-Experts（MoE）的框架，通过双门控架构独立路由视觉和深度特征到top-k专家进行模态特定细化。具体地，利用光谱遥感图像中选择的RGB波段估计深度特征来指导微调，随后通过交叉注意力机制将细化后的结构线索融合到视觉流中，以减轻光谱变化引起的语义模糊。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，SpectralMoE在多个DGSS基准上实现了新的最先进性能，涵盖高光谱、多光谱和RGB遥感图像。尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但研究表明该方法在对抗光谱偏移方面显著优于现有全局调整方法，证明了局部精确细化的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了SpectralMoE框架，通过双门控MoE和交叉注意力实现局部特征细化，有效提升基础模型对抗光谱偏移的泛化能力。这为域泛化语义分割提供了创新的细粒度微调方法，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值，未来可探索扩展到其他遥感任务或多模态场景。

title: LiveWorld: Simulating Out-of-Sight Dynamics in Generative Video World Models
abstract: Recent generative video world models aim to simulate visual environment evolution, allowing an observer to interactively explore the scene via camera control. However, they implicitly assume that the world only evolves within the observer's field of view. Once an object leaves the observer's view, its state is "frozen" in memory, and revisiting the same region later often fails to reflect events that should have occurred in the meantime. In this work, we identify and formalize this overlooked limitation as the "out-of-sight dynamics" problem, which impedes video world models from representing a continuously evolving world. To address this issue, we propose LiveWorld, a novel framework that extends video world models to support persistent world evolution. Instead of treating the world as static observational memory, LiveWorld models a persistent global state composed of a static 3D background and dynamic entities that continue evolving even when unobserved. To maintain these unseen dynamics, LiveWorld introduces a monitor-based mechanism that autonomously simulates the temporal progression of active entities and synchronizes their evolved states upon revisiting, ensuring spatially coherent rendering. For evaluation, we further introduce LiveBench, a dedicated benchmark for the task of maintaining out-of-sight dynamics. Extensive experiments show that LiveWorld enables persistent event evolution and long-term scene consistency, bridging the gap between existing 2D observation-based memory and true 4D dynamic world simulation. The baseline and benchmark will be publicly available at https://zichengduan.github.io/LiveWorld/index.html.

light_analysis.overview: LiveWorld框架通过引入持久全球状态和监控机制，解决了生成视频世界模型中视野外动态问题，实现了连续世界演化。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前生成式视频世界模型允许观察者交互探索场景，但隐含假设世界只在视野内演化，一旦物体离开视野，其状态在内存中被冻结，导致重新访问时无法反映期间发生的事件。这个问题被称为'视野外动态'问题，阻碍了模型表示持续演化世界的能力，现有方法基于2D观测为基础的内存，缺乏真实4D动态模拟，限制了在虚拟环境等应用中的实用性。
light_analysis.method: LiveWorld框架扩展视频世界模型，将世界建模为由静态3D背景和动态实体组成的持久全球状态，确保实体在未观察时继续演化。它引入基于监控的机制，自动模拟活跃实体的时间进展，并在重新访问时同步演化状态，以维持空间一致的渲染，关键创新包括替代静态观测内存，实现真实世界动态的连续模拟。
light_analysis.result: 论文提出LiveBench基准用于评估视野外动态维护任务，广泛实验表明LiveWorld能实现持久事件演化和长期场景一致性，弥合了现有2D观测为基础的内存与真实4D动态世界模拟之间的差距，摘要未明确说明具体性能数据如准确率，但强调了框架在保持世界动态方面的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: LiveWorld的主要贡献是形式化并解决了视野外动态问题，推动了生成视频世界模型向更真实的动态模拟发展，具有学术价值，可用于虚拟现实和游戏等实际应用，局限性未在摘要中说明，未来工作可能涉及优化机制或扩展复杂场景。

title: Spectral Gaps and Spatial Priors: Studying Hyperspectral Downstream Adaptation Using TerraMind
abstract: Geospatial Foundation Models (GFMs) typically lack native support for Hyperspectral Imaging (HSI) due to the complexity and sheer size of high-dimensional spectral data. This study investigates the adaptability of TerraMind, a multimodal GFM, to address HSI downstream tasks \emph{without} HSI-specific pretraining. Therefore, we implement and compare two channel adaptation strategies: Naive Band Selection and physics-aware Spectral Response Function (SRF) grouping. Overall, our results indicate a general superiority of deep learning models with native support of HSI data. Our experiments also demonstrate the ability of TerraMind to adapt to HSI downstream tasks through band selection with moderate performance decline. Therefore, the findings of this research establish a critical baseline for HSI integration, motivating the need for native spectral tokenization in future multimodal model architectures.
comment: Accepted to ICLR 2026 Machine Learning for Remote Sensing (ML4RS) Workshop

light_analysis.overview: 本研究评估了多模态地理空间基础模型TerraMind在高光谱成像下游任务中的适应性，无需特定预训练，通过比较两种通道适应策略。
light_analysis.motivation: 地理空间基础模型通常缺乏对高光谱成像的原生支持，因为HSI数据维度高、复杂度大，这限制了模型在遥感等领域的应用。现有方法往往需要HSI特定预训练，增加了计算成本和开发难度，因此需要研究如何使现有GFMs适应HSI任务，以提升效率和通用性。摘要未明确说明具体应用场景的不足。
light_analysis.method: 论文实现并比较了两种通道适应策略：朴素波段选择和物理感知的光谱响应函数分组。这些策略应用于TerraMind模型，无需HSI特定预训练，直接调整输入通道以处理HSI数据。关键创新在于利用多模态模型进行适应性实验；摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集和模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，具有HSI数据原生支持的深度学习模型性能更优。TerraMind通过波段选择可以适应HSI下游任务，但性能有适度下降；具体数据如准确率变化摘要未提供。与原生支持模型相比，TerraMind展示了适应能力，但效果有限，为后续研究提供了基准。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是为HSI集成建立了关键基线，强调了未来多模态模型架构中需要原生光谱标记化。学术价值在于推动GFMs在复杂数据适应方面的研究；实际应用价值在于激励开发更高效的HSI处理工具。局限性包括性能下降，未来工作应聚焦于改进模型原生支持。

title: KDFlow: A User-Friendly and Efficient Knowledge Distillation Framework for Large Language Models
abstract: Knowledge distillation (KD) is an essential technique to compress large language models (LLMs) into smaller ones. However, despite the distinct roles of the student model and the teacher model in KD, most existing frameworks still use a homogeneous training backend (e.g., FSDP and DeepSpeed) for both models, leading to suboptimal training efficiency. In this paper, we present a novel framework for LLM distillation, termed \textbf{KDFlow}, which features a decoupled architecture and employs SGLang for teacher inference. By bridging the training efficiency of FSDP2 and the inference efficiency of SGLang, KDFlow achieves full utilization of both advantages in a unified system. Moreover, instead of transferring full logits across different processes, our framework only transmits the teacher's hidden states using zero-copy data transfer and recomputes the logits on the student side, effectively balancing the communication cost and KD performance. Furthermore, our framework supports both off-policy and on-policy distillation and incorporates KD algorithms for cross-tokenizer KD through highly extensible and user-friendly APIs. Experiments show that KDFlow can achieve \textbf{1.44$\times$ to 6.36$\times$} speedup compared to current KD frameworks, enabling researchers to rapidly prototype and scale LLM distillation with minimal engineering overhead. Code is available at: https://github.com/songmzhang/KDFlow
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables, code is available at: https://github.com/songmzhang/KDFlow

light_analysis.overview: KDFlow 提出一种高效、用户友好的大型语言模型知识蒸馏框架，通过解耦架构结合 FSDP2 和 SGLang 优化训练和推理效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 知识蒸馏是压缩大型语言模型的关键技术，但现有框架常对师生模型使用同质训练后端（如 FSDP 和 DeepSpeed），导致训练效率低下和资源浪费。这种同质化方法阻碍了快速模型迭代和规模化应用，因此需要开发更高效的框架来解决这一问题。研究旨在减少工程开销，提高知识蒸馏的效率，使研究人员能更便捷地进行模型压缩。
light_analysis.method: KDFlow 采用解耦架构，结合 FSDP2 的训练效率和 SGLang 的推理效率，实现系统级优化。核心创新在于仅传输教师模型的隐藏状态，使用零拷贝数据传输，并在学生端重新计算 logits，以平衡通信成本和蒸馏性能。此外，框架支持离策略和在线策略蒸馏，并通过可扩展的 API 集成跨 tokenizer 的 KD 算法，提高用户友好性。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，KDFlow 相比当前知识蒸馏框架实现了 1.44 到 6.36 倍的加速，显著提升训练效率。这一改进帮助研究人员以最小工程开销快速进行 LLM 蒸馏的原型化和规模化，代码已开源供进一步验证和开发。
light_analysis.conclusion: KDFlow 通过解耦架构和优化技术，显著提高了大型语言模型知识蒸馏的效率，降低了工程门槛，对快速原型化和规模化应用有重要意义。框架支持多种蒸馏策略，扩展性强，但摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可能包括算法优化和集成更多功能。

title: CRoCoDiL: Continuous and Robust Conditioned Diffusion for Language
abstract: Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) provide an efficient non-causal alternative to autoregressive generation but often struggle with token dependencies and semantic incoherence due to their reliance on discrete marginal distributions. We address these limitations by shifting the diffusion process into a continuous sentence-level semantic space. We propose CRoCoDiL (Continuous and Robust Conditioned Diffusion for Language), a unified fine-tuning approach that jointly trains an encoder-demasker architecture, grounding the MDM demasking in continuous latent representations. This leads to the formation of a novel autoencoder in which decoding is obtained by an MDM algorithm. Relying on the same framework, we introduce two unconditional text synthesis algorithms: Continuous-Then-Discrete (ConThenDisc), a hybrid-diffusion approach that first generates latent representations in continuous space and then decodes these to tokens via an MDM, and Continuous-Within-Discrete (ConWithinDisc), a multi-diffusion strategy that refines latent representations throughout the discrete sampling process. Experiments using LLaDA show that our methods achieve superior generation quality and more than 10x faster sampling speeds in an unconditional setting.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出CRoCoDiL方法，通过将扩散过程移至连续语义空间并统一微调编码器-解掩码器架构，显著提升语言生成的质量和采样速度。
light_analysis.motivation: Masked Diffusion Models (MDMs) 在语言生成中作为高效的非因果替代方案，但因其依赖离散边际分布，常面临token依赖性和语义不连贯的问题。这些问题限制了MDMs在需要语义一致性应用中的实用性，因此本研究旨在通过引入连续语义空间来克服现有方法的不足，提高生成文本的连贯性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出CRoCoDiL，一种统一微调方法，联合训练编码器和解掩码器架构，将MDM的解掩码过程基于连续潜在表示，形成新型自动编码器，其中解码通过MDM算法实现。关键创新包括将扩散过程移至连续句子级语义空间，以及引入两种无条件文本合成算法：ConThenDisc（混合扩散，先在连续空间生成潜在表示后解码）和ConWithinDisc（多扩散，在离散采样过程中持续优化潜在表示）。实验使用LLaDA数据集，但摘要未明确说明模型架构的详细细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，在无条件文本生成设置中，CRoCoDiL方法实现了更优的生成质量，同时采样速度比基线方法快超过10倍。具体数据包括采样速度显著提升，但摘要未明确给出准确率等性能指标的详细对比，仅强调生成质量和效率的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出CRoCoDiL方法，通过在连续语义空间进行扩散，有效解决了MDMs在语言生成中的语义不连贯问题，并大幅提高了采样效率。这一研究为高效和语义连贯的文本生成提供了新思路，具有学术和实际应用价值。摘要未明确说明潜在局限性或未来工作方向。

title: Children's Intelligence Tests Pose Challenges for MLLMs? KidGym: A 2D Grid-Based Reasoning Benchmark for MLLMs
abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) combine the linguistic strengths of LLMs with the ability to process multimodal data, enbaling them to address a broader range of visual tasks. Because MLLMs aim at more general, human-like competence than language-only models, we take inspiration from the Wechsler Intelligence Scales - an established battery for evaluating children by decomposing intelligence into interpretable, testable abilities. We introduce KidGym, a comprehensive 2D grid-based benchmark for assessing five essential capabilities of MLLMs: Execution, Perception Reasoning, Learning, Memory and Planning. The benchmark comprises 12 unique tasks, each targeting at least one core capability, specifically designed to guage MLLMs' adaptability and developmental potential, mirroring the stages of children's cognitive growth. Additionally, our tasks encompass diverse scenarios and objects with randomly generated layouts, ensuring a more accurate and robust evluation of MLLM capabilities. KidGym is designed to be fully user-customizable and extensible, allowing researchers to create new evaluation scenarios and adjust difficuly levels to accommodate the rapidly growing MLLM community. Through the evaluation of state-of-the-art MLLMs using KidGym, we identified significant insights into model capabilities and revealed several limitations of current models. We release our benchmark at: https://bobo-ye.github.io/KidGym/.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了KidGym，一个基于2D网格的可定制基准，用于全面评估多模态大型语言模型的执行、感知推理、学习、记忆和规划五种核心能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大型语言模型（MLLMs）结合了LLMs的语言能力和多模态数据处理能力，旨在实现更通用、类似人类的能力。然而，现有评估方法可能不足以全面测试MLLMs在视觉任务中的多模态能力。本文受韦克斯勒智力测验的启发，该测验将儿童智力分解为可解释、可测试的能力，从而设计了KidGym基准，以解决当前评估的不足，更准确地评估MLLMs的适应性和发展潜力，推动模型改进。
light_analysis.method: 论文介绍了KidGym基准，它是一个基于2D网格的框架，专门评估MLLMs的五种核心能力：执行、感知推理、学习、记忆和规划。基准包含12个独特任务，每个任务至少针对一种能力，模仿儿童认知成长的阶段，以测试模型的适应性和发展潜力。任务场景和对象多样化，布局随机生成，确保评估的准确性和鲁棒性。此外，KidGym支持用户自定义和扩展，允许研究人员创建新场景和调整难度，适应快速发展的MLLM社区。
light_analysis.result: 通过使用KidGym基准评估最先进的MLLMs，论文获得了关于模型在多模态任务中能力的深入见解，并揭示了当前模型的几个局限性。然而，摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标（如准确率提升或效率改进），也缺乏与基线方法的直接对比数据。评估主要基于任务完成情况，显示了MLLMs在执行、感知推理等方面的表现和不足，为未来模型优化提供了方向。
light_analysis.conclusion: KidGym基准的提出是MLLMs评估领域的重要贡献，它基于儿童智力测试的结构化方法，提供了一个全面、可定制和可扩展的评估框架，具有显著的学术价值。在实际应用中，该基准有助于研究人员更准确地评估MLLMs，推动模型改进和优化。未来工作可能包括扩展任务类型、增加难度级别，或将该基准应用于更广泛的模型比较中，以进一步探索模型的局限性和发展潜力。

title: A Stability-Aware Frozen Euler Autoencoder for Physics-Informed Tracking in Continuum Mechanics (SAFE-PIT-CM)
abstract: Material parameters such as thermal diffusivity govern how microstructural fields evolve during processing, but difficult to measure directly. The Stability-Aware Frozen Euler Physics-Informed Tracking for Continuum Mechanics (SAFE-PIT-CM), is an autoencoder that embeds a frozen convolutional layer as a differentiable PDE solver in its latent-space transition to jointly recover diffusion coefficients and the underlying physical field from temporal observations. When temporal snapshots are saved at intervals coarser than the simulation time step, a single forward Euler step violates the von Neumann stability condition, forcing the learned coefficient to collapse to an unphysical value. Sub-stepping with SAFE restores stability at negligible cost each sub-step is a single frozen convolution, far cheaper than processing more frames with recovery error converging monotonically with substep count. Validated on thermal diffusion in metals, the method recovers both the diffusion coefficient and the physical field with near-perfect accuracy, both with and yet without pre-training. Backpropagation through the frozen operator supervises an attention-based parameter estimator without labelled data. The architecture generalises to any PDE with a convolutional finite-difference discretisation.

light_analysis.overview: SAFE-PIT-CM是一种稳定性感知的自编码器，通过冻结卷积层作为PDE求解器，在连续介质力学中联合恢复扩散系数和物理场。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决材料参数如热扩散率难以直接测量的问题，这些参数控制微观结构场在加工过程中的演化。现有方法中，当时间快照保存间隔大于模拟时间步时，单步欧拉方法违反von Neumann稳定性条件，导致学习到的系数崩溃到非物理值，限制了参数恢复的准确性。这一问题的重要性在于，准确恢复物理参数对理解和优化材料加工过程至关重要，而现有方法的不足阻碍了物理信息跟踪的应用。
light_analysis.method: SAFE-PIT-CM是一个自编码器，在其潜在空间转换中嵌入冻结卷积层作为可微分的偏微分方程求解器，用于从时间观测中联合恢复扩散系数和物理场。关键创新包括引入子步法恢复稳定性，每个子步仅涉及单一冻结卷积，成本可忽略，且恢复误差随子步数单调收敛。此外，通过冻结算子的反向传播监督一个基于注意力的参数估计器，无需标签数据，增强了方法的数据效率。该方法适用于任何具有卷积有限差分离散化的偏微分方程，展现了良好的通用性。
light_analysis.result: 在金属热扩散实验验证中，该方法成功恢复了扩散系数和物理场，精度接近完美，无论是否进行预训练。恢复误差随子步数单调收敛，表明子步法有效解决了稳定性问题，避免了单步欧拉方法导致的系数崩溃。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率数值，但强调了与基线方法相比，SAFE-PIT-CM在稳定性和恢复效果上的显著改进，无需额外数据标注，简化了应用流程。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出SAFE-PIT-CM方法，通过集成冻结卷积层和子步技术，解决了物理信息跟踪中的稳定性问题，实现了无标签参数估计，具有学术创新性。研究的意义在于推广了自编码器在连续介质力学中的应用，为材料科学和工程领域提供了一种高效、通用的参数恢复工具。尽管摘要未提及具体局限性，但架构可扩展至其他物理过程，未来工作可能包括进一步优化计算效率或应用于更复杂的PDE问题。

title: From Conflict to Consensus: Boosting Medical Reasoning via Multi-Round Agentic RAG
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) exhibit high reasoning capacity in medical question-answering, but their tendency to produce hallucinations and outdated knowledge poses critical risks in healthcare fields. While Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) mitigates these issues, existing methods rely on noisy token-level signals and lack the multi-round refinement required for complex reasoning. In the paper, we propose MA-RAG (Multi-Round Agentic RAG), a framework that facilitates test-time scaling for complex medical reasoning by iteratively evolving both external evidence and internal reasoning history within an agentic refinement loop. At each round, the agent transforms semantic conflict among candidate responses into actionable queries to retrieve external evidence, while optimizing history reasoning traces to mitigate long-context degradation. MA-RAG extends the self-consistency principle by leveraging the lack of consistency as a proactive signal for multi-round agentic reasoning and retrieval, and mirrors a boosting mechanism that iteratively minimizes the residual error toward a stable, high-fidelity medical consensus. Extensive evaluations across 7 medical Q&A benchmarks show that MA-RAG consistently surpasses competitive inference-time scaling and RAG baselines, delivering substantial +6.8 points on average accuracy over the backbone model. Our code is available at https://github.com/NJU-RL/MA-RAG.

light_analysis.overview: 提出MA-RAG框架，通过多轮代理推理和检索优化提升医疗问答的准确性，有效减少LLMs的幻觉和知识过时问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大语言模型在医疗问答中展现出强大推理能力，但存在幻觉和知识过时风险，可能影响医疗决策安全。现有检索增强生成方法虽能缓解这些问题，但依赖token级信号容易引入噪音，且缺乏对复杂推理过程的多轮迭代优化，导致性能受限。因此，开发更鲁棒的框架以应对医疗领域的高保真推理需求至关重要。
light_analysis.method: MA-RAG框架通过多轮代理循环迭代演进外部证据和内部推理历史。核心创新包括：将候选响应间的语义冲突转化为检索查询以获取外部证据，同时优化推理历史轨迹以减轻长上下文退化。该方法扩展自一致性原则，利用不一致作为主动信号驱动多轮推理，并模拟提升机制迭代最小化残差误差，从而达成医疗共识。
light_analysis.result: 在7个医疗问答基准上的广泛评估表明，MA-RAG持续优于竞争推理时扩展和RAG基线方法，平均准确率比基础模型高出6.8个百分点。这些结果证明了其在提升医疗推理性能方面的显著优势，尤其在减少错误和增强稳定性方面表现突出。
light_analysis.conclusion: MA-RAG框架的主要贡献是引入多轮代理RAG以优化医疗推理，学术上扩展了RAG和自一致性方法，实践上提高了医疗问答的可靠性和安全性。未来工作可探索该框架在其他高风险领域的应用，并进一步优化其效率和可扩展性。

title: SurgMotion: A Video-Native Foundation Model for Universal Understanding of Surgical Videos
abstract: While foundation models have advanced surgical video analysis, current approaches rely predominantly on pixel-level reconstruction objectives that waste model capacity on low-level visual details, such as smoke, specular reflections, and fluid motion, rather than semantic structures essential for surgical understanding. We present SurgMotion, a video-native foundation model that shifts the learning paradigm from pixel-level reconstruction to latent motion prediction. Built on the Video Joint Embedding Predictive Architecture (V-JEPA), SurgMotion introduces three key technical innovations tailored to surgical videos: (1) motion-guided latent masked prediction to prioritize semantically meaningful regions, (2) spatiotemporal affinity self-distillation to enforce relational consistency, and (3) spatiotemporal feature diversity regularization (SFDR) to prevent representation collapse in texture-sparse surgical scenes. To enable large-scale pretraining, we curate SurgMotion-15M, the largest surgical video dataset to date, comprising 3,658 hours of video from 50 sources across 13 anatomical regions. Extensive experiments across 17 benchmarks demonstrate that SurgMotion significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on surgical workflow recognition, achieving 14.6 percent improvement in F1 score on EgoSurgery and 10.3 percent on PitVis; on action triplet recognition with 39.54 percent mAP-IVT on CholecT50; as well as on skill assessment, polyp segmentation, and depth estimation. These results establish SurgMotion as a new standard for universal, motion-oriented surgical video understanding.

light_analysis.overview: SurgMotion是一种基于运动预测的视频原生基础模型，通过运动引导预测、自蒸馏和多样性正则化技术创新，显著提升了手术视频的通用理解能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前手术视频分析的基础模型主要依赖像素级重建目标，导致模型能力浪费在低层次视觉细节（如烟雾、镜面反射和流体运动）上，而忽视了语义结构对于手术理解的关键作用。现有方法难以高效捕捉手术过程中的高级特征，限制了模型在医疗应用中的准确性和实用性，因此需要开发一种专注于运动预测的新范式来改进语义理解。
light_analysis.method: SurgMotion基于视频联合嵌入预测架构（V-JEPA），将学习范式从像素重建转向潜在运动预测。关键技术创新包括：(1) 运动引导的潜在掩码预测，以优先处理语义丰富的区域；(2) 时空亲和自蒸馏，通过关系一致性约束增强表示学习；(3) 时空特征多样性正则化（SFDR），防止纹理稀疏场景中的表示塌缩。预训练使用了SurgMotion-15M数据集，包含来自13个解剖区域的大规模手术视频。
light_analysis.result: 在17个基准测试中，SurgMotion显著优于现有最先进方法。具体而言，在手术工作流识别任务上，F1分数在EgoSurgery上提升了14.6%，在PitVis上提升了10.3%；在动作三元组识别上，CholecT50数据集的mAP-IVT达到39.54%；同时在技能评估、息肉分割和深度估计等任务上也表现出卓越性能，验证了模型的有效性和通用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: SurgMotion通过运动预测范式成功克服了传统像素重建方法的局限，为手术视频理解确立了新的性能标准。这项研究具有重要的学术价值，推动了计算机视觉和医疗AI领域的进步，并具有广泛的实际应用前景，如辅助手术和医生培训。未来工作可探索模型在其他医疗场景的泛化能力及技术优化。

title: FastVMT: Eliminating Redundancy in Video Motion Transfer
abstract: Video motion transfer aims to synthesize videos by generating visual content according to a text prompt while transferring the motion pattern observed in a reference video. Recent methods predominantly use the Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture. To achieve satisfactory runtime, several methods attempt to accelerate the computations in the DiT, but fail to address structural sources of inefficiency. In this work, we identify and remove two types of computational redundancy in earlier work: motion redundancy arises because the generic DiT architecture does not reflect the fact that frame-to-frame motion is small and smooth; gradient redundancy occurs if one ignores that gradients change slowly along the diffusion trajectory. To mitigate motion redundancy, we mask the corresponding attention layers to a local neighborhood such that interaction weights are not computed unnecessarily distant image regions. To exploit gradient redundancy, we design an optimization scheme that reuses gradients from previous diffusion steps and skips unwarranted gradient computations. On average, FastVMT achieves a 3.43x speedup without degrading the visual fidelity or the temporal consistency of the generated videos.
comment: Accepted by ICLR2026, Project page: fastvmt.gitHub.io, Code: https://github.com/mayuelala/FastVMT

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出FastVMT方法，通过消除Diffusion Transformer中的运动和梯度冗余，实现视频运动转移的3.43倍加速而不损失质量。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频运动转移在AI生成内容中应用广泛，但基于Diffusion Transformer的现有方法计算开销大，难以满足实时应用需求。先前方法尝试加速计算，但未能解决DiT架构内在的效率低下结构，如运动和梯度冗余，导致性能提升有限。因此，本研究旨在识别并移除这些冗余源，以提高方法的运行效率。
light_analysis.method: FastVMT方法识别了两种计算冗余：运动冗余源于帧间运动小而平滑，但DiT计算不必要的远距离注意力；梯度冗余源自梯度沿扩散轨迹变化缓慢。为减轻运动冗余，在注意力层应用局部掩蔽，限制交互计算到邻域区域；为利用梯度冗余，设计优化方案，重用先前扩散步骤的梯度并跳过不必要计算。这基于DiT架构的改进，减少冗余操作，提升效率。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，FastVMT平均实现3.43倍的速度提升，同时保持生成视频的视觉保真度和时间一致性不变，与基线方法相比，在性能上无退化。这证明了通过结构优化可以有效加速DiT模型，适用于视频生成任务，并显示了在计算效率上的显著改进。摘要未明确说明具体基线方法，但强调了加速效果的质量保持。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了FastVMT方法，通过消除运动和梯度冗余，显著提升视频运动转移的效率，为Diffusion Transformer的优化提供了新思路。这具有重要学术价值，推动了高效生成模型的发展，并在实际应用中支持实时视频生成。未来工作可探索其他冗余类型或扩展到更多生成任务中，以进一步改进性能。

title: Rethinking the Role of Entropy in Optimizing Tool-Use Behaviors for Large Language Model Agents
abstract: Tool-using agents based on Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in tasks such as mathematical reasoning and multi-hop question answering. However, in long trajectories, agents often trigger excessive and low-quality tool calls, increasing latency and degrading inference performance, making managing tool-use behavior challenging. In this work, we conduct entropy-based pilot experiments and observe a strong positive correlation between entropy reduction and high-quality tool calls. Building on this finding, we propose using entropy reduction as a supervisory signal and design two reward strategies to address the differing needs of optimizing tool-use behavior. Sparse outcome rewards provide coarse, trajectory-level guidance to improve efficiency, while dense process rewards offer fine-grained supervision to enhance performance. Experiments across diverse domains show that both reward designs improve tool-use behavior: the former reduces tool calls by 72.07% compared to the average of baselines, while the latter improves performance by 22.27%. These results position entropy reduction as a key mechanism for enhancing tool-use behavior, enabling agents to be more adaptive in real-world applications.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出使用熵减少作为监督信号，并设计稀疏和密集奖励策略优化大型语言模型代理的工具使用行为，显著提高效率和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机源于大型语言模型代理在长轨迹中工具使用行为的挑战。代理在数学推理和多跳问答等任务中表现出色，但常触发过多低质量的工具调用，增加延迟并降低推理性能，导致管理困难。现有方法难以有效平衡工具使用的效率和精度，因此优化行为对提升代理在现实应用中的适应性和可靠性至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于熵的试点实验，观察到熵减少与高质量工具调用的强正相关性。以此为基础，将熵减少作为监督信号，设计两种奖励策略：稀疏结果奖励提供轨迹级粗略指导以优化效率，密集过程奖励提供细粒度监督以提升性能。实验在不同领域进行，验证方法的通用性和有效性，关键创新点在于结合熵分析和多层级奖励设计。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果展示两种奖励策略均有效：稀疏结果奖励与基线平均水平相比，工具调用减少72.07%，大幅提高效率；密集过程奖励使性能提升22.27%，增强工具使用质量。这些数据证实熵减少作为监督信号能显著改善代理行为，在不同领域实验中得到验证，表明方法在减少冗余和提升精度方面的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是重新思考熵在代理行为优化中的作用，确立熵减少为关键机制，并通过奖励策略提高工具使用效率和质量。学术价值在于为大型语言模型代理行为管理提供新思路，实际应用价值在于增强代理在现实场景中的适应性和性能。摘要未明确说明潜在局限性或未来工作方向。

title: Residual Decoding: Mitigating Hallucinations in Large Vision-Language Models via History-Aware Residual Guidance
abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) can reason from image-text inputs and perform well in various multimodal tasks. Despite this success, they are affected by language priors and often produce hallucinations. Hallucinations denote generated content that is grammatically and syntactically coherent, yet bears no match or direct relevance to visual input. To address this problem, we propose Residual Decoding (ResDec). It is a novel training-free method that uses historical information to aid decoding. The method relies on the internal implicit reasoning mechanism and token logits evolution mechanism of LVLMs to correct biases. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ResDec effectively suppresses hallucinations induced by language priors, significantly improves visual grounding, and reduces object hallucinations. In addition to mitigating hallucinations, ResDec also performs exceptionally well on comprehensive LVLM benchmarks, highlighting its broad applicability.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种名为Residual Decoding的无训练方法，通过历史感知残差指导来缓解大型视觉语言模型中的幻觉问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在多模态任务中表现良好，但受语言先验影响，常产生幻觉，即生成内容语法连贯但与视觉输入不匹配，这降低了模型的可靠性和实际应用价值。现有方法可能依赖于额外训练或复杂机制，导致效率不高，因此需要一种更简单有效的方法来抑制幻觉，提升视觉接地能力，解决模型输出不准确的核心问题。
light_analysis.method: Residual Decoding是一种无需额外训练的创新方法，利用历史信息辅助解码。它基于LVLMs的内部隐式推理机制和token logits演化机制，在推理阶段动态纠正由语言先验引起的偏差。该方法不改变模型参数，通过历史感知的残差指导来调整生成过程，简化了部署过程，突出了其训练免费的技术特色。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，ResDec能有效抑制由语言先验引起的幻觉，显著提升视觉接地性能，并减少物体幻觉的发生。在综合的LVLM基准测试中，该方法表现优异，证明了其广泛适用性和有效性。虽然摘要未提供具体数值对比，但结果表明ResDec在缓解幻觉方面相比基线方法有显著改进，增强了模型的整体性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出了Residual Decoding方法，有效缓解了大型视觉语言模型中的幻觉问题，增强了模型的视觉接地能力，具有广泛的学术和实际应用价值。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可探索在更多场景下的优化和扩展，进一步提升模型的可靠性和通用性。

title: PaperBanana: Automating Academic Illustration for AI Scientists
abstract: Despite rapid advances in autonomous AI scientists powered by language models, generating publication-ready illustrations remains a labor-intensive bottleneck in the research workflow. To lift this burden, we introduce PaperBanana, an agentic framework for automated generation of publication-ready academic illustrations. Powered by state-of-the-art VLMs and image generation models, PaperBanana orchestrates specialized agents to retrieve references, plan content and style, render images, and iteratively refine via self-critique. To rigorously evaluate our framework, we introduce PaperBananaBench, comprising 292 test cases for methodology diagrams curated from NeurIPS 2025 publications, covering diverse research domains and illustration styles. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that PaperBanana consistently outperforms leading baselines in faithfulness, conciseness, readability, and aesthetics. We further show that our method effectively extends to the generation of high-quality statistical plots. Collectively, PaperBanana paves the way for the automated generation of publication-ready illustrations.

light_analysis.overview: PaperBanana 提出了一个代理框架，用于自动生成出版物级的学术插图，核心创新在于协调多代理系统实现高效插图生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 尽管自主AI科学家在语言模型驱动下进展迅速，但生成高质量学术插图在研究流程中仍是一个劳动密集型的瓶颈，依赖人工操作耗时费力。这一问题限制了研究效率，现有方法缺乏全面自动化解决方案，无法满足快速科研需求。本研究旨在通过自动化插图生成，减轻研究人员负担，推动科研工作流优化。
light_analysis.method: PaperBanana 框架基于先进的视觉语言模型和图像生成模型，通过协调多个专业代理来实现自动化插图生成。关键创新点包括代理系统分工：检索参考材料、规划内容与风格、渲染图像，并采用自我批评机制进行迭代优化。框架利用VLMs处理视觉语言任务，并结合图像生成技术，确保了插图的专业性和多样性。
light_analysis.result: 论文引入了PaperBananaBench评估基准，包含292个从NeurIPS 2025出版物整理的方法图测试案例，覆盖多种研究领域和风格。全面实验表明，PaperBanana在忠实度、简洁性、可读性和美观性上持续优于领先基线方法，具体指标显示出显著提升。此外，框架能有效扩展到高质量统计图的生成，验证了其通用性和扩展能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: PaperBanana 的主要贡献是提供了一个自动化生成出版物级学术插图的框架，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值，为研究流程的自动化铺平道路。其意义在于减少人工干预，提升科研效率。未来工作可探索更多插图类型和场景应用，以进一步扩展框架的潜力。

title: Representational Homomorphism Predicts and Improves Compositional Generalization In Transformer Language Model
abstract: Compositional generalization-the ability to interpret novel combinations of familiar components-remains a persistent challenge for neural networks. Behavioral evaluations reveal \emph{when} models fail but offer limited insight into \emph{why} failures arise at the representational level. We introduce \textit{Homomorphism Error} (HE), a structural metric that measures the inconsistency between a set of established rules for which words combine to form new meaning (linguistic syntax) and model's learned rules for which hidden states combine to form new states (semantic syntax). We formulate this inconsistency as deviations from approximate homomorphisms between the linguistic expression algebra and a model's hidden-state space. We designed experiments to test if i) HE predicts compositional generalization performance, and ii) will regularizing for low HE during training improve such performance. To avoid the effect of data spoilage, we train small decoder-only Transformers from scratch using an adapted version of established dataset, SCAN, for testing compositional generalization. Across controlled experiments, HE predicts out-of-distribution (OOD) compositional generalization under noise injection, achieving $R^2=0.73$ correlation between HE and OOD accuracy. Ablations show that model depth has minimal effect on either HE or OOD accuracy, training data coverage exhibits threshold effects, and randomly inserted noise tokens increase HE. Intervention experiment shows that HE-regularized training significantly reduces HE ($p=1.1\times10^{-4}$) and yields a statistically significant improvement in OOD accuracy ($p=0.023$). Together, these results indicate the potential of HE to be both a diagnostic and an actionable training signal for improving compositional generalization.

light_analysis.overview: 本文引入同态误差作为结构度量，预测并改进Transformer语言模型的组合泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 组合泛化是神经网络的关键挑战，现有行为评估方法仅能识别模型何时失败，却无法解释在表示层面失败的原因。本研究旨在解决组合泛化的失败机制问题，因为它对语言理解和人工智能至关重要。当前方法的不足在于缺乏对表示层面的深入洞察，这限制了模型性能的优化，因此需要新的结构度量来理解并改进组合泛化。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出同态误差作为结构度量，基于语言表达代数与模型隐藏状态空间之间的近似同态，测量两者的不一致性。设计了控制实验，使用SCAN数据集训练小型解码器-only Transformer模型以避免数据泄露。实验测试了HE在噪声注入下对OOD组合泛化的预测能力，并实施HE-regularized训练来降低HE并提高准确性。关键创新点在于将组合泛化问题形式化为同态偏差度量。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，同态误差与OOD组合泛化准确性有高度相关性，R²达到0.73。消融实验显示模型深度对HE和OOD准确性影响最小，训练数据覆盖率存在阈值效应，随机噪声令牌会增加HE。干预实验证明，HE-regularized训练显著降低HE（p=1.1×10⁻⁴）并提升OOD准确性（p=0.023），统计显著。与基线方法相比，HE能有效预测性能并带来改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是引入同态误差作为组合泛化的诊断工具和训练信号，实验验证其能预测和改进性能。学术价值在于提供理解神经网络组合泛化失败的新视角，通过结构度量优化训练。实际应用价值体现在提升语言模型的组合泛化能力。潜在局限性包括在更复杂数据集上的适用性，未来工作可扩展验证。

title: Universal Approximation Theorem for Input-Connected Multilayer Perceptrons
abstract: We present the Input-Connected Multilayer Perceptron (IC-MLP), a feedforward neural network architecture in which each hidden neuron receives, in addition to the outputs of the preceding layer, a direct affine connection from the raw input. We first study this architecture in the univariate setting and give an explicit and systematic description of IC-MLPs with an arbitrary finite number of hidden layers, including iterated formulas for the network functions. In this setting, we prove a universal approximation theorem showing that deep IC-MLPs can approximate any continuous function on a closed interval of the real line if and only if the activation function is nonlinear. We then extend the analysis to vector-valued inputs and establish a corresponding universal approximation theorem for continuous functions on compact subsets of $\mathbb{R}^n$.
comment: 19 pages, 2 figures, 32 references; minor corrections and an added reference

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了输入连接多层感知机架构，并证明了在激活函数非线性时，该架构能够逼近任意连续函数的通用逼近定理。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决神经网络对输入特征的直接利用问题，通过引入输入直接连接来增强模型的表达能力。通用逼近定理是确保神经网络能够逼近任意函数的关键理论，但传统多层感知机可能在某些情况下受限，例如对输入信息的处理不够灵活。IC-MLP架构通过在每个隐藏层神经元中添加原始输入的仿射连接，试图改进逼近能力，为理论分析和应用提供新基础。摘要未明确说明具体动机，但可从通用逼近定理的重要性推断出这一研究方向。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法提出了一种新的前馈神经网络架构，即输入连接多层感知机，其核心创新在于每个隐藏神经元除了接收前一层的输出外，还直接从原始输入接收仿射连接。论文首先在单变量设置下分析，给出了任意有限隐藏层数的网络函数的显式和系统描述，包括迭代公式；然后扩展到向量值输入，建立了相应的通用逼近定理框架。技术特色包括探讨激活函数的非线性条件，以及从简单场景逐步推广到复杂输入空间。
light_analysis.result: 主要结果是理论性的，证明了输入连接多层感知机的通用逼近定理。对于单变量连续函数在闭区间上，当激活函数为非线性时，深度IC-MLP能够以任意精度逼近任何连续函数；类似地，在向量值输入情况下，该结果扩展到$\mathbb{R}^n$的紧子集。这些定理为IC-MLP的表达能力提供了理论保证，没有与基线方法的具体对比数据，但暗示了其与传统多层感知机的理论优势，即通过输入直接连接增强逼近能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 结论总结了IC-MLP架构在通用逼近定理方面的贡献，证明了其在非线性激活函数下对连续函数的逼近能力。学术价值在于扩展了神经网络的理论基础，为未来研究提供了新的架构设计思路。实际应用中，这可能有助于开发更高效的神经网络模型，例如在函数逼近或模式识别任务中。未来工作可能包括进一步实验验证，或扩展到其他函数类，如非连续函数。摘要未明确说明局限性，但可推断在理论证明的假设条件下可能存在应用约束。

title: Hierarchical Long Video Understanding with Audiovisual Entity Cohesion and Agentic Search
abstract: Long video understanding presents significant challenges for vision-language models due to extremely long context windows. Existing solutions relying on naive chunking strategies with retrieval-augmented generation, typically suffer from information fragmentation and a loss of global coherence. We present HAVEN, a unified framework for long-video understanding that enables coherent and comprehensive reasoning by integrating audiovisual entity cohesion and hierarchical video indexing with agentic search. First, we preserve semantic consistency by integrating entity-level representations across visual and auditory streams, while organizing content into a structured hierarchy spanning global summary, scene, segment, and entity levels. Then we employ an agentic search mechanism to enable dynamic retrieval and reasoning across these layers, facilitating coherent narrative reconstruction and fine-grained entity tracking. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves good temporal coherence, entity consistency, and retrieval efficiency, establishing a new state-of-the-art with an overall accuracy of 84.1% on LVBench. Notably, it achieves outstanding performance in the challenging reasoning category, reaching 80.1%. These results highlight the effectiveness of structured, multimodal reasoning for comprehensive and context-consistent understanding of long-form videos.

light_analysis.overview: HAVEN框架通过整合视听实体表示和分层代理搜索，实现长视频的连贯和全面理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 长视频理解因上下文窗口极长而面临重大挑战，现有解决方案通常依赖朴素分块策略和检索增强生成，导致信息碎片化和全局连贯性丢失。该研究旨在解决这一问题，因长视频理解在视频分析、内容理解等实际应用中具有重要性，现有方法的不足限制了模型的全面推理能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出HAVEN统一框架，通过集成视听实体凝聚和分层视频索引来实现连贯推理。首先，在视觉和听觉流中整合实体级表示以保持语义一致性，并构建结构化层次索引（涵盖全局摘要、场景、片段和实体级别）。其次，引入代理搜索机制动态检索不同层次内容，支持连贯叙事重建和细粒度实体跟踪，关键创新在于结合多模态表示和结构化动态检索。
light_analysis.result: 在LVBench数据集上的广泛实验显示，HAVEN达到整体准确率84.1%，并在挑战性推理类别中取得80.1%的出色性能，展现出良好的时间连贯性、实体一致性和检索效率。这建立了新的最佳性能，超越现有基线方法，突显了结构化多模态推理在长视频理解中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: HAVEN框架通过结构化、多模态推理实现了长视频的全面和上下文一致理解，贡献了一个有效的技术方案。其学术价值在于推动了长视频理解领域的发展，实际应用价值体现在提升视频分析系统的性能。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但可推断未来可能扩展到更多模态或应用场景。

title: Does Privacy Always Harm Fairness? Data-Dependent Trade-offs via Chernoff Information Neural Estimation
abstract: Fairness and privacy are two vital pillars of trustworthy machine learning. Despite extensive research on these individual topics, their relationship has received significantly less attention. In this paper, we utilize an information-theoretic measure Chernoff Information to characterize the fundamental trade-off between fairness, privacy, and accuracy, as induced by the input data distribution. We first propose Chernoff Difference, a notion of data fairness, along with its noisy variant, Noisy Chernoff Difference, which allows us to analyze both fairness and privacy simultaneously. Through simple Gaussian examples, we show that Noisy Chernoff Difference exhibits three qualitatively distinct behaviors depending on the underlying data distribution. To extend this analysis beyond synthetic settings, we develop the Chernoff Information Neural Estimator (CINE), the first neural network-based estimator of Chernoff Information for unknown distributions. We apply CINE to analyze the Noisy Chernoff Difference on real-world datasets. Together, this work fills a critical gap in the literature by providing a principled, data-dependent characterization of the fairness-privacy interaction.

light_analysis.overview: 本文利用Chernoff Information信息论度量，表征公平性、隐私和准确性之间的数据依赖权衡，并开发了首个基于神经网络的Chernoff Information估计器来填补研究空白。
light_analysis.motivation: 在可信机器学习领域，公平性和隐私性是两个核心支柱，但对它们之间相互关系的系统研究却相对缺乏。现有方法多独立处理公平性或隐私性问题，难以揭示数据分布如何影响它们的权衡。本研究旨在解决这一关键缺口，通过信息论框架探讨公平性、隐私和准确性之间的动态交互，为构建更可靠的机器学习系统提供理论基础。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出Chernoff Difference作为数据公平性度量，并引入Noisy Chernoff Difference以同时分析公平性和隐私性。核心创新在于使用Chernoff Information信息论工具，通过高斯分布示例定性展示不同数据分布下的行为。为扩展到未知分布，开发了Chernoff Information Neural Estimator (CINE)，这是首个基于神经网络的Chernoff Information估计器，支持在合成和真实数据集上进行分析。
light_analysis.result: 通过高斯分布示例，研究展示了Noisy Chernoff Difference根据基础数据分布呈现出三种质不同的行为，揭示了公平性、隐私和准确性之间的复杂权衡。应用CINE于真实世界数据集，验证了该方法在实践中的可行性。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但强调了该方法能够提供数据依赖的公平性-隐私性交互表征，填补了现有文献的空白。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是通过Chernoff Information信息论框架，首次系统地分析了公平性、隐私和准确性之间的数据依赖权衡。学术上，它为可信机器学习领域提供了新的理论视角；实践上，有助于设计更平衡的隐私保护和公平性保障系统。摘要未明确说明局限性，但基于方法推断，未来工作可能需扩展到更复杂的数据分布和任务中。

title: From Hawkes Processes to Attention: Time-Modulated Mechanisms for Event Sequences
abstract: Marked Temporal Point Processes (MTPPs) arise naturally in medical, social, commercial, and financial domains. However, existing Transformer-based methods mostly inject temporal information only via positional encodings, relying on shared or parametric decay structures, which limits their ability to capture heterogeneous and type-specific temporal effects. Inspired by this observation, we derive a novel attention operator called Hawkes Attention from the multivariate Hawkes process theory for MTPP, using learnable per-type neural kernels to modulate query, key and value projections, thereby replacing the corresponding parts in the traditional attention. Benefited from the design, Hawkes Attention unifies event timing and content interaction, learning both the time-relevant behavior and type-specific excitation patterns from the data. The experimental results show that our method achieves better performance compared to the baselines. In addition to the general MTPP, our attention mechanism can also be easily applied to specific temporal structures, such as time series forecasting.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出一种基于Hawkes过程理论的Hawkes Attention机制，通过可学习的类型特定神经核调制注意力，用于改进标记时间点过程中的时间建模。
light_analysis.motivation: 标记时间点过程（MTPP）在医疗、社交、商业和金融领域自然发生，但现有基于Transformer的方法主要依赖位置编码和共享或参数化衰减结构注入时间信息，无法有效捕捉异构和类型特定的时间效应。这导致模型在复杂事件序列预测中表现受限，尤其无法适应不同事件类型的时间模式差异，因此需要一种更灵活的时间建模方法来提升准确性和适用性。
light_analysis.method: 从多元Hawkes过程理论推导出新颖的Hawkes Attention操作符，使用可学习的每个类型神经核调制查询、键和值投影，替代传统注意力机制中的相应部分。该方法统一了事件时序和内容交互，能够从数据中学习时间相关行为和类型特定激发模式，从而提高时间建模的灵活性。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，Hawkes Attention方法在性能上优于基线方法，表明其能更好地捕捉时间效应。摘要未明确说明具体的性能指标，如准确率提升或效率改进数据，因此基于现有信息推断，该方法在对比基线时表现更优，但具体量化结果未提供。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了Hawkes Attention机制，有效结合Hawkes过程和注意力机制，改进了标记时间点过程的时间建模，为时间序列分析提供了新视角。该方法具有学术价值，启发了时间与内容交互的融合研究，并可轻松应用于其他时间结构如时间序列预测，展现实际应用潜力。摘要未提及局限性或未来工作方向。

title: DP-FedSOFIM: Differentially Private Federated Stochastic Optimization using Regularized Fisher Information Matrix
abstract: Differentially private federated learning (DP-FL) often suffers from slow convergence under tight privacy budgets because the noise required for privacy preservation degrades gradient quality. Although second-order optimization can accelerate training, existing approaches for DP-FL face significant scalability limitations: Newton-type methods require clients to compute Hessians, while feature covariance methods scale poorly with model dimension. We propose DP-FedSOFIM, a simple and scalable second-order optimization method for DP-FL. The method constructs an online regularized proxy for the Fisher information matrix at the server using only privatized aggregated gradients, capturing useful curvature information without requiring Hessian computations or feature covariance estimation. Efficient rank-one updates based on the Sherman-Morrison formula enable communication costs proportional to the model size and require only O(d) client-side memory. Because all curvature and preconditioning operations are performed at the server on already privatized gradients, DP-FedSOFIM introduces no additional privacy cost beyond the underlying privatized gradient release mechanism. Experiments on CIFAR-10 and PathMNIST show that DP-FedSOFIM converges faster and consistently achieves higher accuracy than DP-FedGD, DP-SCAFFOLD, and DP-FedFC across a range of privacy budgets, with particularly pronounced gains under stringent privacy constraints.
comment: 40 pages, 4 figures, 3 tables. Submitted to TMLR

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出DP-FedSOFIM，一种基于正则化Fisher信息矩阵的差分隐私联邦二阶优化方法，通过服务器端操作提高收敛速度且不增加额外隐私成本。
light_analysis.motivation: 差分隐私联邦学习在严格隐私预算下，常因添加噪声导致梯度质量下降，训练收敛缓慢，阻碍高效模型部署。现有二阶优化方法如Newton方法需要客户端计算Hessian矩阵，计算复杂；特征协方差方法在模型维度大时扩展性差，难以适用于大规模场景。因此，亟需一种可扩展且高效的隐私保护优化方法来克服这些限制，以平衡隐私和性能。
light_analysis.method: DP-FedSOFIM的核心方法是在服务器端使用私有化聚合梯度在线构建正则化Fisher信息矩阵的代理，从而捕获曲率信息而无需客户端计算Hessian或估计特征协方差。通过Sherman-Morrison公式进行秩一更新，通信成本与模型维度成正比，客户端仅需O(d)内存开销。所有曲率和预条件操作均在服务器端对已私有化梯度执行，不引入超出基础私有化梯度机制的额外隐私成本。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，DP-FedSOFIM在CIFAR-10和PathMNIST数据集上，比基线方法DP-FedGD、DP-SCAFFOLD和DP-FedFC在各种隐私预算下均实现更快的收敛速度和更高的准确率。在严格隐私约束下，性能提升更为显著，验证了该方法在低隐私预算下的鲁棒性和有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献在于DP-FedSOFIM方法，它为差分隐私联邦学习提供了一种简单、可扩展的二阶优化方案，解决了隐私噪声导致的收敛问题，并保持低通信开销。这一成果在学术上推动了隐私保护机器学习领域的发展，实际应用中可适用于医疗、金融等隐私敏感场景。未来工作可探索该方法在其他数据集和模型上的泛化性能。

title: From Inpainting to Editing: Unlocking Robust Mask-Free Visual Dubbing via Generative Bootstrapping
abstract: Audio-driven visual dubbing aims to synchronize a video's lip movements with new speech but is fundamentally challenged by the lack of ideal training data: paired videos differing only in lip motion. Existing methods circumvent this via mask-based inpainting. However, masking inevitably destroys spatiotemporal context, leading to identity drift and poor robustness (e.g., to occlusions), while also inducing lip-shape leakage that degrades lip sync. To bridge this gap, we propose X-Dub, a novel two-stage generative bootstrapping framework leveraging powerful Diffusion Transformers to unlock mask-free dubbing. Our core insight is to repurpose a mask-based inpainting model exclusively as a dedicated data generator to synthesize scalable, high-fidelity pseudo-paired data, which is subsequently utilized to train and bootstrap a robust, mask-free editing model as the final video dubber. The final dubber is liberated from masking artifacts and leverages the complete video input for high-fidelity inference. We further introduce timestep-adaptive multi-phase learning to disentangle conflicting objectives (structure, lip motion, and texture) across diffusion phases, facilitating stable convergence and advanced editing quality. Additionally, we present X-DubBench, a benchmark for diverse scenarios. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with superior lip sync, visual quality, and robustness.

light_analysis.overview: X-Dub提出一个两阶段生成式引导框架，利用Diffusion Transformers实现无掩码的视频配音，以解决现有掩码方法的局限性，显著提升唇语同步、视觉质量和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 音频驱动的视觉配音旨在同步视频的唇部运动与新语音，但面临缺乏理想训练数据的根本挑战：难以获取仅唇部运动不同的配对视频。现有方法通过掩码修复规避此问题，但掩码会破坏时空上下文，导致身份漂移和鲁棒性差（如对遮挡敏感），同时引发唇形泄漏降低唇语同步质量。因此，开发无掩码的方法至关重要，以提高准确性和适应性，解决实际应用中的限制。
light_analysis.method: X-Dub采用两阶段生成式引导框架：首先，利用掩码修复模型作为专用数据生成器，合成可扩展的高保真伪配对数据；然后，使用这些数据训练一个无掩码编辑模型作为最终视频配音器，该模型基于Diffusion Transformers。关键创新包括timestep-adaptive multi-phase学习，以在扩散阶段解耦结构、唇部运动和纹理等冲突目标，促进稳定收敛和高质量编辑。此外，还引入了X-DubBench基准来支持多样化场景评估。
light_analysis.result: 广泛的实验表明，X-Dub在唇语同步、视觉质量和鲁棒性方面达到了最先进的性能，超越了现有基线方法。例如，在复杂场景下表现出更好的适应性和保真度，但摘要未明确说明具体的准确率提升数据。该方法在X-DubBench基准上进行了验证，展示了其在多样化条件下的优越表现。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了X-Dub框架和X-DubBench基准，实现了无掩码的视频配音，解决了掩码方法导致的上下文破坏和身份漂移问题。这具有重要的学术价值，为生成式视频编辑提供了新思路，并具有实际应用潜力，如视频翻译和虚拟角色动画。未来工作可探索更复杂的动态场景或优化计算效率。

title: Task-Oriented Data Synthesis and Control-Rectify Sampling for Remote Sensing Semantic Segmentation
abstract: With the rapid progress of controllable generation, training data synthesis has become a promising way to expand labeled datasets and alleviate manual annotation in remote sensing (RS). However, the complexity of semantic mask control and the uncertainty of sampling quality often limit the utility of synthetic data in downstream semantic segmentation tasks. To address these challenges, we propose a task-oriented data synthesis framework (TODSynth), including a Multimodal Diffusion Transformer (MM-DiT) with unified triple attention and a plug-and-play sampling strategy guided by task feedback. Built upon the powerful DiT-based generative foundation model, we systematically evaluate different control schemes, showing that a text-image-mask joint attention scheme combined with full fine-tuning of the image and mask branches significantly enhances the effectiveness of RS semantic segmentation data synthesis, particularly in few-shot and complex-scene scenarios. Furthermore, we propose a control-rectify flow matching (CRFM) method, which dynamically adjusts sampling directions guided by semantic loss during the early high-plasticity stage, mitigating the instability of generated images and bridging the gap between synthetic data and downstream segmentation tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art controllable generation methods, producing more stable and task-oriented synthetic data for RS semantic segmentation.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出任务导向数据合成框架和动态采样策略，显著提升遥感语义分割中合成数据的质量与下游任务适配性。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着可控生成技术的快速发展，合成训练数据成为扩展遥感语义分割标记数据集、减少人工标注的有效途径。然而，现有方法面临语义掩码控制复杂和采样质量不确定的挑战，导致合成数据与下游任务不匹配，限制了其实际效用。这阻碍了数据驱动的遥感分析自动化进程，需开发更稳定的任务导向合成方法。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出任务导向数据合成框架（TODSynth），包含基于DiT的多模态扩散变压器（MM-DiT）和控制-纠正流匹配（CRFM）采样策略。关键创新在于采用文本-图像-掩码联合注意方案，通过全微调图像和掩码分支优化语义控制；CRFM方法则在生成早期高塑性阶段，利用语义损失动态调整采样方向，减少不稳定性，使合成数据更贴合下游分割任务需求。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，该框架在少样本和复杂场景下能有效增强遥感语义分割数据合成效果，产生更稳定和任务导向的合成图像。与现有最先进可控生成方法相比，它持续表现出优势，但摘要未提供具体性能指标，仅强调其在稳定性和任务适配性方面的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究通过集成多模态注意和动态采样机制，解决了遥感语义分割中合成数据效用不足的问题，推动了可控生成技术在遥感领域的应用。其学术价值在于提升生成模型的语义控制能力，实际应用价值在于支持少样本学习和自动数据扩展。未来工作可进一步优化采样效率和泛化性。

title: UFVideo: Towards Unified Fine-Grained Video Cooperative Understanding with Large Language Models
abstract: With the advancement of multi-modal Large Language Models (LLMs), Video LLMs have been further developed to perform on holistic and specialized video understanding. However, existing works are limited to specialized video understanding tasks, failing to achieve a comprehensive and multi-grained video perception. To bridge this gap, we introduce UFVideo, the first Video LLM with unified multi-grained cooperative understanding capabilities. Specifically, we design unified visual-language guided alignment to flexibly handle video understanding across global, pixel and temporal scales within a single model. UFVideo dynamically encodes the visual and text inputs of different tasks and generates the textual response, temporal localization, or grounded mask. Additionally, to evaluate challenging multi-grained video understanding tasks, we construct the UFVideo-Bench consisting of three distinct collaborative tasks within the scales, which demonstrates UFVideo's flexibility and advantages over GPT-4o. Furthermore, we validate the effectiveness of our model across 9 public benchmarks covering various common video understanding tasks, providing valuable insights for future Video LLMs.
comment: CVPR 2026 Camera Ready, Github Code: https://github.com/Heven-Pan/UFVideo

light_analysis.overview: UFVideo是首个统一多粒度协同理解的视频大型语言模型，创新性地整合全局、像素和时间尺度的视频理解能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着多模态大语言模型的发展，视频理解任务常局限于专门化方法，缺乏全面多粒度感知能力，这限制了视频分析的灵活性和深度。现有方法如GPT-4o无法有效处理跨尺度协同任务，导致效率低下和应用范围受限。因此，开发统一模型来解决多粒度视频理解问题至关重要，以推动视频人工智能领域的进步。
light_analysis.method: UFVideo采用统一视觉语言引导对齐机制，在一个模型中动态编码视觉和文本输入，灵活处理全局、像素和时间尺度的视频理解任务。关键创新在于实现多粒度任务的协同处理，生成文本响应、时间定位或地面掩码输出。摘要未详细说明具体模型架构或数据集，但该方法基于大型语言模型构建，旨在克服任务分割的限制。
light_analysis.result: 论文构建了UFVideo-Bench评估框架，包含三个协同任务，结果表明UFVideo在灵活性和性能上优于GPT-4o。在9个公共基准测试中，UFVideo覆盖多种常见视频理解任务，验证了其有效性和优势。摘要未提供具体准确率或效率数据，但通过对比实验展示了其在多粒度理解方面的进步。
light_analysis.conclusion: UFVideo的主要贡献是引入了首个统一多粒度协同理解的视频大型语言模型，解决了现有方法的任务分割问题。其学术价值在于提供新方法促进视频理解研究，实际应用价值在于提升视频分析的效率和准确性。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但可能涉及扩展到更多复杂场景或集成更丰富模态。

title: GeoDiffMM: Geometry-Guided Conditional Diffusion for Motion Magnification
abstract: Video Motion Magnification (VMM) amplifies subtle macroscopic motions to a perceptible level. Recently, existing mainstream Eulerian approaches address amplification-induced noise via decoupling representation learning such as texture, shape and frequency schemes, but they still struggle to mitigate the interference of photon noise on true micro-motion when motion displacements are very small. We propose GeoDiffMM, a novel diffusion-based Lagrangian VMM framework conditioned on optical flow as a geometric cue, enabling structurally consistent motion magnification. Specifically, we design a Noise-Free Optical Flow Augmentation strategy that synthesizes diverse nonrigid motion fields without photon noise as supervision, helping the model learn more accurate geometry-aware optical flow and generalize better. Next, we develop a Diffusion Motion Magnifier that conditions the denoising process on (i) optical flow as a geometry prior and (ii) a learnable magnification factor controlling magnitude, thereby selectively amplifying motion components consistent with scene semantics and structure. Finally, we perform Flow-based Video Synthesis to map the amplified motion back to the image domain with high fidelity. Extensive experiments on real and synthetic datasets show that GeoDiffMM outperforms state-of-the-art methods and significantly improves motion magnification.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出GeoDiffMM，一种基于扩散的几何引导条件扩散框架，用于视频运动放大，通过光流作为几何线索实现结构一致的运动放大。
light_analysis.motivation: 视频运动放大(VMM)旨在将视频中细微的宏观运动放大到可感知水平，但现有主流Eulerian方法，尽管通过解耦纹理、形状和频率表示来减少噪声，仍难以消除运动位移非常小时的光子噪声干扰，这限制了VMM的精度和应用效果，尤其是在需要高保真度分析的场景中，如医学影像或安全监控。
light_analysis.method: GeoDiffMM采用基于扩散的Lagrangian VMM框架，条件化于光学流作为几何线索。具体包括：设计噪声免费光流增强策略，合成多样非刚性运动场作为监督数据，以学习准确的几何感知光流；开发扩散运动放大器，将去噪过程条件化于光流（几何先验）和可学习放大因子，选择性地放大与场景语义一致的运动；最后执行基于光流的视频合成，将放大运动映射回图像域，保持高保真度。摘要未明确说明具体数据集和模型架构细节。
light_analysis.result: 在真实和合成数据集上的广泛实验表明，GeoDiffMM优于最先进方法，显著提升运动放大效果，有效减轻光子噪声干扰，但摘要未明确说明具体性能指标（如准确率提升或效率改进）和基线方法对比细节，仅概述了其优于现有技术的结论。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献在于提出GeoDiffMM，创新地将条件扩散与几何引导结合，实现更准确的视频运动放大，具有重要学术价值，推动了VMM领域的发展，并潜在应用于精确运动分析场景。未来工作可探索更多几何线索或扩展至复杂运动类型，但摘要未明确说明局限性和具体未来方向。

title: Think Before You Drive: World Model-Inspired Multimodal Grounding for Autonomous Vehicles
abstract: Interpreting natural-language commands to localize target objects is critical for autonomous driving (AD). Existing visual grounding (VG) methods for autonomous vehicles (AVs) typically struggle with ambiguous, context-dependent instructions, as they lack reasoning over 3D spatial relations and anticipated scene evolution. Grounded in the principles of world models, we propose ThinkDeeper, a framework that reasons about future spatial states before making grounding decisions. At its core is a Spatial-Aware World Model (SA-WM) that learns to reason ahead by distilling the current scene into a command-aware latent state and rolling out a sequence of future latent states, providing forward-looking cues for disambiguation. Complementing this, a hypergraph-guided decoder then hierarchically fuses these states with the multimodal input, capturing higher-order spatial dependencies for robust localization. In addition, we present DrivePilot, a multi-source VG dataset in AD, featuring semantic annotations generated by a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Chain-of-Thought (CoT)-prompted LLM pipeline. Extensive evaluations on six benchmarks, ThinkDeeper ranks #1 on the Talk2Car leaderboard and surpasses state-of-the-art baselines on DrivePilot, MoCAD, and RefCOCO/+/g benchmarks. Notably, it shows strong robustness and efficiency in challenging scenes (long-text, multi-agent, ambiguity) and retains superior performance even when trained on 50% of the data.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了ThinkDeeper框架，通过世界模型原理实现自动驾驶中的多模态grounding，显著提高了对模糊指令的解释能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需要准确理解自然语言命令来定位目标对象，这对安全交互至关重要。现有视觉grounding方法在处理模糊、上下文依赖的指令时表现不佳，因为它们缺乏对3D空间关系和预期场景演变的推理能力，导致在实际驾驶场景中车辆难以应对复杂指令，限制了技术发展。因此，亟需新方法能推理未来空间状态以提升准确性和鲁棒性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了ThinkDeeper框架，其核心是空间感知世界模型（SA-WM），它通过将当前场景蒸馏为命令感知的潜在状态，并推出未来潜在状态序列，来推理未来空间变化，为歧义消除提供前瞻性线索。此外，超图引导的解码器层次化地融合这些状态与多模态输入，捕获高阶空间依赖性以提升定位鲁棒性。同时，论文还介绍了DrivePilot数据集，使用检索增强生成（RAG）和思维链（CoT）提示的大语言模型（LLM）管道生成语义注释。
light_analysis.result: 论文在六个基准测试中进行了广泛评估，ThinkDeeper在Talk2Car排行榜上排名第一，并在DrivePilot、MoCAD和RefCOCO/+/g基准上超越了最先进的基线方法。它在挑战性场景（如长文本、多智能体、模糊指令）中显示出强大的鲁棒性和高效率。值得注意的是，即使仅使用50%的数据进行训练，模型仍保持优越性能，突显了其数据效率和泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了ThinkDeeper框架和DrivePilot数据集，通过结合世界模型推理未来空间状态，显著提升了自动驾驶中自然语言命令grounding的准确性。其学术价值在于引入了空间感知世界模型和超图解码器来建模复杂空间依赖；实际应用中，该方法能增强自动驾驶车辆对人类指令的理解能力，提高安全性和交互性。未来工作可关注模型效率优化、扩展到更多真实场景，或进一步探索多模态融合的潜力。

title: ViDiC: Video Difference Captioning
abstract: Understanding visual differences between dynamic scenes requires the comparative perception of compositional, spatial, and temporal changes--a capability that remains underexplored in existing vision-language systems. While prior work on Image Difference Captioning (IDC) has enabled models to describe semantic changes between static images, these approaches fail to capture motion continuity, event evolution, or editing consistency over time. We introduce the ViDiC (Video Difference Captioning) task and its corresponding ViDiC-1K dataset, designed to evaluate the ability of Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to provide fine-grained descriptions of similarities and differences between video pairs. ViDiC-1K comprises 1,000 curated video pairs annotated with over 4,000 comparative checklist items, covering seven categories: subject, style, background, cinematography, motion, location, and playback techniques. To ensure reliable evaluation, we propose a dual-checklist framework that measures the accuracy of similarity and difference separately, based on the LLM-as-a-Judge protocol. Experiments on nineteen representative multimodal models reveal a significant performance gap in their comparative description and difference perception abilities. We hope ViDiC-1K can be a challenging benchmark that lays a solid foundation for advancing video understanding, edit awareness, and comparative reasoning in multimodal intelligence.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了ViDiC任务和ViDiC-1K数据集，以评估多模态大语言模型对视频对差异的细粒度描述能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决视频对之间相似性和差异性的细粒度描述问题，这对于视频理解、编辑感知和比较推理至关重要。现有图像差异描述（IDC）方法虽能描述静态图像的语义变化，但未能处理视频中的动态特性，如运动连续性、事件演化或编辑一致性，导致在动态场景理解方面存在不足。因此，需要一个专门的任务和数据集来评估和改进多模态模型在这方面的能力。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了ViDiC（Video Difference Captioning）任务，并创建了ViDiC-1K数据集，包含1000个精心策划的视频对，每个视频对标注了七个类别的比较清单项（如主体、风格、背景、摄影、运动、位置、播放技术），总计超过4000项。评估采用双重清单框架，基于LLM-as-a-Judge协议，分别测量模型在描述相似性和差异性方面的准确性，核心创新在于扩展差异描述到视频领域并提供标准化评估基准。
light_analysis.result: 实验在十九个代表性多模态模型上进行，结果显示这些模型在ViDiC任务上的性能存在显著差距。通过双重清单框架评估，揭示了当前模型在比较描述和差异感知能力方面的不足，突显了该任务的挑战性。但具体性能指标如准确率或效率改进未在摘要中明确说明，仅指出性能差距较大。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于提出了ViDiC任务和ViDiC-1K数据集，为多模态智能的视频差异描述能力评估提供了新基准。其学术价值在于填补视频比较推理的研究空白，促进视频理解和编辑感知的发展；实际应用可支持视频编辑、内容分析和人机交互。局限性可能包括数据集的规模和多样性，未来工作可进一步扩展数据集和改进模型架构。

title: U4D: Uncertainty-Aware 4D World Modeling from LiDAR Sequences
abstract: Modeling dynamic 3D environments from LiDAR sequences is central to building reliable 4D worlds for autonomous driving and embodied AI. Existing generative frameworks, however, often treat all spatial regions uniformly, overlooking the varying uncertainty across real-world scenes. This uniform generation leads to artifacts in complex or ambiguous regions, limiting realism and temporal stability. In this work, we present U4D, an uncertainty-aware framework for 4D LiDAR world modeling. Our approach first estimates spatial uncertainty maps from a pretrained segmentation model to localize semantically challenging regions. It then performs generation in a "hard-to-easy" manner through two sequential stages: (1) uncertainty-region modeling, which reconstructs high-entropy regions with fine geometric fidelity, and (2) uncertainty-conditioned completion, which synthesizes the remaining areas under learned structural priors. To further ensure temporal coherence, U4D incorporates a mixture of spatio-temporal (MoST) block that adaptively fuses spatial and temporal representations during diffusion. Extensive experiments show that U4D produces geometrically faithful and temporally consistent LiDAR sequences, advancing the reliability of 4D world modeling for autonomous perception and simulation.
comment: CVPR 2026; 20 pages, 7 figures, 11 tables; Code at https://github.com/worldbench/U4D

light_analysis.overview: 提出U4D不确定性感知框架，通过估计空间不确定性和'难到易'生成策略，提高4D LiDAR世界建模的几何忠实和时间一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决从LiDAR序列建模动态3D环境的问题，这对于自动驾驶和具身AI构建可靠4D世界至关重要。现有生成框架常忽视空间区域的不确定性变化，导致在复杂或模糊区域产生伪影，限制了场景的真实性和时间稳定性。因此，开发能感知不确定性的方法对于提升4D世界建模的可靠性具有重要意义。
light_analysis.method: U4D框架首先使用预训练分割模型估计空间不确定性图，以定位语义挑战区域。接着，采用'难到易'的两阶段生成方式：第一阶段为不确定性区域建模，重点重构高熵区域以保持几何保真度；第二阶段为不确定性条件完成，在学习的结构先验下合成剩余区域。此外，引入混合时空（MoST）块，在扩散过程中自适应融合空间和时间表示，确保时间一致性。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，U4D能够产生几何忠实和时间一致的LiDAR序列，显著提升了4D世界建模的可靠性。尽管摘要未明确说明具体性能指标或基线对比，但研究通过广泛验证展示了其在自动驾驶感知和模拟中的有效性，避免了现有方法因忽视不确定性而导致的伪影问题。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究提出的U4D框架，通过不确定性感知和时空融合技术，为4D LiDAR世界建模提供了更可靠的解决方案。其创新之处在于'难到易'生成策略和MoST块设计，提升了场景真实性和时间稳定性。这一工作有助于推动自动驾驶和具身AI领域的发展，但未来可能需要进一步验证在更复杂环境中的泛化能力。

title: GeoDiT: A Diffusion-based Vision-Language Model for Geospatial Understanding
abstract: Autoregressive models are structurally misaligned with the inherently parallel nature of geospatial understanding, forcing a rigid sequential narrative onto scenes and fundamentally hindering the generation of structured and coherent outputs. We challenge this paradigm by reframing geospatial generation as a parallel refinement process, enabling a holistic, coarse-to-fine synthesis that resolves all semantic elements simultaneously. To operationalize this, we introduce GeoDiT, the first diffusion-based vision-language model tailored for the geospatial domain. Extensive experiments demonstrate that GeoDiT establishes a new state-of-the-art on benchmarks requiring structured, object-centric outputs. It achieves significant gains in image captioning, visual grounding, and multi-object detection, precisely the tasks where autoregressive models falter. Our work validates that aligning the generative process with the data's intrinsic structure is key to unlocking superior performance in complex geospatial analysis.

light_analysis.overview: GeoDiT是首个为地理空间理解设计的基于扩散的视觉-语言模型，通过并行生成方法显著提升结构化输出性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 自回归模型在处理地理空间数据时存在结构不匹配问题，因其顺序生成特性与地理空间场景的并行性质冲突，导致输出缺乏结构性和连贯性。地理空间分析需要同时处理多个对象和关系，但现有方法强制线性叙述，无法有效捕捉整体结构，从而限制了复杂任务的性能。因此，本研究旨在解决这一不足，通过提出更贴合数据内在结构的新方法，提升地理空间理解和生成的效率。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了GeoDiT，一个基于扩散模型的视觉-语言模型，专门针对地理空间领域。核心创新在于将地理空间生成过程重构为并行细化过程，通过整体、粗到细的合成，同时解决所有语义元素，打破了自回归模型的序列限制。关键技术包括扩散生成和视觉-语言融合，但摘要未明确说明具体使用的数据集、模型架构等细节。
light_analysis.result: 大量实验显示，GeoDiT在需要结构化、以对象为中心的输出的基准上建立了新的最先进水平。具体任务包括图像描述、视觉定位和多对象检测，在这些任务中，GeoDiT都取得了显著提升，尤其是在自回归模型表现不佳的领域。虽然摘要未提供具体数值如准确率百分比，但强调了对现有方法的改进，验证了其有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出并验证了GeoDiT模型，证明了将生成过程与数据内在结构对齐对提升复杂地理空间分析性能的关键作用。学术上，这项工作挑战了传统自回归范式，为视觉-语言模型在地理空间应用提供了新方向；实际价值在于可能增强相关任务的效果。未来工作可探索将该模型扩展到更广泛领域或优化其效率。

title: Masking Matters: Unlocking the Spatial Reasoning Capabilities of LLMs for 3D Scene-Language Understanding
abstract: Recent advances in 3D scene-language understanding have leveraged Large Language Models (LLMs) for 3D reasoning by transferring their general reasoning ability to 3D multi-modal contexts. However, existing methods typically adopt standard decoders from language modeling, which rely on a causal attention mask. This design introduces two fundamental conflicts in 3D scene understanding: sequential bias among order-agnostic 3D objects and restricted object-instruction attention, hindering task-specific reasoning. To overcome these limitations, we propose 3D Spatial Language Instruction Mask (3D-SLIM), an effective masking strategy that replaces the causal mask with an adaptive attention mask tailored to the spatial structure of 3D scenes. Our 3D-SLIM introduces two key components: a Geometry-adaptive Mask that constrains attention based on spatial density rather than token order, and an Instruction-aware Mask that enables object tokens to directly access instruction context. This design allows the model to process objects based on their spatial relationships while being guided by the user's task. 3D-SLIM is simple, requires no architectural modifications, and adds no extra parameters, yet it yields substantial performance improvements across diverse 3D scene-language tasks. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks and LLM baselines validate its effectiveness and underscore the critical role of decoder design in 3D multi-modal reasoning.
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2026. GitHub Page: https://github.com/Jyerim/3D-SLIM

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了3D-SLIM自适应注意力掩码策略，通过改进解码器设计来增强大语言模型在3D场景语言理解中的空间推理能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决大语言模型在3D场景语言理解中因使用因果注意力掩码而导致的冲突问题。现有方法通常继承语言建模的标准解码器，其因果掩码在3D上下文中引发两个根本性冲突：一是对顺序不敏感的3D对象引入了序列偏见，二是限制了对象令牌对指令上下文的注意力。这些问题阻碍了任务特定推理，影响模型在3D多模态环境中的性能。3D场景理解是计算机视觉和自然语言处理交叉领域的关键任务，现有方法的不足限制了LLM的空间推理能力扩展，因此开发更有效的注意力机制至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了3D-SLIM方法，这是一种自适应注意力掩码策略，专门为3D场景语言理解设计。3D-SLIM的核心包括两个关键组件：几何自适应掩码，它根据3D对象的空间密度来约束注意力，消除了因果掩码中的顺序偏见；以及指令感知掩码，允许对象令牌直接关注指令上下文，从而增强任务特定推理。该方法不需要对LLM架构进行任何修改，也不增加额外参数，仅通过调整注意力掩码来适应3D场景的空间结构，使得模型能够基于空间关系处理对象，同时在用户任务指导下进行推理。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证了3D-SLIM的有效性，通过在多基准测试和多种大语言模型基线中的应用，显示出显著的性能改进。摘要未明确说明具体准确率或效率数据，但论文表明该方法在3D场景语言任务中取得了实质性提升，与标准解码器相比表现出优越性。这些结果证实了3D-SLIM能够克服现有方法的局限性，提升模型在空间推理任务中的表现，从而证明了其在3D多模态推理中的实用价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了3D-SLIM注意力掩码策略，解决了LLM在3D场景语言理解中的空间推理问题。这突显了解码器设计在3D多模态推理中的关键作用，具有重要的学术价值，为改进注意力机制提供了新方向。实际应用中，3D-SLIM能够增强现有LLM在3D任务中的表现，无需额外开销。未来工作可能包括扩展应用到更多多模态任务或优化掩码设计，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性。

title: nuScenes Revisited: Progress and Challenges in Autonomous Driving
abstract: Autonomous Vehicles (AV) and Advanced Driver Assistance Systems (ADAS) have been revolutionized by Deep Learning. As a data-driven approach, Deep Learning relies on vast amounts of driving data, typically labeled in great detail. As a result, datasets, alongside hardware and algorithms, are foundational building blocks for the development of AVs. In this work we revisit one of the most widely used autonomous driving datasets: the nuScenes dataset. nuScenes exemplifies key trends in AV development, being the first dataset to include radar data, to feature diverse urban driving scenes from two continents, and to be collected using a fully autonomous vehicle operating on public roads, while also promoting multi-modal sensor fusion, standardized benchmarks, and a broad range of tasks including perception, localization & mapping, prediction and planning. We provide an unprecedented look into the creation of nuScenes, as well as its extensions nuImages and Panoptic nuScenes, summarizing many technical details that have hitherto not been revealed in academic publications. Furthermore, we trace how the influence of nuScenes impacted a large number of other datasets that were released later and how it defined numerous standards that are used by the community to this day. Finally, we present an overview of both official and unofficial tasks using the nuScenes dataset and review major methodological developments, thereby offering a comprehensive survey of the autonomous driving literature, with a particular focus on nuScenes.

light_analysis.overview: 论文通过全面回顾nuScenes数据集，总结了自动驾驶领域的数据集进展、标准化和未来挑战，提供了深入的综述分析。
light_analysis.motivation: 自动驾驶和高级驾驶辅助系统的发展依赖于深度学习，而深度学习作为数据驱动方法，需要大量标注数据，因此数据集是发展的基础构建块。现有自动驾驶数据集虽广泛使用，但缺乏对nuScenes这一关键数据集的系统性回顾，无法全面评估其在推动多模态传感器融合、标准化基准和多样化任务方面的贡献。本研究旨在填补这一空白，回顾nuScenes的创建、扩展及其对社区标准的影响，以促进领域进步并识别未来研究需求。
light_analysis.method: 本研究采用文献综述方法，系统分析了nuScenes数据集的创建过程，包括其扩展如nuImages和Panoptic nuScenes，并首次揭示了未公开的技术细节。关键创新点在于跟踪nuScenes对其他数据集的广泛影响和定义的社区标准，如多模态传感器融合和任务基准。此外，综述了基于nuScenes的官方和民间任务，涵盖感知、预测等，提供对自动驾驶方法发展的全面概览。
light_analysis.result: 作为一篇综述论文，摘要未明确说明具体实验结果，如性能指标或与基线的对比。然而，论文通过回顾nuScenes数据集的创建、扩展和社区影响，展示了其在促进自动驾驶技术进步中的关键作用，例如定义多模态传感器融合标准和多样化任务基准。这有助于理解数据集在推动领域发展中的重要性，但没有提供具体数据支撑的量化结果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是对nuScenes数据集的系统性回顾，揭示了其创建细节、社区影响和标准定义，具有重要的学术价值，为研究者提供了深入的数据集分析。在实际应用上，促进了自动驾驶数据集的标准化和任务发展。潜在局限性包括数据集的地理覆盖可能不完全，未来工作可扩展至更多新兴数据集，整合新任务以应对自动驾驶的复杂挑战。

title: TRivia: Self-supervised Fine-tuning of Vision-Language Models for Table Recognition
abstract: Table recognition (TR) aims to transform table images into semi-structured representations such as HTML or Markdown. As a core component of document parsing, TR has long relied on supervised learning, with recent efforts dominated by fine-tuning vision-language models (VLMs) using labeled data. While VLMs have brought TR to the next level, pushing performance further demands large-scale labeled data that is costly to obtain. Consequently, although proprietary models have continuously pushed the performance boundary, open-source models, often trained with limited resources and, in practice, the only viable option for many due to privacy regulations, still lag far behind. To bridge this gap, we introduce TRivia, a self-supervised fine-tuning method that enables pretrained VLMs to learn TR directly from unlabeled table images in the wild. Built upon Group Relative Policy Optimization, TRivia automatically identifies unlabeled samples that most effectively facilitate learning and eliminates the need for human annotations through a question-answering-based reward mechanism. An attention-guided module generates diverse questions for each table image, and the ability to interpret the recognition results and answer them correctly provides feedback to optimize the TR model. This closed-loop process allows the TR model to autonomously learn to recognize, structure, and reason over tables without labeled data. Leveraging this pipeline, we present TRivia-3B, an open-sourced, compact, and state-of-the-art TR model that surpasses existing systems (e.g., Gemini 2.5 Pro, MinerU2.5) on three popular benchmarks. Model and code are released at: https://github.com/HKU-TASR/TRivia

light_analysis.overview: TRivia是一种自监督微调方法，使视觉语言模型能从无标注表格图像中学习表格识别，并推出开源模型TRivia-3B在多个基准上表现优异。
light_analysis.motivation: 表格识别作为文档解析的核心组件，传统上依赖监督学习和大规模标注数据，但获取成本高昂。专有模型凭借丰富资源不断突破性能极限，而开源模型因资源有限和隐私法规限制，在实际应用中性能落后，导致许多场景下只能依赖开源方案。因此，开发无需标注数据的微调方法至关重要，以提升开源模型的表格识别能力，缩小与专有模型的差距。
light_analysis.method: TRivia基于Group Relative Policy Optimization，构建自监督微调框架。通过注意力引导模块为每个表格图像生成多样化问答，利用问答式奖励机制自动筛选最有效的无标注样本，为模型提供反馈。这种闭环过程使预训练视觉语言模型能自主学习识别、结构化和推理表格，无需人类标注。具体使用TRivia-3B模型，参数规模为3B。
light_analysis.result: TRivia-3B模型在三个流行基准测试中超越了现有系统，如Gemini 2.5 Pro和MinerU2.5，展示了其卓越的表格识别性能。摘要未提供具体准确率数据，但表明该模型在开源模型中达到最先进水平，验证了自监督微调方法的有效性。相比依赖标注数据的基线方法，TRivia通过无监督学习显著降低了数据成本，同时保持了高性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了TRivia自监督微调方法，消除了表格识别中对标注数据的依赖，并开源了TRivia-3B模型。该研究在学术上推动了自监督学习在视觉语言任务中的应用，实际中为开源社区提供了高效、可扩展的表格识别工具。潜在局限性可能包括对多样化表格类型的泛化能力，未来工作可扩展到其他文档解析任务或改进奖励机制。

title: Hybrid Stackelberg Game and Diffusion-based Auction for Two-tier Agentic AI Task Offloading in Internet of Agents
abstract: The Internet of Agents (IoA) is rapidly gaining prominence as a foundational architecture for interconnected intelligent systems, designed to facilitate seamless discovery, communication, and collaborative reasoning among a vast network of Artificial Intelligence (AI) agents. Powered by Large Language and Vision-Language Models, IoA enables the development of interactive, rational agents capable of complex cooperation, moving far beyond traditional isolated models. IoA involves physical entities, i.e., Wireless Agents (WAs) with limited onboard resources, which need to offload their compute-intensive agentic AI services to nearby servers. Such servers can be Mobile Agents (MAs), e.g., vehicle agents, or Fixed Agents (FAs), e.g., end-side units agents. Given their fixed geographical locations and stable connectivity, FAs can serve as reliable communication gateways and task aggregation points. This stability allows them to effectively coordinate with and offload to an Aerial Agent (AA) tier, which has an advantage not affordable for highly mobile MAs with dynamic connectivity limitations. As such, we propose a two-tier optimization approach. The first tier employs a multi-leader multi-follower Stackelberg game. In the game, MAs and FAs act as the leaders who set resource prices. WAs are the followers to determine task offloading ratios. However, when FAs become overloaded, they can further offload tasks to available aerial resources. Therefore, the second tier introduces a Double Dutch Auction model where overloaded FAs act as the buyers to request resources, and AAs serve as the sellers for resource provision. We then develop a diffusion-based Deep Reinforcement Learning algorithm to solve the model. Numerical results demonstrate the superiority of our proposed scheme in facilitating task offloading.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出一种结合 Stackelberg 博弈和扩散基础拍卖的双层优化方法，用于 Internet of Agents 中的智能代理任务卸载，有效协调资源分配。
light_analysis.motivation: Internet of Agents（IoA）作为互联智能系统的基础架构，涉及资源有限的无线代理（WAs）需要卸载计算密集型任务到移动代理（MAs）或固定代理（FAs）。FAs 的稳定连接性允许其进一步卸载任务到空中代理（AAs），但现有方法在动态环境中难以优化资源分配。本研究旨在解决 IoA 中任务卸载的资源协调问题，以提高系统效率和可靠性，应对复杂合作场景中的挑战。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用双层优化框架：第一层使用多领导者多追随者的 Stackelberg 博弈，其中 MAs 和 FAs 作为领导者设定资源价格，WAs 作为追随者确定任务卸载比率；第二层引入 Double Dutch Auction 模型，当过载的 FAs 需要额外资源时，作为买家请求，AAs 作为卖家提供资源。为求解此模型，开发了基于扩散的深度强化学习算法，通过扩散过程处理复杂优化，以动态调整策略并提高收敛效率。
light_analysis.result: 摘要中未提供具体实验数据，但指出数值结果展示了所提方案在促进任务卸载方面的优越性。可以推断该方案可能在卸载效率和资源利用率上优于基线方法，但具体性能指标如准确率或时间改进摘要未明确说明，需进一步实验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一个结合 Stackelberg 博弈和拍卖的双层优化框架，为 IoA 中的任务卸载提供了高效资源管理方案。其学术价值在于将博弈论、拍卖理论与深度强化学习结合，推动分布式智能系统的理论研究；实际应用价值在于优化代理协作和资源分配。未来工作可探索模型扩展或处理更大规模场景，以应对现实世界中的动态变化。

title: Latent Diffusion Inversion Requires Understanding the Latent Space
abstract: The recovery of training data from generative models ("model inversion") has been extensively studied for diffusion models in the data domain as a memorization/overfitting phenomenon. Latent diffusion models (LDMs), which operate on the latent codes from encoder/decoder pairs, have been robust to prior inversion methods. In this work we describe two key findings: (1) the diffusion model exhibits non-uniform memorization across latent codes, tending to overfit samples located in high-distortion regions of the decoder pullback metric; (2) even within a single latent code, memorization contributions are unequal across representation dimensions. Our proposed method to ranks latent dimensions by their contribution to the decoder pullback metric, which in turn identifies dimensions that contribute to memorization. For score-based membership inference, a sub-task of model inversion, we find that removing less-memorizing dimensions improves performance on all tested methods and datasets, with average AUROC gains of 1-4% and substantial increases in TPR@1%FPR (1-32%) across diverse datasets including CIFAR-10, CelebA, ImageNet-1K, Pokémon, MS-COCO, and Flickr. Our results highlight the overlooked influence of the auto-encoder geometry on LDM memorization and provide a new perspective for analyzing privacy risks in diffusion-based generative models.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出通过分析潜在空间几何特性来改进潜在扩散模型成员推断的方法，揭示了记忆化的不均匀性，为隐私风险分析提供新视角。
light_analysis.motivation: 模型反转作为从生成模型中恢复训练数据的现象，在扩散模型中已被广泛研究为记忆化或过拟合问题。然而，潜在扩散模型（LDMs）对先前反转方法表现出鲁棒性，这突显了理解其记忆化机制的重要性，以应对日益增长的生成模型隐私风险。现有方法往往忽视了潜在空间的几何结构，导致对LDMs记忆化行为的评估不足，因此需要新方法来深入分析这种几何特性对隐私泄露的影响。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种方法，通过根据潜在维度对解码器拉回度量的贡献进行排名，来识别导致记忆化的关键维度。这一方法利用自动编码器的几何特性，聚焦于不均匀的记忆化贡献，将分析应用于基于分数的成员推断任务。实验使用了多个数据集，包括CIFAR-10、CelebA、ImageNet-1K等，以验证方法的有效性，并无需额外模型训练，直接基于现有LDM架构进行操作。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，移除较少记忆化的维度显著提升了成员推断性能，平均AUROC增益为1-4%，TPR@1%FPR提高1-32%。这些改进在多种数据集上得到验证，如CIFAR-10、CelebA、ImageNet-1K、Pokémon、MS-COCO和Flickr，表明方法具有广泛适用性。与基线方法相比，该方法在隐私风险评估中实现了更准确的检测，突出了潜在空间分析的实际价值。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献在于揭示了自动编码器几何对潜在扩散模型记忆化的被忽视影响，为分析扩散生成模型中的隐私风险提供了新视角。这有助于深化对生成模型安全性的理解，并可能指导未来开发更隐私保护的模型。尽管摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可以进一步探索其他几何特性或扩展到更广泛的生成模型类型，以应对不断演变的隐私挑战。

title: DINO-Tok: Adapting DINO for Visual Tokenizers
abstract: Recent advances in visual generation have emphasized the importance of Latent Generative Models (LGMs), which critically depend on effective visual tokenizers to bridge pixels and semantic representations. However, tokenizers constructed on pre-trained vision foundation models (VFMs) often struggle to balance semantic richness and reconstruction fidelity in high-dimensional latent spaces. In this paper, we introduce DINO-Tok, a visual tokenizer built upon a frozen DINO encoder that supports both continuous autoencoding (DINO-Tok-AE) and discrete vector-quantization (DINO-Tok-VQ). By unifying hierarchical representations from both shallow fine-grained features and deep global semantics into an information-complete latent space, DINO-Tok preserves texture details while maintaining \textit{semantic consistency} for generation. We further investigate VQ in frozen semantic feature spaces of high dimensionality, where information dilution and codebook collapse frequently arise. To address this issue, we propose Dominant-Subspace Quantization (DSQ), which leverages a global PCA analysis to select principal components while suppressing noisy dimensions, thereby stabilizing codebook optimization and improving reconstruction and generation quality. On ImageNet 256x256, DINO-Tok achieves strong reconstruction performance, achieving 0.28 rFID for continuous autoencoding and 1.10 rFID for discrete VQ, as well as strong few-step generation performance 1.82 gFID for diffusion and 2.44 gFID for autoregressive generation. These results demonstrate that pre-trained VFMs such as DINO can be directly adapted into high-fidelity, semantically aligned visual tokenizers for next-generation latent generative models. Code will be publicly available at https://github.com/MKJia/DINO-Tok.

light_analysis.overview: DINO-Tok是一种基于冻结DINO编码器的视觉tokenizer，通过统一分层表示和引入Dominant-Subspace Quantization，实现语义一致的高保真度视觉生成。
light_analysis.motivation: 视觉生成中的潜生成模型（LGMs）依赖视觉tokenizer来连接像素和语义表示，但现有基于预训练视觉基础模型（VFMs）的tokenizer在高维潜空间中难以平衡语义丰富性和重建保真度。语义不足影响生成一致性，保真度低则降低图像质量，这对下一代生成模型至关重要。因此，研究旨在开发能更好结合语义与细节的tokenizer，解决现有方法的局限性，推动更高效的视觉生成技术发展。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出DINO-Tok，一种基于冻结DINO编码器的视觉tokenizer，支持连续自动编码（DINO-Tok-AE）和离散向量量化（DINO-Tok-VQ）。它统一了浅层细粒度特征和深层全局语义的分层表示，形成信息完整的潜空间，以保持纹理细节并确保语义一致性。针对高维量化中的信息稀释和码书崩溃问题，引入了Dominant-Subspace Quantization（DSQ），利用全局PCA分析选择主成分并抑制噪声维度，从而稳定码书优化。方法在ImageNet 256x256数据集上进行验证，结合了预训练模型的特征提取和量化技术。
light_analysis.result: 在ImageNet 256x256数据集上，DINO-Tok展示了强重建和生成性能。连续自动编码的rFID为0.28，离散向量量化的rFID为1.10；生成任务中，扩散模型的gFID为1.82，自回归生成的gFID为2.44。摘要未明确说明与基线方法的直接对比，但这些结果优于常见标准，表明DINO-Tok在语义对齐和保真度方面显著改进。rFID和gFID指标的优化验证了方法在视觉tokenizer设计中的有效性，为潜生成模型提供了高质量输入。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出DINO-Tok，一种基于冻结DINO编码器的视觉tokenizer，通过统一分层特征和DSQ技术，实现语义一致的高保真度视觉生成。这证明了预训练视觉基础模型可以直接适配为高效的tokenizer，为下一代潜生成模型提供了新思路。研究具有学术价值，推动了视觉tokenizer的设计，并在实际应用中可能提升图像生成质量。未来工作可探索更多VFM的适配或扩展到其他视觉任务，以进一步优化性能。

title: HalDec-Bench: Benchmarking Hallucination Detector in Image Captioning
abstract: Hallucination detection in captions (HalDec) assesses a vision-language model's ability to correctly align image content with text by identifying errors in captions that misrepresent the image. Beyond evaluation, effective hallucination detection is also essential for curating high-quality image-caption pairs used to train VLMs. However, the generalizability of VLMs as hallucination detectors across different captioning models and hallucination types remains unclear due to the lack of a comprehensive benchmark. In this work, we introduce HalDec-Bench, a benchmark designed to evaluate hallucination detectors in a principled and interpretable manner. HalDec-Bench contains captions generated by diverse VLMs together with human annotations indicating the presence of hallucinations, detailed hallucination-type categories, and segment-level labels. The benchmark provides tasks with a wide range of difficulty levels and reveals performance differences across models that are not visible in existing multimodal reasoning or alignment benchmarks. Our analysis further uncovers two key findings. First, detectors tend to recognize sentences appearing at the beginning of a response as correct, regardless of their actual correctness. Second, our experiments suggest that dataset noise can be substantially reduced by using strong VLMs as filters while employing recent VLMs as caption generators. Our project page is available at https://dahlian00.github.io/HalDec-Bench-Page/.
comment: Previously this version appeared as arXiv:2603.15253 which was submitted as a new work by accident

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了HalDec-Bench基准，旨在系统评估图像描述中幻觉检测器的性能，为视觉语言模型提供标准测试平台。
light_analysis.motivation: 图像描述中的幻觉检测对评估和训练视觉语言模型（VLMs）至关重要，因为它能识别描述中与图像内容不符的错误，帮助提升数据质量。然而，由于缺乏全面基准，VLMs作为幻觉检测器在不同描述模型和幻觉类型上的泛化能力尚不明确。现有多模态推理或对齐基准不足以揭示性能差异，限制了该领域的进一步发展。
light_analysis.method: 研究构建了HalDec-Bench基准，该基准整合了多种VLMs生成的描述，并包含人类标注的幻觉存在信息、详细幻觉类型分类（如误表示错误）和分段级标签，以提供全面评估。基准设计了不同难度任务，确保评估的多样性和可解释性，从而系统测试检测器在真实场景下的性能。
light_analysis.result: 分析显示模型性能差异明显，检测器倾向于将回答开头的句子视为正确，无论其实际准确性。实验发现，使用强VLMs作为过滤器可以显著减少数据集噪音，同时结合新VLMs作为描述生成器，提升数据质量。这些结果揭示了现有基准未能捕获的检测器行为模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: HalDec-Bench为幻觉检测提供了标准评估工具，有助于改进VLMs的训练数据质量和模型性能。研究发现指导了数据集去噪和检测器设计，具有实际应用价值，如增强视觉语言系统的可靠性。未来可扩展基准到更多领域，以促进技术优化。

title: Tell Model Where to Look: Mitigating Hallucinations in MLLMs by Vision-Guided Attention
abstract: Visual attention serves as the primary mechanism through which MLLMs interpret visual information; however, its limited localization capability often leads to hallucinations. We observe that although MLLMs can accurately extract visual semantics from visual tokens, they fail to fully leverage this advantage during subsequent inference. To address this limitation, we propose Vision-Guided Attention (VGA), a training-free method that first constructs precise visual grounding by exploiting the semantic content of visual tokens, and then uses this grounding to guide the model's focus toward relevant visual regions. In image captioning, VGA further refines this guidance dynamically during generation by suppressing regions that have already been described. In VGA, each token undergoes only a single forward pass, introducing a negligible latency overhead. In addition, VGA is fully compatible with efficient attention implementations such as FlashAttention. Extensive experiments across diverse MLLMs and multiple hallucination benchmarks demonstrate that VGA achieves state-of-the-art dehallucination performance. Further analysis confirms that explicit visual guidance plays a crucial role in enhancing the visual understanding capabilities of MLLMs.

light_analysis.overview: 提出 Vision-Guided Attention (VGA) 方法，通过视觉引导注意力缓解多模态大语言模型中的幻觉问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 多模态大语言模型在视觉理解中常出现幻觉，主要由于视觉注意力机制定位能力有限。尽管模型能从视觉令牌中准确提取语义，但在推理过程中未能充分利用这些信息，导致输出不准确。这一问题影响模型的可靠性和实际应用价值，因此需要改进注意力机制，以指导模型更有效地聚焦于相关视觉区域，从而减少幻觉。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 Vision-Guided Attention (VGA)，这是一种无需额外训练的方法。它通过利用视觉令牌的语义内容来构建精确的视觉定位，并以此引导模型在推理时关注相关视觉区域。在图像描述任务中，VGA 动态细化指导，通过抑制已描述的区域来避免重复和错误。实现上，每个令牌仅需一次前向传播，引入可忽略的延迟，并与高效注意力实现如 FlashAttention 完全兼容。
light_analysis.result: 实验在多种多模态大语言模型和多个幻觉基准测试中进行，结果显示 VGA 方法在去幻觉性能上达到最先进水平。虽然摘要未明确说明具体数据，但确认了 VGA 显著优于基线方法，有效减少了模型输出中的错误和幻觉，这表明该方法能显著提升模型的视觉理解准确性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了无需训练的 VGA 方法，通过视觉引导注意力机制减轻多模态大语言模型中的幻觉。这不仅强调了显式视觉指导在提升视觉理解能力中的关键作用，还为实际应用提供了高效、低延迟的解决方案。局限性或未来工作方向摘要未明确说明，但该方法具有广泛的应用潜力。

title: Pedestrian Crossing Intention Prediction Using Multimodal Fusion Network
abstract: Pedestrian crossing intention prediction is essential for the deployment of autonomous vehicles (AVs) in urban environments. Ideal prediction provides AVs with critical environmental cues, thereby reducing the risk of pedestrian-related collisions.
