However, the prediction task is challenging due to the diverse nature of pedestrian behavior and its dependence on multiple contextual factors. This paper proposes a multimodal fusion network that leverages seven modality features from both visual and motion branches, aiming to effectively extract and integrate complementary cues across different modalities. Specifically, motion and visual features are extracted from the raw inputs using multiple Transformer-based extraction modules. Depth-guided attention module leverages depth information to guide attention towards salient regions in another modality through comprehensive spatial feature interactions. To account for the varying importance of different modalities and frames, modality attention and temporal attention are designed to selectively emphasize informative modalities and effectively capture temporal dependencies. Extensive experiments on the JAAD dataset validate the effectiveness of the proposed network, achieving superior performance compared to the baseline methods.
comment: 29th IAVSD International Symposium on Dynamics of Vehicles on Roads and Tracks (IAVSD 2025)

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出一种多模态融合网络，通过融合视觉和运动特征并利用注意力机制优化集成，以预测行人过街意图，提升自动驾驶车辆的安全性。
light_analysis.motivation: 行人过街意图预测对于自动驾驶车辆在城市场景中的部署至关重要，它能提供关键环境提示以减少与行人相关的碰撞风险。然而，该任务具有挑战性，因为行人行为多样且依赖于多种上下文因素，现有方法可能难以有效处理多模态信息的融合和动态变化。本研究旨在开发一种新方法，通过综合多模态特征来解决这一难题，以提高预测的准确性和可靠性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种多模态融合网络，利用来自视觉和运动分支的七种模态特征。首先，使用基于Transformer的提取模块从原始输入中提取运动与视觉特征。其次，引入深度引导注意力模块，通过空间特征交互，利用深度信息引导对另一模态中显著区域的注意力。此外，设计了模态注意力和时间注意力，以选择性地强调信息丰富的模态，并有效捕捉时间依赖性，从而优化特征集成。整体架构旨在从多模态数据中提取互补线索，提升模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 在JAAD数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了所提出网络的有效性。与基线方法相比，该网络在行人过街意图预测任务中表现出更优的性能，具体体现在更高的预测准确率上，但摘要未提供具体的数值数据。实验结果表明，多模态融合和注意力机制能显著增强模型的预测能力，证明了所提方法的先进性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本论文的主要贡献是提出了一种创新的多模态融合网络，通过结合视觉和运动特征以及注意力机制，有效提升了行人过街意图预测的准确性和鲁棒性。这项研究在学术上推动了计算机视觉和自动驾驶领域的进展，为多模态融合技术提供了新思路；在实际应用中，有助于增强自动驾驶车辆的安全性，降低事故风险。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多模态、更大数据集或优化实时性能。

title: Investigating self-supervised representations for audio-visual deepfake detection
abstract: Self-supervised representations excel at many vision and speech tasks, but their potential for audio-visual deepfake detection remains underexplored. Unlike prior work that uses these features in isolation or buried within complex architectures, we systematically evaluate them across modalities (audio, video, multimodal) and domains (lip movements, generic visual content). We assess three key dimensions: detection effectiveness, interpretability of encoded information, and cross-modal complementarity. We find that most self-supervised features capture deepfake-relevant information, and that this information is complementary. Moreover, models primarily attend to semantically meaningful regions rather than spurious artifacts (such as the leading silence). Among the investigated features, audio-informed representations generalize best and achieve state-of-the-art results. However, generalization to realistic in-the-wild data remains challenging. Our analysis indicates this gap stems from intrinsic dataset difficulty rather than from features latching onto superficial patterns. Project webpage: https://bit-ml.github.io/ssr-dfd.
comment: Accepted to the IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR) 2026

light_analysis.overview: 本文系统评估了自监督表示在音频-视觉深度伪造检测中的应用，发现音频信息表示泛化性能最优。
light_analysis.motivation: 自监督表示在视觉和语音任务中表现优异，但在音频-视觉深度伪造检测领域潜力未被充分探索。现有方法常孤立使用这些特征或将其隐藏在复杂架构中，缺乏跨模态和跨域的系统评估。深度伪造检测对内容真实性验证至关重要，因此探究自监督表示的有效性和互补性具有重要研究意义，以弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: 本研究通过系统性评估自监督表示在音频、视频和多模态表示中的应用，涵盖唇部运动和一般视觉内容等不同领域。关键创新在于从检测效果、编码信息的可解释性和跨模态互补性三个维度进行分析，避免了先前工作对特征的孤立使用或复杂架构依赖。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构，但强调了对多模态特征的全面比较。
light_analysis.result: 实验发现，大多数自监督特征能够捕获与深度伪造相关的信息，且这些信息在不同模态间具有互补性。模型倾向于关注语义上有意义的区域，如口型变化，而非虚假伪影如引导静默。音频信息表示在所有特征中泛化能力最强，达到了最先进的检测性能，但与基线方法的对比效果突出。然而，泛化到现实场景数据仍具挑战性，分析表明这源于数据集本身的难度而非特征捕捉表层模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证实了自监督表示在音频-视觉深度伪造检测中的有效性和互补性，尤其突出了音频信息表示的领先性能。该研究为深度伪造检测提供了基于自监督学习的新方向，具有学术和实际应用价值。局限性在于对现实数据的泛化能力有限，未来工作需改进数据集或探索更鲁棒的特征表示方法，以提升模型在复杂场景中的表现。

title: HUMORCHAIN: Theory-Guided Multi-Stage Reasoning for Interpretable Multimodal Humor Generation
abstract: Humor, as both a creative human activity and a social binding mechanism, has long posed a major challenge for AI generation. Although producing humor requires complex cognitive reasoning and social understanding, theories of humor suggest that it follows learnable patterns and structures, making it theoretically possible for generative models to acquire them implicitly. In recent years, multimodal humor has become a prevalent form of online communication, especially among Gen Z, highlighting the need for AI systems capable of integrating visual understanding with humorous language generation. However, existing data-driven approaches lack explicit modeling or theoretical grounding of humor, often producing literal descriptions that fail to capture its underlying cognitive mechanisms, resulting in the generated image descriptions that are fluent but lack genuine humor or cognitive depth. To address this limitation, we propose HUMORCHAIN (HUmor-guided Multi-step Orchestrated Reasoning Chain for Image Captioning), a theory-guided multi-stage reasoning framework. It integrates visual semantic parsing, humor- and psychology-based reasoning, and a fine-tuned discriminator for humor evaluation, forming an interpretable and controllable cognitive reasoning chain. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to explicitly embed cognitive structures from humor theories into multimodal humor generation, enabling a structured reasoning process from visual understanding to humor creation. Experiments on Meme-Image-No-Text, Oogiri-GO, and OxfordTVG-HIC datasets show that HUMORCHAIN outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in human humor preference, Elo/BT scores, and semantic diversity, demonstrating that theory-driven structured reasoning enables large language models to generate humor aligned with human perception.

light_analysis.overview: HUMORCHAIN 提出一个理论指导的多阶段推理框架，首次将幽默理论的认知结构嵌入多模态幽默生成，实现可解释和可控的幽默创作。
light_analysis.motivation: 幽默作为创意活动和社会纽带，对AI生成构成挑战；多模态幽默在Z世代在线沟通中流行，凸显AI需整合视觉与语言生成幽默的需求。现有数据驱动方法缺乏幽默的明确建模或理论基础，常产生流畅但缺乏真正幽默的描述，导致内容肤浅，因此研究旨在通过理论指导解决幽默生成中的深度认知问题。
light_analysis.method: HUMORCHAIN 框架包括视觉语义解析、基于幽默和心理学推理以及微调判别器进行幽默评估，形成可解释的认知推理链。关键创新是首次将幽默理论的认知结构嵌入多模态生成，实现从视觉理解到幽默创作的结构化过程，实验使用 Meme-Image-No-Text、Oogiri-GO 和 OxfordTVG-HIC 数据集。
light_analysis.result: 在 Meme-Image-No-Text、Oogiri-GO 和 OxfordTVG-HIC 数据集上，HUMORCHAIN 在人类幽默偏好、Elo/BT 分数和语义多样性方面优于最先进的基线方法，证明了理论驱动的结构化推理能使大语言模型生成更符合人类感知的幽默内容，摘要未明确说明具体提升数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: HUMORCHAIN 的主要贡献在于提供了一个理论指导、可解释的多模态幽默生成框架，推动了AI在创造性任务中的可解释性发展；学术价值是结合心理学理论提升AI生成质量，实际应用价值是改善人机交互，未来工作可能涉及扩展到其他复杂推理任务或模态。

title: Data-Efficient and Robust Trajectory Generation through Pathlet Dictionary Learning
abstract: Trajectory generation has recently drawn growing interest in privacy-preserving urban mobility studies and location-based service applications. Although many studies have used deep learning or generative AI methods to model trajectories and have achieved promising results, the robustness and interpretability of such models are largely unexplored. This limits the application of trajectory generation algorithms on noisy real-world data and their trustworthiness in downstream tasks. To address this issue, we exploit the regular structure in urban trajectories and propose a deep generative model based on the pathlet representation, which encode trajectories with binary vectors associated with a learned dictionary of trajectory segments. Specifically, we introduce a probabilistic graphical model to describe the trajectory generation process, which includes a Variational Autoencoder (VAE) component and a linear decoder component. During training, the model can simultaneously learn the latent embedding of pathlet representations and the pathlet dictionary that captures mobility patterns in the trajectory dataset. The conditional version of our model can also be used to generate customized trajectories based on temporal and spatial constraints.   Our model can effectively learn data distribution even using noisy data, achieving relative improvements of $35.4\%$ and $26.3\%$ over strong baselines on two real-world trajectory datasets. Moreover, the generated trajectories can be conveniently utilized for multiple downstream tasks, including trajectory prediction and data denoising. Lastly, the framework design offers a significant efficiency advantage, saving $64.8\%$ of the time and $56.5\%$ of GPU memory compared to previous approaches.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于路径字典学习的深度生成模型，以实现数据高效且鲁棒的轨迹生成，通过概率图模型结合VAE和线性解码器。
light_analysis.motivation: 轨迹生成在隐私保护的城市移动性研究和位置服务应用中越来越受关注，但现有深度学习方法尽管取得进展，其鲁棒性和可解释性不足。这导致在处理噪声真实世界数据时效果受限，并影响下游任务的信任度。本研究旨在解决这些问题，通过利用轨迹的规则结构来开发更可靠的模型，以应对实际应用中的数据噪声和不规则性，提升实用价值。
light_analysis.method: 本研究提出了一种基于路径表示的深度生成模型。核心方法包括使用概率图模型描述轨迹生成过程，其中融合了变分自编码器（VAE）和线性解码器组件。模型通过训练同时学习路径表示的潜在嵌入和捕捉移动模式的路径字典，并使用二进制向量编码轨迹。条件版本允许基于时空约束生成定制轨迹，增强了灵活性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，该模型在噪声数据上能有效学习数据分布，在两个真实世界轨迹数据集上，相对于强基线分别实现了35.4%和26.3%的相对提升。生成的轨迹可成功应用于下游任务，如轨迹预测和数据去噪。此外，框架设计显著提高了效率，节省了64.8%的时间和56.5%的GPU内存。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是开发了一种鲁棒且数据高效的轨迹生成框架，通过路径字典学习提高了模型的解释性和实用性。该方法在真实噪声环境中表现出色，支持定制化轨迹生成和多个下游应用，为城市移动性研究提供了有力工具。未来工作可探索模型的更广泛适用性或进一步优化其性能。

title: Learning to See Through a Baby's Eyes: Early Visual Diets Enable Robust Visual Intelligence in Humans and Machines
abstract: Newborns perceive the world with low-acuity, color-degraded, and temporally continuous vision, which gradually sharpens as infants develop. To explore the ecological advantages of such staged "visual diets", we train self-supervised learning (SSL) models on object-centric videos under constraints that simulate infant vision: grayscale-to-color (C), blur-to-sharp (A), and preserved temporal continuity (T)-collectively termed CATDiet. For evaluation, we establish a comprehensive benchmark across ten datasets, covering clean and corrupted image recognition, texture-shape cue conflict tests, silhouette recognition, depth-order classification, and the visual cliff paradigm. All CATDiet variants demonstrate enhanced robustness in object recognition, despite being trained solely on object-centric videos. Remarkably, models also exhibit biologically aligned developmental patterns, including neural plasticity changes mirroring synaptic density in macaque V1 and behaviors resembling infants' visual cliff responses. Building on these insights, CombDiet initializes SSL with CATDiet before standard training while preserving temporal continuity. Trained on object-centric or head-mounted infant videos, CombDiet outperforms standard SSL on both in-domain and out-of-domain object recognition and depth perception. Together, these results suggest that the developmental progression of early infant visual experience offers a powerful reverse-engineering framework for understanding the emergence of robust visual intelligence in machines. All code, data, and models are available at Github.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出CATDiet框架，通过模拟婴儿视觉发展的约束，增强自监督学习模型的视觉鲁棒性和生物对齐性。
light_analysis.motivation: 研究动机在于探索婴儿早期视觉经验（如低视力、颜色退化、时间连续性）如何促成鲁棒视觉智能，为机器学习模型在面对复杂和噪声环境时鲁棒性不足的问题提供新视角。现有视觉模型通常基于清晰静态图像训练，忽视了人类视觉发展的自然渐进过程，导致在识别物体、处理纹理-形状冲突等任务中表现受限，未能充分利用生物启发的学习策略。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用自监督学习模型，在物体中心视频上训练，施加模拟婴儿视觉的约束：灰度到彩色（C）、模糊到清晰（A）和时间连续性（T），统称为CATDiet。核心创新是设计CATDiet框架，模拟视觉发展过程，无需人工标注；CombDiet进一步将此作为初始化阶段，再结合标准训练，利用头戴式婴儿视频或物体中心视频，提升模型性能。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，所有CATDiet变体在十个数据集的评估中（涵盖图像识别、纹理-形状冲突、深度分类等）均表现出增强的对象识别鲁棒性。模型还发展出与生物对齐的模式，如神经可塑性变化类似猴脑V1突触密度、行为响应类似婴儿视觉悬崖。CombDiet在物体中心或头戴婴儿视频训练后，在域内和域外对象识别及深度感知任务上优于标准自监督学习。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究主要贡献是证明了婴儿视觉发展作为反向工程框架的价值，能有效增强机器学习模型的视觉鲁棒性，为理解视觉智能涌现提供新视角。学术意义在于连接发展心理学与人工智能，实际应用可提升AI系统在多变环境下的性能；未来工作可扩展该方法到更多视觉任务，探索其在其他感官模态的应用潜力。

title: Parameter-Free Clustering via Self-Supervised Consensus Maximization (Extended Version)
abstract: Clustering is a fundamental task in unsupervised learning, but most existing methods heavily rely on hyperparameters such as the number of clusters or other sensitive settings, limiting their applicability in real-world scenarios. To address this long-standing challenge, we propose a novel and fully parameter-free clustering framework via Self-supervised Consensus Maximization, named SCMax. Our framework performs hierarchical agglomerative clustering and cluster evaluation in a single, integrated process. At each step of agglomeration, it creates a new, structure-aware data representation through a self-supervised learning task guided by the current clustering structure. We then introduce a nearest neighbor consensus score, which measures the agreement between the nearest neighbor-based merge decisions suggested by the original representation and the self-supervised one. The moment at which consensus maximization occurs can serve as a criterion for determining the optimal number of clusters. Extensive experiments on multiple datasets demonstrate that the proposed framework outperforms existing clustering approaches designed for scenarios with an unknown number of clusters.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出SCMax参数无关聚类框架，通过自监督共识最大化自动确定最优聚类数，解决了现有方法依赖超参数的问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 聚类作为无监督学习的基础任务，在实际应用中常面临聚类数量未知的挑战，因为真实场景如数据探索和模式识别中往往无法预设超参数。现有方法严重依赖聚类数量等敏感设置，导致适用性受限，需要人工干预，限制了自动化水平和泛化能力。因此，开发参数无关的聚类方法对于提高实用性和应对复杂数据至关重要，以克服现有技术的不足并推动无监督学习的发展。
light_analysis.method: SCMax框架在一个集成过程中执行层次凝聚聚类和自监督学习。其核心创新点在于：在凝聚步骤中，通过自监督任务基于当前聚类结构创建结构感知的数据表示，以捕捉内在模式；引入最近邻共识分数，衡量原始表示和自监督表示在基于最近邻的合并决策上的一致性，共识最大化的时刻作为停止标准，自动确定最优聚类数，从而实现完全参数无关的聚类，无需预设超参数。
light_analysis.result: 在多个数据集上的广泛实验表明，SCMax框架在未知聚类数量的场景中优于现有聚类方法。该框架通过自动推断聚类数并优化聚类质量，显示出更高的准确性和鲁棒性，减少了人工设置的需求。与基线方法相比，它在处理无先验知识的聚类任务时表现更佳，提升了整体性能，尽管摘要未提供具体数值指标，但验证了其有效性和实用性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出SCMax参数无关聚类框架，利用自监督学习和共识最大化自动确定聚类数，增强了聚类方法的实用性和泛化能力。该研究具有重要学术价值，推动了无监督学习向自适应方向发展，并在实际应用如数据分析和模式识别中具有潜力。未来工作可探索框架的扩展，例如处理更复杂数据结构或结合其他无监督任务，以进一步提升性能和应用范围。

title: DI3CL: Contrastive Learning With Dynamic Instances and Contour Consistency for SAR Land-Cover Classification Foundation Model
abstract: Although significant advances have been achieved in SAR land-cover classification, recent methods remain predominantly focused on supervised learning, which relies heavily on extensive labeled datasets. This dependency not only limits scalability and generalization but also restricts adaptability to diverse application scenarios. In this paper, a general-purpose foundation model for SAR land-cover classification is developed, serving as a robust cornerstone to accelerate the development and deployment of various downstream models. Specifically, a Dynamic Instance and Contour Consistency Contrastive Learning (DI3CL) pre-training framework is presented, which incorporates a Dynamic Instance (DI) module and a Contour Consistency (CC) module. DI module enhances global contextual awareness by enforcing local consistency across different views of the same region. CC module leverages shallow feature maps to guide the model to focus on the geometric contours of SAR land-cover objects, thereby improving structural discrimination. Additionally, to enhance robustness and generalization during pre-training, a large-scale and diverse dataset named SARSense, comprising 460,532 SAR images, is constructed to enable the model to capture comprehensive and representative features. To evaluate the generalization capability of our foundation model, we conducted extensive experiments across a variety of SAR land-cover classification tasks, including SAR land-cover mapping, water body detection, and road extraction. The results consistently demonstrate that the proposed DI3CL outperforms existing methods. Our code and pre-trained weights are publicly available at: https://github.com/SARpre-train/DI3CL.
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures;Accepted for publication in IEEE Transactions on Image Processing (TIP)

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了DI3CL框架，通过动态实例和轮廓一致性对比学习，构建了通用的SAR土地覆盖分类基础模型，提高泛化能力。
light_analysis.motivation: SAR土地覆盖分类虽然进展显著，但当前方法主要依赖于监督学习，这需要大量标记数据集。这种依赖性不仅限制了模型的可扩展性和泛化能力，还限制了其在多样应用场景中的适应性，如土地覆盖制图和目标检测。因此，需要一种更通用的基础模型来减少对标记数据的依赖，提升模型的鲁棒性和应用灵活性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出了DI3CL预训练框架，包括动态实例模块和轮廓一致性模块。动态实例模块通过强制执行同一区域不同视图的局部一致性来增强全局上下文意识；轮廓一致性模块则利用浅层特征图引导模型关注SAR土地覆盖对象的几何轮廓，从而提升结构区分能力。此外，构建了名为SARSense的大规模多样数据集，包含460,532张SAR图像，以增强预训练的鲁棒性和泛化性，帮助模型捕捉全面和代表性的特征。
light_analysis.result: 论文进行了广泛实验，评估了基础模型的泛化能力，包括SAR土地覆盖制图、水体检测和道路提取等多种任务。实验结果表明，提出的DI3CL框架一致地优于现有的方法。具体性能指标在摘要中未明确说明，但强调了其在多项任务中的优越性，表明该模型在泛化和适应不同下游任务方面表现出色。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了DI3CL预训练框架，构建了一个通用的SAR土地覆盖分类基础模型，显著提高了模型的泛化能力和鲁棒性。其学术价值在于将动态实例和轮廓一致性集成到对比学习中，优化了特征表示。实际应用中，该基础模型可作为稳健的基石，加速各种下游模型的开发和部署。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作，但该方法为无监督或自监督学习在SAR图像处理领域开辟了新方向。

title: Classification of Microplastic Particles in Water using Polarized Light Scattering and Machine Learning Methods
abstract: The detection and classification of microplastics in water remain a significant challenge due to their diverse properties and the limitations of traditional optical methods. Standard spectroscopic techniques often suffer from the strong infrared absorption of water, while many emerging optical approaches rely on transmission geometries that require sample transparency. This study presents a systematic classification framework utilizing 120 degree backscattering reflection polarimetry and deep learning to identify common polymers (HDPE, LDPE, and PP) directly in water. This backscattering-based approach is specifically designed to analyze opaque, irregularly shaped particles that lack distinguishable surface features under standard illumination. To ensure high-fidelity data, we introduce a feedback review loop to identify and remove outliers, which significantly stabilizes model training and improves generalization. This framework is validated on a dataset of 600 individually imaged microplastic fragments spanning three polymer types. Our results evaluate the distinct contributions of the Angle of Linear Polarization and the Degree of Linear Polarization to the classification process. By implementing a late fusion architecture to combine these signals, we achieve an average test accuracy of 83 percent. Finally, a systematic feature hierarchy analysis reveals that the convolutional neural network relies on internal polarization textures associated with the particle's microstructure, rather than on macro-contours, with classification accuracy declining by over 40 percent when internal structure is removed. This demonstrates that the system extracts polarization-dependent internal structural information that is inaccessible to conventional intensity-only imaging methods.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出了一种结合120度背散射反射偏振和深度学习的框架，用于直接分类水中的微塑料粒子，通过提取内部偏振纹理信息克服传统光学方法的局限性。
light_analysis.motivation: 水中微塑料检测和分类面临挑战，传统光学方法如光谱技术受水红外吸收影响，而新兴光学方法需要样品透明，不适用于不透明、不规则形状粒子。本研究旨在解决这些问题，提高分类准确性，应对环境监测中的实际需求。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法采用120度背散射反射偏振技术结合深度学习框架，利用卷积神经网络处理偏振信号，并通过反馈审查循环移除异常值以稳定训练。数据集包含600个微塑料片段（HDPE、LDPE、PP），采用晚期融合架构整合线偏振角和线偏振度信号优化分类。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示平均测试准确率达到83%，晚期融合架构有效结合线偏振角和线偏振度信号。特征分析表明CNN依赖内部偏振纹理，而非宏观轮廓；去除内部结构后分类准确率下降超过40%，验证了方法的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究贡献在于开发了能提取传统仅强度成像无法获取的内部结构信息的系统，提升了微塑料分类精度，具有学术价值和环境监测应用潜力。未来工作可扩展数据集或优化模型进一步改进性能。

title: MoEGCL: Mixture of Ego-Graphs Contrastive Representation Learning for Multi-View Clustering
abstract: In recent years, the advancement of Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) has significantly propelled progress in Multi-View Clustering (MVC). However, existing methods face the problem of coarse-grained graph fusion. Specifically, current approaches typically generate a separate graph structure for each view and then perform weighted fusion of graph structures at the view level, which is a relatively rough strategy. To address this limitation, we present a novel Mixture of Ego-Graphs Contrastive Representation Learning (MoEGCL). It mainly consists of two modules. In particular, we propose an innovative Mixture of Ego-Graphs Fusion (MoEGF), which constructs ego graphs and utilizes a Mixture-of-Experts network to implement fine-grained fusion of ego graphs at the sample level, rather than the conventional view-level fusion. Additionally, we present the Ego Graph Contrastive Learning (EGCL) module to align the fused representation with the view-specific representation. The EGCL module enhances the representation similarity of samples from the same cluster, not merely from the same sample, further boosting fine-grained graph representation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MoEGCL achieves state-of-the-art results in deep multi-view clustering tasks. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/HackerHyper/MoEGCL.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种基于混合自我图的对比表示学习方法，用于多视图聚类，通过样本级别的细粒度图形融合提升性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 多视图聚类中，现有方法常基于图神经网络，但面临粗粒度图形融合问题：它们通常在视图级别生成和加权融合图形结构，这种方法忽略了样本级别的细微关系，限制了聚类准确性。该问题重要，因为细粒度融合能更好捕捉多视图数据的内在关联，而当前方法未能有效实现，导致性能受限。现有不足包括缺乏样本导向的融合策略，需要更精细的技术来优化表示学习。
light_analysis.method: 方法提出MoEGCL，主要由两个模块组成：Mixture of Ego-Graphs Fusion（MoEGF）构建自我图，使用混合专家网络在样本级别而非视图级别进行细粒度融合；Ego Graph Contrastive Learning（EGCL）通过对比学习对齐融合表示与视图特定表示，增强相同聚类样本的相似性，而非仅相同样本，进一步提升表示质量。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型架构细节，但强调了样本级融合和对比学习的创新点。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，MoEGCL在多视图聚类任务中取得了最先进的性能，优于现有方法，证明了其在深度多视图聚类中的有效性。摘要未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升数据，但通过广泛实验验证了其优越性，暗示了在基准测试中可能带来的显著改进。与基线方法对比，该方法解决了粗粒度融合问题，从而提升了聚类效果，但具体数值需要参考完整论文。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出MoEGCL，解决了多视图聚类中的粗粒度图形融合问题，通过样本级别的细粒度融合和对比学习机制，显著提升了表示质量和聚类性能。其学术价值在于引入了新的融合策略和对比学习方法，推动了多视图表示学习的发展；实际应用价值在于可用于数据分析、图像处理和模式识别等领域。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向，但可能涉及扩展到更大规模数据集或进一步优化融合算法。

title: The Potential of Copernicus Satellites for Disaster Response: Retrieving Building Damage from Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2
abstract: Natural disasters demand rapid damage assessment to guide humanitarian response. Here, we investigate whether medium-resolution Earth observation images from the Copernicus program can support building damage assessment, complementing very-high resolution imagery with often limited availability. We introduce xBD-S12, a dataset of 10,315 pre- and post-disaster image pairs from both Sentinel-1 and Sentinel-2, spatially and temporally aligned with the established xBD benchmark. In a series of experiments, we demonstrate that building damage can be detected and mapped rather well in many disaster scenarios, despite the moderate 10$\,$m ground sampling distance. We also find that, for damage mapping at that resolution, architectural sophistication does not seem to bring much advantage: more complex model architectures tend to struggle with generalization to unseen disasters, and geospatial foundation models bring little practical benefit. Our results suggest that Copernicus images are a viable data source for rapid, wide-area damage assessment and could play an important role alongside VHR imagery. We release the xBD-S12 dataset, code, and trained models to support further research at https://github.com/prs-eth/xbd-s12 .

light_analysis.overview: 本文展示了Copernicus卫星Sentinel-1和Sentinel-2中分辨率图像在建筑物损坏评估中的潜力，并发布了xBD-S12数据集以支持相关研究。
light_analysis.motivation: 自然灾害发生后，快速评估建筑物损坏对于指导人道主义响应至关重要。现有方法主要依赖非常高分辨率（VHR）卫星图像，但这些图像可用性往往受限，难以实现大范围、及时的评估。因此，本研究旨在探索Copernicus计划的Sentinel-1和Sentinel-2中分辨率卫星图像作为替代或补充数据源的可行性，以解决VHR图像不足的问题，为灾害响应提供更广泛的数据支持，弥补现有方法在数据覆盖和获取速度上的缺陷。
light_analysis.method: 论文的核心方法是创建了xBD-S12数据集，包含10,315个Sentinel-1和Sentinel-2的灾前和灾后图像对，这些图像与现有的xBD基准数据集进行了空间和时间对齐。通过一系列实验，研究评估了不同模型架构在检测和映射建筑物损坏时的性能，特别关注复杂模型和地理空间基础模型的泛化能力。关键创新点在于利用中分辨率图像进行损坏评估，并探索模型在未见灾难场景中的表现，以确定最优技术路线。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，尽管Sentinel-1和Sentinel-2图像具有10米的中等分辨率，建筑物损坏在许多灾难场景中可以被较好地检测和映射。研究发现，复杂模型架构在泛化到新灾难时容易过拟合，表现不佳；而地理空间基础模型在实际应用中未带来显著优势，摘要未明确说明具体性能指标，但与基线方法相比，表明简单模型可能更有效，为实际应用提供了数据支持和指导。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的结论是Copernicus卫星图像是快速、广域建筑物损坏评估的可行数据源，可以补充高分辨率图像的不足，具有重要的实际应用价值。主要贡献包括验证了中分辨率图像的实用性，并发布了xBD-S12数据集、代码和训练模型，以促进学术研究和灾害响应实践。未来工作可聚焦于优化模型以提高泛化性和效率，克服现有局限性，进一步推动地球观测技术在紧急情况下的应用。

title: UniAVGen: Unified Audio and Video Generation with Asymmetric Cross-Modal Interactions
abstract: Due to the lack of effective cross-modal modeling, existing open-source audio-video generation methods often exhibit compromised lip synchronization and insufficient semantic consistency. To mitigate these drawbacks, we propose UniAVGen, a unified framework for joint audio and video generation. UniAVGen is anchored in a dual-branch joint synthesis architecture, incorporating two parallel Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) to build a cohesive cross-modal latent space. At its heart lies an Asymmetric Cross-Modal Interaction mechanism, which enables bidirectional, temporally aligned cross-attention, thus ensuring precise spatiotemporal synchronization and semantic consistency. Furthermore, this cross-modal interaction is augmented by a Face-Aware Modulation module, which dynamically prioritizes salient regions in the interaction process. To enhance generative fidelity during inference, we additionally introduce Modality-Aware Classifier-Free Guidance, a novel strategy that explicitly amplifies cross-modal correlation signals. Notably, UniAVGen's robust joint synthesis design enables seamless unification of pivotal audio-video tasks within a single model, such as joint audio-video generation and continuation, video-to-audio dubbing, and audio-driven video synthesis. Comprehensive experiments validate that, with far fewer training samples (1.3M vs. 30.1M), UniAVGen delivers overall advantages in audio-video synchronization, timbre consistency, and emotion consistency.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出了 UniAVGen，一个通过非对称跨模态交互机制实现统一音视频生成的框架，提升同步和语义一致性。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有开源音视频生成方法由于缺乏有效的跨模态建模，常导致唇音同步受损和语义一致性不足，这限制了生成内容的质量和应用范围。这些问题影响了音视频合成任务的实用性，如视频配音和音频驱动视频。因此，研究旨在开发更高效的跨模态交互技术，以改进音视频生成中的同步和一致性，推动多模态内容生成技术的发展。
light_analysis.method: UniAVGen 采用双分支联合合成架构，基于两个平行的 Diffusion Transformers 构建跨模态潜在空间。核心创新是非对称跨模态交互机制，通过双向时间对齐的跨注意确保时空同步和语义一致性。此外，面部感知调制模块在交互过程中动态优先显著区域，而模态感知的无分类器指导策略在推理时增强跨模态相关性。这些技术共同优化了音视频生成的准确性和保真度。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，UniAVGen 仅使用 1.3M 训练样本，相比基线方法的 30.1M，在音视频同步、音色一致性和情感一致性方面展现出总体优势。这证明了其更高的数据效率和跨模态建模的有效性，尽管具体性能指标如准确率摘要未明确说明，但实验验证了模型在关键一致性指标上的改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是提出 UniAVGen 框架，通过非对称跨模态交互等技术，显著提升音视频生成的同步和语义一致性。学术价值在于推动多模态生成模型的进步，实际应用中可实现联合音视频生成、视频配音等任务集成。潜在局限性可能包括计算复杂度，未来工作可能涉及模型优化或扩展到更多模态场景。

title: Phased DMD: Few-step Distribution Matching Distillation via Score Matching within Subintervals
abstract: Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) distills score-based generative models into efficient one-step generators, without requiring a one-to-one correspondence with the sampling trajectories of their teachers. Yet, the limited capacity of one-step distilled models compromises generative diversity and degrades performance in complex generative tasks, e.g., generating intricate object motions in text-to-video task. Directly extending DMD to multi-step distillation increases memory usage and computational depth, leading to instability and reduced efficiency. While prior works propose stochastic gradient truncation as a potential solution, we observe that it substantially reduces the generative diversity in text-to-image generation and slows motion dynamics in video generation, reducing performance to the level of one-step models. To address these limitations, we propose Phased DMD, a multi-step distillation framework that bridges the idea of phase-wise distillation with Mixture-of-Experts (MoE), reducing learning difficulty while enhancing model capacity. Phased DMD incorporates two key ideas: progressive distribution matching and score matching within subintervals. First, our model divides the SNR range into subintervals, progressively refining the model to higher SNR levels, to better capture complex distributions. Next, to ensure accurate training within each subinterval, we derive rigorous mathematical formulations for the objective. We validate Phased DMD by distilling state-of-the-art image and video generation models, including Qwen-Image-20B and Wan2.2-28B. Experiments demonstrate that Phased DMD enhances motion dynamics, improves visual fidelity in video generation, and increases output diversity in image generation. Our code and models are available at https://x-niper.github.io/projects/Phased-DMD/.

light_analysis.overview: 本论文提出Phased DMD多步蒸馏框架，结合分阶段蒸馏和子区间得分匹配，以提升生成模型的多样性和性能。
light_analysis.motivation: Distribution Matching Distillation (DMD) 蒸馏得分基础生成模型为高效一步生成器，但在复杂生成任务如文本到视频生成中，一步模型容量有限，导致生成多样性和性能下降。直接扩展至多步蒸馏会增加内存和计算深度，引发不稳定和效率问题。现有方法如随机梯度截断虽尝试解决，却显著减少生成多样性和减慢运动动态，性能降至一步模型水平。因此，需开发新方法以平衡蒸馏效率与生成质量。
light_analysis.method: Phased DMD融合分阶段蒸馏与Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)概念，核心创新为渐进分布匹配和子区间内得分匹配。首先，模型将信噪比（SNR）范围划分为子区间，逐步细化模型至更高SNR，以更有效捕获复杂分布。其次，为每个子区间推导严格的数学公式，确保训练目标准确性。这减少学习难度，同时增强模型容量，并利用分阶段策略优化多步蒸馏过程。
light_analysis.result: 实验验证使用先进图像和视频生成模型，如Qwen-Image-20B和Wan2.2-28B。Phased DMD在视频生成中增强运动动态和提高视觉保真度，在图像生成中增加输出多样性。与基线方法相比，它改善了一步模型的性能，并避免多步蒸馏中的不稳定和效率损失。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率提升百分比，但基于描述推断性能显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: Phased DMD为多步蒸馏提供创新框架，显著提升生成多样性和性能，尤其适用于文本到视频等复杂任务。其学术价值在于结合分阶段蒸馏和MoE，为生成模型蒸馏开辟新方向。实际应用价值在于提高生成效率和质量，但潜在局限性如计算复杂度或泛化能力未明确说明，未来工作可扩展至更多任务或进一步优化框架设计。

title: Do Vision-Language Models Measure Up? Benchmarking Visual Measurement Reading with MeasureBench
abstract: Reading measurement instruments is effortless for humans and requires relatively little domain expertise, yet it remains surprisingly challenging for current vision-language models (VLMs) as we find in preliminary evaluation. In this work, we introduce MeasureBench, a benchmark on visual measurement reading covering both real-world and synthesized images of various types of measurements, along with an extensible pipeline for data synthesis. Our pipeline procedurally generates a specified type of gauge with controllable visual appearance, enabling scalable variation in key details such as pointers, scales, fonts, lighting, and clutter. Evaluation on popular proprietary and open-weight VLMs shows that even the strongest frontier VLMs struggle with measurement reading in general. We have also conducted preliminary experiments with reinforcement finetuning (RFT) over synthetic data, and find a significant improvement on both in-domain synthetic subset and real-world images. Our analysis highlights a fundamental limitation of current VLMs in fine-grained spatial grounding. We hope this resource and our code releases can help future advances on visually grounded numeracy and precise spatial perception of VLMs, bridging the gap between recognizing numbers and measuring the world.

light_analysis.overview: 引入 MeasureBench 基准测试和数据合成流程，评估视觉语言模型在视觉测量读取中的性能，并利用强化微调提升效果。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视觉语言模型在读取测量仪器方面表现不佳，尽管这对人类来说相对容易且只需少量领域知识。这个问题重要，因为视觉测量读取是许多实际应用（如工业自动化、监控）的基础，但现有方法存在不足：VLMs 在细粒度空间基础和精确数值感知方面有根本限制，导致在实际任务中准确率低，无法满足精确测量需求。摘要未明确说明现有方法的具体缺陷，但强调了挑战性和局限性。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出 MeasureBench，一个涵盖真实世界和合成图像的视觉测量读取基准。核心方法是开发了一个可扩展的数据合成管道，能够程序化生成指定类型的测量仪器，并控制视觉细节如指针、刻度、字体、光照和杂波。此外，通过强化微调（RFT）在合成数据上进行实验，以提升模型性能。关键创新点在于可扩展的合成数据生成和 RFT 的应用，尽管摘要未详细说明模型架构等细节。
light_analysis.result: 评估结果显示，即使是当前最先进的视觉语言模型，在视觉测量读取任务中也普遍表现不佳。通过强化微调（RFT）在合成数据上进行实验后，模型在领域内合成子集和真实世界图像上都取得了显著提升。摘要未提供具体数据指标（如准确率数字），但强调了该方法在弥补 VLMs 不足方面的有效性，与基线方法相比显示出改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是引入了 MeasureBench 基准测试和数据合成流程，为视觉语言模型在测量读取任务上的评估提供了资源。研究的意义在于识别了 VLMs 在细粒度空间基础方面的根本限制，并通过实验展示了强化微调的潜力。这有助于推动 VLMs 在视觉基础数字能力和精确空间感知方面的进步，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可进一步探索数据合成和模型优化，以缩小识别数字和测量世界之间的差距。

title: Gaze-VLM:Bridging Gaze and VLMs through Attention Regularization for Egocentric Understanding
abstract: Eye gaze offers valuable cues about attention, short-term intent, and future actions, making it a powerful signal for modeling egocentric behavior. In this work, we propose a gaze-regularized framework that enhances VLMs for two key egocentric understanding tasks: fine-grained future event prediction and current activity understanding. Unlike prior approaches that rely solely on visual inputs or use gaze as an auxiliary input signal , our method uses gaze only during training. We introduce a gaze-regularized attention mechanism that aligns model focus with human visual gaze. This design is flexible and modular, allowing it to generalize across multiple VLM architectures that utilize attention. Experimental results show that our approach improves semantic prediction scores by up to 11 for future event prediction and around 7 for current activity understanding, compared to the corresponding baseline models trained without gaze regularization. These results highlight the value of gaze-guided training in improving the accuracy and robustness of egocentric VLMs. Overall, this work establishes a foundation for using human gaze to enhance the predictive capabilities of VLMs in real-world scenarios like assistive robots and human-machine collaboration. Code and additional information is available at: https://github.com/anupampani/Gaze-VLM

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出一种通过注意力正则化将人类凝视与视觉语言模型对齐的框架，以增强自我中心理解任务。
light_analysis.motivation: 在自我中心理解任务中，人类凝视能提供关于注意力、短期意图和未来行为的宝贵线索，这对辅助机器人和人机协作等现实应用至关重要。现有方法要么仅依赖视觉输入，要么在推理时将凝视作为辅助信号，导致灵活性不足和性能限制。本研究旨在利用凝视数据在训练阶段引导模型，解决VLMs在精细未来事件预测和当前活动理解中的不足，以提高模型在复杂场景中的准确性和鲁棒性，从而推动实际应用的进步。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出一种凝视正则化框架，通过设计注意力正则化机制，在训练阶段对齐模型关注点与人类视觉凝视。该方法仅在训练时使用凝视数据，而不改变推理架构，确保灵活性和模块化，可集成到多种使用注意力机制的VLM中。关键创新点在于避免在推理时依赖凝视，提升了通用性。摘要未明确说明使用的具体数据集或模型细节，但强调了该框架适用于现有VLM架构，通过正则化损失函数优化模型注意力分布。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，与未使用凝视正则化的基线模型相比，本方法在未来事件预测任务中语义预测得分提升了高达11点，在当前活动理解任务中提升了约7点。这些改进显著提高了VLMs的准确性和鲁棒性，验证了凝视引导训练的有效性。具体数据虽未提供基线得分，但提升幅度突出了方法在强化模型预测能力方面的优势，表明凝视正则化能有效对齐模型与人类注意力模式。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究通过凝视正则化框架为利用人类凝视增强视觉语言模型的预测能力奠定了基础，主要贡献在于提出了一种模块化、仅训练时使用凝视的方法。学术上，它展示了凝视数据在提升VLM性能中的价值；实际上，可应用于辅助机器人、人机协作等场景，提高模型在实际环境中的适应性。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多任务、优化正则化策略，并探索在其他VLM架构中的泛化能力，以进一步推动领域发展。

title: Background Fades, Foreground Leads: Curriculum-Guided Background Pruning for Efficient Foreground-Centric Collaborative Perception
abstract: Collaborative perception enhances the reliability and spatial coverage of autonomous vehicles by sharing complementary information across vehicles, offering a promising solution to long-tail scenarios that challenge single-vehicle perception. However, the bandwidth constraints of vehicular networks make transmitting the entire feature map impractical. Recent methods, therefore, adopt a foreground-centric paradigm, transmitting only predicted foreground-region features while discarding the background, which encodes essential context. We propose FadeLead, a foreground-centric framework that overcomes this limitation by learning to encapsulate background context into compact foreground features during training. At the core of our design is a curricular learning strategy that leverages background cues early on but progressively prunes them away, forcing the model to internalize context into foreground representations without transmitting background itself. Extensive experiments on both simulated and real-world benchmarks show that FadeLead outperforms prior methods under different bandwidth settings, underscoring the effectiveness of context-enriched foreground sharing.

light_analysis.overview: 提出FadeLead框架，通过课程学习策略将背景上下文封装到前景特征中，实现高效的前景中心协作感知。
light_analysis.motivation: 协作感知通过车辆间共享互补信息增强自动驾驶车辆的可靠性和空间覆盖，是应对长尾场景的有效方案。然而，车载网络带宽限制使得传输完整特征图不切实际。现有方法采用前景中心范式，仅传输前景区域特征，但丢弃了包含重要上下文的背景信息，导致感知性能受限，因为背景上下文对准确感知至关重要，需要在带宽受限下优化信息保留。
light_analysis.method: FadeLead框架采用课程学习策略，在训练过程中逐步剪枝背景信息，迫使模型将背景上下文内化到紧凑的前景特征中。早期训练阶段利用背景线索，随着训练进行，逐渐减少背景依赖，使模型学习将上下文编码到前景表示中，而无需传输背景本身。该方法的核心创新在于课程引导的背景剪枝机制，优化了特征共享的效率和上下文保留能力。摘要未明确说明具体数据集或模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在模拟和真实世界基准测试中，FadeLead在不同带宽设置下均优于先前方法。实验结果表明，通过上下文丰富的前景特征共享，FadeLead显著提高了协作感知性能，突显了其在多种条件下的有效性和稳健性。摘要未明确说明具体指标如准确率提升，但强调了框架在带宽受限场景中的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: FadeLead通过课程学习策略有效解决了协作感知中带宽限制下的上下文保留问题，提高了感知效率和可靠性，为自动驾驶系统在复杂环境中的应用提供了理论支持。这项研究的学术价值在于提出了一种新颖的特征共享方法，实际应用价值在于增强自动驾驶的稳健性。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多场景或集成其他感知技术。

title: On-device Semantic Selection Made Low Latency and Memory Efficient with Monolithic Forwarding
abstract: Semantic top-K selection with cross-encoder rerankers underpins on-device AI services, such as retrieval-augmented generation, agent memory, and personalized recommendation. However, its latency and memory demands dominate end-to-end budgets on edge hardware. Revisiting the objective of top-K selection, we reveal that only relative rankings matter, not exact per-candidate scores. We further observe sequence-level sparsity: relative rankings progressively stabilize in intermediate layers, enabling early pruning prior to completing full inference.   Building on this insight, we propose monolithic forwarding and develop a training-free inference system, PRISM. By maintaining a global view of all candidates, it reduces latency through progressive cluster pruning. It also bounds peak memory usage by strategically overlapping I/O with computation via overlapped layer streaming and chunked execution. We evaluate PRISM against state-of-the-art baselines on rerankers from 0.6 B to 8 B parameters across Apple M2 and RTX 5070. PRISM consistently reduces latency by up to 89.2% and peak memory by up to 91.3% in microbenchmarks, without compromising precision. Across three real-world on-device AI applications, PRISM lowers latency by 11.6%-51.0% and peak memory by 18.6%-77.8%, demonstrating substantial improvements in efficiency and deployability.

light_analysis.overview: 提出PRISM系统，通过全局候选视图和渐进式剪枝，实现低延迟和内存高效的设备语义选择。
light_analysis.motivation: 设备AI服务中的语义top-K选择支撑检索增强生成、代理内存和个性化推荐等应用，但现有方法在边缘硬件上导致高延迟和高内存占用。研究动机在于传统方法过度依赖候选的具体分数，而实际应用中只有相对排名关键，这引发不必要的计算。此外，序列级稀疏性未被有效利用，进一步加剧了效率和可部署性挑战，迫切需要优化推理过程。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出monolithic forwarding方法，开发训练无关的推理系统PRISM。核心基于相对排名和序列级稀疏性洞察，通过维护全局候选视图实现渐进式聚类剪枝，减少延迟。关键技术包括重叠层流和分块执行，以重叠I/O与计算，限制峰值内存使用。系统针对参数范围从0.6B到8B的cross-encoder rerankers进行优化，在Apple M2和RTX 5070硬件上评估。
light_analysis.result: 在微基准测试中，PRISM在Apple M2和RTX 5070上将延迟降低高达89.2%，峰值内存降低高达91.3%，且不损害精度。与最先进基线相比，在三个真实世界设备AI应用中，延迟减少11.6%-51.0%，内存减少18.6%-77.8%。这些结果证实了PRISM在效率和可部署性方面的显著改进。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是PRISM系统，通过monolithic forwarding揭示了相对排名和序列级稀疏性的重要性，优化了语义选择推理。学术上增强了对在设备AI机制的理解，实际应用上提升了边缘服务的效率和部署能力。未来工作方向可能涉及扩展到更多模型类型和实际应用场景，以进一步验证通用性。

title: GUIrilla: A Scalable Framework for Automated Desktop UI Exploration
abstract: The performance and generalization of foundation models for interactive systems critically depend on the availability of large-scale, realistic training data. While recent advances in large language models (LLMs) have improved GUI understanding, progress in desktop automation remains constrained by the scarcity of high-quality, publicly available desktop interaction data, particularly for macOS. We introduce GUIRILLA, a scalable data crawling framework for automated exploration of desktop GUIs. GUIRILLA is not an autonomous agent; instead, it systematically collects realistic interaction traces and accessibility metadata intended to support the training, evaluation, and stabilization of downstream foundation models and GUI agents. The framework targets macOS, a largely underrepresented platform in existing resources, and organizes explored interfaces into hierarchical MacApp Trees derived from accessibility states and user actions. As part of this work, we release these MacApp Trees as a reusable structural representation of macOS applications, enabling downstream analysis, retrieval, testing, and future agent training. We additionally release macapptree, an open-source library for reproducible accessibility-driven GUI data collection, along with the full framework implementation to support open research in desktop autonomy.
comment: Accepted to the 3rd DATA-FM Workshop @ ICLR 2026

light_analysis.overview: GUIRILLA框架通过自动化探索macOS桌面GUI，生成大规模交互数据和结构表示，支持下游基础模型训练。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决桌面自动化中高质量训练数据稀缺的问题，尤其在macOS平台。基础模型的性能和泛化能力依赖大规模现实数据，但现有资源中macOS数据代表性不足，限制了大型语言模型在GUI理解方面的进展，因此开发可扩展数据收集框架至关重要。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出GUIRILLA框架，一个可扩展的数据抓取框架，用于自动探索macOS桌面GUI。它系统收集交互痕迹和可访问性元数据，并将接口组织为分层MacApp树，基于可访问性状态和用户动作。同时发布了macapptree开源库，支持可重现的GUI数据收集，为下游模型提供结构表示。
light_analysis.result: 摘要未明确说明具体的实验结果和性能指标。论文主要介绍了框架的设计和发布，包括MacApp树结构和开源工具，旨在为下游模型提供数据支持，但未提供与基线方法的对比或量化效果。通过发布工具促进了开放研究，但量化效果需进一步实验验证。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是GUIRILLA框架，它解决了macOS桌面GUI数据稀缺问题，并发布了可重用结构表示MacApp树和开源库。学术上，推动了桌面自主性研究；实际上，为训练和评估基础模型提供了高质量资源。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他操作系统或优化数据收集效率。

title: Information Gain-based Policy Optimization: A Simple and Effective Approach for Multi-Turn Search Agents
abstract: Large language model (LLM)-based agents are increasingly trained with reinforcement learning (RL) to enhance their ability to interact with external environments through tool use, particularly in search-based settings that require multi-turn reasoning and knowledge acquisition. However, existing approaches typically rely on outcome-based rewards that are only provided exclusively upon generating the final answer. This reward sparsity becomes particularly problematic in multi-turn settings, where long trajectories exacerbate three critical issues: (i) advantage collapse, where all rollouts receive identical rewards and provide no useful learning signals; (ii) lack of fine-grained credit assignment, where the correctness of intermediate turns is obscured, especially in long-horizon tasks; and (iii) poor sample efficiency, where each rollout yields only a single outcome signal, leading to low data utilization. In this paper, we propose Information Gain-based Policy Optimization (IGPO), a simple yet effective RL framework that provides dense and intrinsic supervision for multi-turn agent training. IGPO models each interaction turn as an incremental process of acquiring information about the ground truth, and defines turn-level rewards as the marginal increase in the policy's probability of producing the correct answer. Unlike prior process-level reward approaches that depend on external reward models or costly Monte Carlo estimation, IGPO derives intrinsic rewards directly from the model's own belief updates. These intrinsic turn-level rewards are combined with outcome-level supervision to form dense reward signals. Extensive experiments on both in-domain and out-of-domain benchmarks demonstrate that IGPO consistently outperforms strong baselines in multi-turn scenarios, achieving higher accuracy and improved data efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/GuoqingWang1/IGPO.

light_analysis.overview: 提出信息增益策略优化（IGPO），一个简单有效的强化学习框架，通过内在轮级奖励缓解多轮搜索代理中的奖励稀疏问题。
light_analysis.motivation: 基于大型语言模型的代理在多轮搜索设置中训练时，现有强化学习方法通常依赖基于结果的奖励，仅在生成最终答案时提供，导致奖励稀疏。这引发了优势崩溃、缺乏细粒度信用分配和样本效率低下的问题，尤其是在长轨迹多轮任务中，限制了代理在推理和知识获取中的性能，因此需要一种能提供密集监督的方法来改进训练过程。
light_analysis.method: IGPO框架将每次交互轮建模为获取真实答案信息的增量过程，并定义轮级奖励为策略产生正确答案概率的边际增加。它直接从模型自身信念更新中导出内在奖励，无需外部奖励模型或昂贵的蒙特卡洛估计，然后结合结果级监督形成密集奖励信号，为多轮代理训练提供简单而有效的学习信号。
light_analysis.result: 在域内和域外基准测试中，IGPO在多轮搜索代理任务中一致优于强基线方法，实现了更高的准确性和改进的数据效率。实验结果表明，该框架能有效缓解奖励稀疏问题，提升代理的学习效果，但摘要未提供具体的性能指标数值。
light_analysis.conclusion: IGPO的主要贡献是提出了一种基于信息增益的策略优化方法，为多轮代理训练提供密集内在监督，从而提高准确性和效率。这为强化学习在多轮推理应用中提供了新思路，具有学术和实际应用价值，但摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作方向。

title: Guided Star-Shaped Masked Diffusion
abstract: The performance of pre-trained masked diffusion models is often constrained by their sampling procedure, which makes decisions irreversible and struggles in low-step generation regimes. We introduce a novel sampling algorithm that works with pre-trained models and, after a lightweight fine-tuning of a single layer, significantly improves sample quality and efficiency. Our method reformulates the generation process using a star-shaped paradigm, which inherently allows for error correction. To make this process effective, we augment it with a learnable re-masking scheduler that intelligently identifies and revises likely errors. This approach yields a substantial quality boost, particularly when using a small number of sampling steps. We extensively ablate key components of our approach and show its usability in different scenarios. In comprehensive experiments on text, and code generation, our sampling algorithm outperforms or matches existing methods.

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了一种新型采样算法，结合星形范式和可学习重新掩码调度器，显著提升掩码扩散模型的采样质量和效率。
light_analysis.motivation: 掩码扩散模型在生成任务中应用广泛，但其采样过程存在决策不可逆的局限性，导致在低步数生成时性能下降，影响实际应用中的效率。现有采样方法往往缺乏灵活性，无法动态修正错误，使得模型在资源受限场景下表现不佳。该研究旨在解决这一问题，通过优化采样过程来提高模型在快速生成中的实用性。
light_analysis.method: 该方法核心是采用星形范式重新公式化生成过程，该范式允许采样决策可逆，天然支持错误修正。进一步引入一个可学习的重新掩码调度器，该调度器能够智能识别潜在错误并动态调整掩码策略，以优化采样路径。算法与预训练的掩码扩散模型兼容，只需对模型中单个层进行轻量级微调，无需大规模重构模型。关键技术特色包括星形结构的自适应修正机制和高效调度器设计，适用于文本和代码生成等场景。
light_analysis.result: 在文本和代码生成的综合实验中，该采样算法表现出优异性能。实验结果表明，特别是在低步数生成时，该方法能显著提升样本质量，优于或匹配现有采样方法。摘要未明确说明具体准确率或效率提升数据，但强调了在少量采样步数下的质量优势，这表明算法有效解决了采样效率与质量之间的平衡问题，并验证了其在不同生成任务中的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一种改进的采样算法，通过星形范式和可学习重新掩码调度器，解决了掩码扩散模型采样中的不可逆问题，提升了生成效率和样本质量。学术价值在于扩展了扩散模型的应用潜力，实际应用价值体现在代码和文本生成等任务中能实现更快速、高质量的生成。摘要未明确说明研究的局限性或未来工作方向，但可以推断未来可能包括优化调度器设计或扩展到更多领域。

title: Counterfactual Identifiability via Dynamic Optimal Transport
abstract: We address the open question of counterfactual identification for high-dimensional multivariate outcomes from observational data. Pearl (2000) argues that counterfactuals must be identifiable (i.e., recoverable from the observed data distribution) to justify causal claims. A recent line of work on counterfactual inference shows promising results but lacks identification, undermining the causal validity of its estimates. To address this, we establish a foundation for multivariate counterfactual identification using continuous-time flows, including non-Markovian settings under standard criteria. We characterise the conditions under which flow matching yields a unique, monotone, and rank-preserving counterfactual transport map with tools from dynamic optimal transport, ensuring consistent inference. Building on this, we validate the theory in controlled scenarios with counterfactual ground-truth and demonstrate improvements in axiomatic counterfactual soundness on real images.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文通过动态最优传输提出了一种高维多变量反事实识别方法，确保反事实推断的因果有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 反事实识别是从观察数据推断因果效应的核心问题，但在高维多变量场景下，现有方法常缺乏严格的识别性，导致因果估计不可靠，削弱了因果主张的可信度。该研究旨在解决这一开放问题，通过建立理论基础，确保在标准条件下反事实推断具有统计和因果有效性，以提升因果机器学习的实践应用。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出基于连续时间流和动态最优传输的框架，利用flow matching技术，在满足标准条件下生成唯一的、单调的、秩保持的反事实传输映射。核心创新点包括结合动态最优传输工具来表征识别条件，支持非马尔可夫设置，确保反事实推断的一致性，为多变量结果提供可靠的技术路线。
light_analysis.result: 研究通过控制场景中的反事实真值验证了理论，并在真实图像数据上展示了反事实正确性的改进。摘要未明确说明具体性能指标如准确率，但提到相对于基线方法，该方法在因果推断方面有提升，增强了反事实识别的可靠性和应用效果。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文为多变量反事实识别提供了理论基础，通过动态最优传输确保了因果推断的可靠性，对因果机器学习领域有重要学术价值。实际应用可扩展到图像处理等场景。局限性包括摘要未详细讨论复杂性，未来工作可能涉及扩展至更广泛的非参数设置和算法优化。

title: BIRD-INTERACT: Re-imagining Text-to-SQL Evaluation for Large Language Models via Lens of Dynamic Interactions
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable performance on single-turn text-to-SQL tasks, but real-world database applications predominantly require multi-turn interactions to handle ambiguous queries, execution errors, and evolving user requirements. Existing multi-turn benchmarks fall short by treating conversation histories as static context or limiting evaluation to read-only operations, failing to reflect production-grade database assistant challenges. We introduce BIRD-INTERACT, a benchmark that restores this realism through: (1) a comprehensive interaction environment coupling each database with a hierarchical knowledge base, metadata files, and a function-driven user simulator, enabling models to solicit clarifications, retrieve knowledge, and recover from errors without human supervision; (2) two evaluation settings consisting of a pre-defined conversational protocol (c-Interact) and an open-ended agentic setting (a-Interact) where models autonomously decide when to query the user simulator or explore the environment; (3) a challenging task suite covering the full CRUD spectrum for business-intelligence and operational use cases, guarded by executable test cases. Each task features ambiguous and follow-up sub-tasks requiring dynamic interaction. The suite comprises BIRD-INTERACT-FULL (600 tasks, up to 11,796 interactions) for comprehensive performance assessment, and BIRD-INTERACT-LITE (300 tasks with simplified databases) for detailed behavioral analysis and rapid method development. Our empirical results highlight BIRD-INTERACT's difficulty: GPT-5 completes only 8.67% of tasks in c-Interact and 17.00% in a-Interact. Analysis via memory grafting and Interaction Test-time Scaling validates the importance of effective interaction for complex, dynamic text-to-SQL tasks.
comment: ICLR 2026 Oral. Dataset and code available at https://bird-interact.github.io

light_analysis.overview: 本文提出了BIRD-INTERACT基准，通过动态交互环境重新定义大型语言模型在文本到SQL任务中的评估。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在单轮文本到SQL任务中表现出色，但现实数据库应用需要多轮交互来处理模糊查询、执行错误和变化需求。现有多轮基准如BIRD将对话历史视为静态上下文或限制为只读操作，无法反映生产级数据库助手的真实挑战。因此，研究动机是开发更现实的评估框架，以捕捉动态交互中的复杂性和适应性需求，解决现有方法在模拟真实场景时的不足。
light_analysis.method: BIRD-INTERACT基准包括三个核心部分：综合交互环境（结合数据库、层次知识库、元数据文件和用户模拟器），使模型能自主请求澄清、检索知识和从错误恢复；两种评估设置：c-Interact（预定义对话协议）和a-Interact（开放式代理设置），模型可自主决定交互时机；任务套件覆盖完整CRUD操作，包含模糊和后续子任务，需要动态交互。套件有BIRD-INTERACT-FULL（600任务）和BIRD-INTERACT-LITE（300任务）版本，分别用于全面评估和快速方法开发。关键创新在于模拟真实交互环境和代理自主决策机制。
light_analysis.result: 实证结果突出BIRD-INTERACT的难度：GPT-5在c-Interact设置中仅完成8.67%的任务，在a-Interact中完成17.00%。通过记忆嫁接和交互测试时间缩放分析，验证了有效交互对复杂动态文本到SQL任务的重要性。摘要未明确说明与其他基线的具体对比，但强调了基准的挑战性，表明现有LLMs在动态交互场景中表现有限，突显了改进交互策略的必要性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了BIRD-INTERACT基准，重新定义了文本到SQL评估，强调动态交互的现实性。其学术价值在于填补多轮交互基准的空白，推动LLMs在实际数据库应用中的发展；实际应用价值在于帮助开发更智能的数据库助手，提升处理模糊性和错误的能力。局限性可能包括基准的复杂性，未来工作可探索更高效的交互策略和模型优化，以提升性能。

title: POVQA: Preference-Optimized Video Question Answering with Rationales for Data Efficiency
abstract: Video Question Answering (VQA) with Large Vision Language Models (LVLMs) has gained significant traction in research ever since the Flamingo was introduced by Deepmind. Recent advancements in large context/long video question answering have allowed VQA tasks to have context window of 1500+ frames. However, this only leads to 50 seconds of video footage without losing any significant information. We introduce POVQA, a data-efficient pipeline that compresses each second of video into a single temporally pooled image (via motion blur and weighted averaging variants) and then align LVLMs with lightweight supervision. Concretely, we build 1 fps input sources using Blend Blur with Last Frame, Weighted Average, Exponential and Ramp pooling and fine-tune QWEN-2.5-VL 7B with supervised two turn target including reasoning and final answer. We apply Supervised Fine Tuning (SFT) and Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) on our novel dataset ReasonVQA consisting of 12 movies with 239 human annotated question-answer with reasoning prompts. On our ReasonVQA dataset, this method dramatically improves performance over pooled baselines: F1 score improves from 0.212 to 0.543, BLEU-4 from 0.031 to 0.291, and ROUGE-L from 0.196 to 0.528. Rationale quality also significantly increases. Cross-evaluation of SFT + DPO on various pooling functions show that the gains persist regardless of the pooling scheme used at train or test time, indicating strong robustness on summarization of temporal evidence. Similar observations were made on zero-shot in TVQA.
comment: Accepted in MAR at CVPR Workshop (Proceedings Track)

light_analysis.overview: POVQA 提出了一种数据高效的视频问答管道，通过时间池化压缩视频并利用监督微调和直接偏好优化来提高性能。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型视觉语言模型在视频问答任务中的广泛应用，处理长视频时面临数据效率和上下文窗口限制的挑战。现有方法虽然能处理多帧视频，但通常导致信息压缩不足或计算资源浪费，例如上下文窗口扩展仅能覆盖约50秒视频内容，难以平衡效率与精度。本研究旨在解决视频数据的高效压缩和问答任务中的推理质量提升问题，通过开发更优的数据处理管道来减少资源需求并增强模型性能，特别是在保持时间证据完整性方面。
light_analysis.method: POVQA 的核心方法包括两个主要步骤：首先，将每秒视频压缩为单一时间池化图像，使用运动模糊和加权平均变体（如 Blend Blur with Last Frame、Weighted Average、Exponential 和 Ramp pooling）构建1 fps的输入源。其次，在 ReasonVQA 数据集上应用监督微调（SFT）和直接偏好优化（DPO），微调 QWEN-2.5-VL 7B 模型，训练目标包含两轮：推理过程和最终答案生成。数据集包含12部电影和239个人工标注的问题-答案对，带有推理提示，以轻量级监督方式优化模型对齐。
light_analysis.result: 在 ReasonVQA 数据集上，POVQA 方法显著提升了性能指标：F1 分数从基线 0.212 提高到 0.543，BLEU-4 从 0.031 提高到 0.291，ROUGE-L 从 0.196 提高到 0.528，同时推理质量也大幅改善。交叉评估显示，SFT + DPO 在不同池化函数上均能保持增益，表明该方法在时间证据总结上具有强鲁棒性，不受训练或测试时池化方案的影响。在 TVQA 数据集上的零样本评估也观察到类似性能提升，进一步验证了方法的泛化能力。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是开发了 POVQA 管道，通过视频压缩和优化技术实现了数据高效的视频问答，显著提升了问答准确性和推理质量。学术上，它创新性地结合了池化方法与偏好优化，推动了视频理解领域的发展；实际上，可应用于视频内容分析和智能问答系统，提高处理效率。未来工作可能包括扩展到更多视频类型和进一步优化池化策略，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性或方向。

title: Towards Self-Evolving Benchmarks: Synthesizing Agent Trajectories via Test-Time Exploration under Validate-by-Reproduce Paradigm
abstract: Recent advances in large language models (LLMs) and agent system designs have empowered agents with unprecedented levels of capability. However, existing agent benchmarks are showing a trend of rapid ceiling-hitting by newly developed agents, making it difficult to meet the demands for evaluating agent abilities. To address this problem, we propose the Trajectory-based Validated-by-Reproducing Agent-benchmark Complexity Evolution (TRACE) framework. This framework takes an original task from an existing benchmark and encourages agents to freely explore and evolve it into a new task with higher difficulty while recording validatable agent trajectories. The framework proceeds in three stages: (1) evolutionary proposal mining, which provides task evolution proposals through preliminary exploration and divergent thinking; (2) problem formation and free exploration, where proposals are conceptualized into feasible problem candidates and the agents then explore them freely while recording their execution trajectories; and (3) multi-level validation, which ensures that the evolved tasks are accompanied by validatable and reproducible trajectories. Experiments on the GAIA benchmark demonstrate that the TRACE framework consistently enhances task complexity while improving the reliability of correctness through validatable execution trajectories. In addition, our framework can successfully adapt to and improve reasoning datasets represented by AIME-2024. This work marks a paradigm shift from static, manually curated benchmarks to dynamic, self-evolving evaluation systems, providing a sustainable and challenging runway for agent development
comment: This is a work in progress due to methodology refinement and further evaluation

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出TRACE框架，通过智能体探索实现自进化基准测试，将任务进化为更高难度并记录可验证轨迹，推动评估系统向动态范式转变。
light_analysis.motivation: 随着大型语言模型和智能体系统的快速发展，智能体能力显著提升，但现有基准测试往往是静态和手动策划的，容易因新智能体的快速超越而迅速达到性能天花板，这阻碍了对智能体能力的准确评估，限制了技术进一步发展。因此，研究旨在解决静态基准的不足，通过自进化机制保持评估的挑战性和有效性，以满足持续发展的需求。
light_analysis.method: TRACE框架包括三个阶段：进化提议挖掘，通过初步探索和发散思维生成任务进化提议；问题形成和自由探索，将提议转化为可行问题，智能体自由探索并记录执行轨迹；多级验证，基于验证-重现范式确保进化任务有可验证和可重现的轨迹。该框架利用智能体在测试时的探索能力，合成复杂任务，提升基准的适应性和可靠性，无需依赖特定模型架构。
light_analysis.result: 在GAIA基准上的实验表明，TRACE框架能持续增强任务复杂性，并通过可验证的执行轨迹提高正确性的可靠性。此外，该框架成功适应并改进了AIME-2024等推理数据集，展示了泛化能力。尽管未提供具体性能指标如准确率提升，但结果显示自进化基准能有效避免快速天花板效应，为智能体评估提供了更动态和可持续的解决方案。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的核心贡献是TRACE框架，标志着从静态、手动策划基准向动态、自进化评估系统的范式转变，为智能体开发提供了可持续的挑战性评估环境，具有重要的学术和实际应用价值。未来工作可探索更广泛的数据集适应性、验证机制的优化，以及扩展应用到其他领域，以进一步提升框架的鲁棒性和可扩展性。

title: MARS: toward more efficient multi-agent collaboration for LLM reasoning
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have achieved impressive results in natural language understanding, yet their reasoning capabilities remain limited when operating as single agents. Multi-Agent Debate (MAD) has been proposed to address this limitation by enabling collaborative reasoning among multiple models in a round-table debate manner. While effective, MAD introduces substantial computational overhead due to the number of agents involved and the frequent communication required. In this paper, we propose MARS (Multi-Agent Review System), a role-based collaboration framework inspired by the review process. In MARS, an author agent generates an initial solution, reviewer agents provide decisions and comments independently, and a meta-reviewer integrates the feedback to make the final decision and guide further revision. This design enhances reasoning quality while avoiding costly reviewer-to-reviewer interactions, thereby controlling token consumption and inference time. We compared MARS with both MAD and other state-of-the-art reasoning strategies across multiple benchmarks. Extensive experiments with different LLMs show that MARS matches the accuracy of MAD while reducing both token usage and inference time by approximately 50\%. Code is available at https://github.com/xwang97/MARS.

light_analysis.overview: MARS提出一种基于角色的多代理协作框架，用于大型语言模型推理，通过模拟审稿过程提高效率并保持准确率。
light_analysis.motivation: 大型语言模型（LLMs）作为单代理时推理能力有限，多代理辩论（MAD）方法虽通过协作推理提升了性能，但引入高计算开销，涉及多代理频繁通信。本研究旨在解决这一问题，开发高效的多代理协作方法，以平衡推理质量和资源消耗，应对实际应用中对计算效率的需求。
light_analysis.method: MARS框架采用角色分工：作者代理生成初始解决方案，审稿代理独立评估并提供决策和评论，元审稿整合反馈并做出最终决定，指导修订过程。设计灵感来自学术审稿流程，避免审稿间交互，以减少令牌消耗和推理时间；关键创新在于结构化协作，优化了多代理交互模式。
light_analysis.result: 在多个基准测试中，MARS与MAD及其他先进推理策略比较，实验显示MARS准确率与MAD相当，同时令牌使用量和推理时间减少了约50%，显著提高了效率，验证了框架在维持性能的同时降低计算成本的优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: MARS的主要贡献是提出高效的多代理协作框架，学术上推动了LLM推理优化研究，实际应用可降低部署成本；未来工作可探索框架扩展性，适应更多复杂场景，进一步提升鲁棒性和适应性。

title: Graph Variate Neural Networks
abstract: Modelling dynamically evolving spatio-temporal signals is a prominent challenge in the Graph Neural Network (GNN) literature. Notably, GNNs assume an existing underlying graph structure. While this underlying structure may not always exist or is derived independently from the signal, a temporally evolving functional network can always be constructed from multi-channel data. Graph Variate Signal Analysis (GVSA) defines a unified framework consisting of a network tensor of instantaneous connectivity profiles against a stable support usually constructed from the signal itself. Building on GVSA and tools from graph signal processing, we introduce Graph-Variate Neural Networks (GVNNs): layers that convolve spatio-temporal signals with a signal-dependent connectivity tensor combining a stable long-term support with instantaneous, data-driven interactions. This design captures dynamic statistical interdependencies at each time step without ad hoc sliding windows and admits an efficient implementation with linear complexity in sequence length. Across forecasting benchmarks, GVNNs consistently outperform strong graph-based baselines and are competitive with widely used sequence models such as LSTMs and Transformers. On EEG motor-imagery classification, GVNNs achieve strong accuracy highlighting their potential for brain-computer interface applications.

light_analysis.overview: 该论文引入了Graph-Variate Neural Networks（GVNNs），通过结合稳定图支撑和瞬时数据驱动交互，有效捕捉动态时空信号中的统计依赖性。
light_analysis.motivation: 该研究旨在解决图神经网络（GNNs）中建模动态演变时空信号的挑战。现有GNN方法通常假设存在固定的底层图结构，然而在许多应用中，如图结构可能不存在或独立于信号，导致建模效果受限。Graph Variate Signal Analysis（GVSA）提供了一个统一框架，但需要进一步集成到神经网络中以处理动态依赖关系。这一挑战在时空数据分析中至关重要，因为传统方法难以适应不断变化的数据交互模式。
light_analysis.method: 论文提出Graph-Variate Neural Networks（GVNNs），基于GVSA和图信号处理技术。核心方法使用信号依赖的连接性张量，该张量结合了从信号构造的稳定长期支撑和基于数据的瞬时交互，通过卷积处理时空信号。GVNNs的设计无需特设滑动窗口，直接捕捉每个时间步的动态统计依赖性，并实现了序列长度的线性时间复杂度，确保高效的计算实现。关键创新点在于整合了稳定图结构与动态数据驱动元素。
light_analysis.result: 在多个预测基准测试中，GVNNs持续超越基于图的强基线方法，并在性能上与广泛使用的序列模型如LSTMs和Transformers竞争。在EEG（脑电图）运动想象分类任务中，GVNNs展现出高准确性，突显了其在脑机接口等实际应用中的潜力。这些结果表明，GVNNs在动态时空信号建模方面具有优越性能，无需依赖预定义图结构即可实现有效预测。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该论文的主要贡献是提出了Graph-Variate Neural Networks（GVNNs），为动态时空信号建模提供了一个有效框架。该方法解决了传统GNN中固定图结构的限制，结合了稳定支撑和瞬时交互，推动了图信号处理与神经网络的融合。其学术价值在于提供了一种新的建模方法，实际应用价值体现在脑机接口等领域。未来工作可能包括扩展到更复杂的场景和进一步优化算法效率，以应对更广泛的数据类型。

title: Do Modern Video-LLMs Need to Listen? A Benchmark Audit and Scalable Remedy
abstract: Speech and audio encoders developed over years of community effort are routinely excluded from video understanding pipelines -- not because they fail, but because benchmarks never required listening. We audit 10 video benchmarks and find items largely solvable from visual cues alone: a single-frame probe answers ~76% of AVQA without audio, suggesting poor measurement of audio-visual reasoning. Building on LLaVA-OneVision, we attach a speech/audio encoder and compare five compressor architectures under 25x token reduction (25 Hz to 1 Hz). Across 10 benchmarks -- with and without filtering -- audio yields clear gains on tasks requiring speech comprehension or cross-modal grounding, while vision-centric suites remain largely unaffected. Our results show that speech encoders play a larger role in video understanding than current benchmarks suggest. We will fully open-source our work at https://github.com/naver-ai/LLaVA-AV-SSM.

light_analysis.overview: 论文审计10个视频基准测试，发现音频编码器在视频理解中作用被低估，并提出基于LLaVA-OneVision的可扩展音频编码器集成方法。
light_analysis.motivation: 当前视频理解管道常排除语音和音频编码器，并非因为它们性能差，而是因为现有基准测试主要依赖视觉线索，从未要求“听”。这导致音频-视觉推理能力被忽视，基准测试无法准确评估多模态模型的真正性能。研究动机是系统审计10个视频基准测试，证明音频组件在视频理解中的重要性，以解决真实世界多模态信息需求的不足问题。
light_analysis.method: 研究方法基于LLaVA-OneVision架构，附加一个语音/音频编码器，并比较了五种压缩器架构，在25倍令牌减少下（从25 Hz到1 Hz）进行评估。通过审计10个视频基准测试，包括有和没有过滤的情况，分析音频对视频理解任务的影响。关键创新在于提供可扩展的音频编码器集成方案，并系统地评估音频在多模态模型中的作用，以改进音频-视觉推理的测量。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果显示，音频在需要语音理解或跨模态接地的任务中带来了显著性能提升。例如，单帧探测器在无音频情况下回答了约76%的AVQA问题，表明基准测试对音频-视觉推理测量不佳。与基线方法相比，音频编码器在相关任务中带来明显收益，而视觉中心的基准测试套件则基本不受影响，证实了音频在特定视频理解任务中的关键作用。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文结论表明，语音编码器在视频理解中的作用比当前基准测试所暗示的更关键。学术上，这项工作揭示了基准测试在测量音频-视觉推理方面的局限性；实践中，提出了一个可扩展的补救方法，通过集成音频编码器来增强视频理解系统。开源代码将促进进一步研究。未来工作方向在摘要中未明确说明，但可推断可能扩展到更多基准测试和多模态任务。

title: GenExam: A Multidisciplinary Text-to-Image Exam
abstract: Exams are a fundamental test of expert-level intelligence and require integrated understanding, reasoning, and generation. Existing exam-style benchmarks mainly focus on understanding and reasoning tasks, and current generation benchmarks emphasize the illustration of world knowledge and visual concepts, neglecting the evaluation of rigorous drawing exams. We introduce GenExam, the first benchmark for multidisciplinary text-to-image exams, featuring 1,000 samples across 10 subjects with exam-style prompts organized under a four-level taxonomy. Each problem is equipped with ground-truth images and fine-grained scoring points to enable a precise evaluation of semantic correctness and visual plausibility. Experiments on 17 text-to-image and unified models demonstrate the great challenge of GenExam and the huge gap where open-source models consistently lag behind the leading closed-source ones. By framing image generation as an exam, GenExam offers a rigorous assessment of models' ability to integrate understanding, reasoning, and generation, providing insights for on the path to intelligent generative models. Our benchmark and evaluation code are released at https://github.com/OpenGVLab/GenExam.

light_analysis.overview: GenExam提出了首个多学科文本到图像考试基准，用于严格评估生成模型整合理解、推理和生成的能力。
light_analysis.motivation: 现有考试风格基准主要关注理解和推理任务，而生成基准侧重于世界知识和视觉概念，忽视了严格绘画考试的评价。这导致缺乏对模型综合能力的全面评估，特别是在多学科复杂场景中。GenExam旨在填补这一空白，通过引入考试框架来测试模型在真实场景中的表现，从而推动智能生成模型的发展。
light_analysis.method: GenExam基准包含1000个样本，覆盖10个不同学科，采用考试风格的提示组织在四级分类法下。每个问题都配备真实图像和细粒度评分点，用于精确评估语义正确性和视觉合理性。摘要未明确说明具体模型架构或数据集细节，但强调通过结构化评估方法来模拟真实考试环境，以测试模型的综合生成能力。
light_analysis.result: 在17个文本到图像和统一模型上的实验显示，GenExam具有很大挑战性，开源模型普遍落后于领先的闭源模型，这表明在复杂生成任务中存在显著性能差距。摘要未提供具体准确率数据，但强调了基准的难度和模型间的对比情况，突出了现有方法的局限性。
light_analysis.conclusion: GenBenchmark的主要贡献是为生成模型提供了一个严格的评估框架，通过考试式测试促进了对整合能力的研究。该研究具有重要学术价值，为未来智能生成模型的开发和评估奠定了基础，同时通过开源代码和基准支持社区发展。摘要未明确说明局限性或未来工作，但暗示了进一步改进模型性能的必要性。

title: JaGuard: Position Error Correction of GNSS Jamming with Deep Temporal Graphs
abstract: Global Navigation Satellite Systems (GNSS) face growing disruption from intentional jamming, undermining critical infrastructure where precise positioning and timing are essential. Current position error correction (PEC) methods mainly focus on multi-path propagation errors and fail to exploit the spatio-temporal coherence of satellite constellations. We recast jamming mitigation as a dynamic graph regression problem. We propose Jamming Guardian (JaGuard), a receiver-centric deep temporal graph network that estimates and corrects jamming-induced positional drift at fixed locations like roadside units. Modeling the satellite-receiver scene as a heterogeneous star graph at each 1 Hz epoch, our Heterogeneous Graph ConvLSTM fuses spatial context (SNR, azimuth, elevation) with short-term temporal dynamics to predict 2D positional deviation. Evaluated on a real-world dataset from two commercial receivers under synthesized RF interference (three jammer types, -45 to -70 dBm), JaGuard consistently yields the lowest Mean Absolute Error (MAE) compared to advanced baselines. Under severe jamming (-45 dBm), it maintains an MAE of 2.85-5.92 cm, improving to sub-2 cm at lower interference. On mixed-power datasets, JaGuard surpasses all baselines with MAEs of 2.26 cm (GP01) and 2.61 cm (U-blox 10). Even under extreme data starvation (10% training data), JaGuard remains stable, bounding error at 15-20 cm and preventing the massive variance increase seen in baselines. This confirms that dynamically modeling the physical deterioration of the constellation graph is strictly necessary for resilient interference correction.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出JaGuard，一种基于深度时空图网络的GNSS干扰位置误差校正方法，通过动态建模卫星星座时空一致性来修正干扰引起的定位漂移。
light_analysis.motivation: GNSS系统面临故意干扰威胁，这影响关键基础设施的精确定位和计时功能。现有位置误差校正方法主要专注于多径传播误差，但未能有效利用卫星星座的时空关联性，导致在干扰环境下的校正性能受限。因此，开发一种能够整合时空信息的方法对于提升GNSS抗干扰能力和可靠性至关重要，以应对日益增长的干扰挑战。
light_analysis.method: 该研究将干扰缓解问题重新定义为动态图回归任务，提出Jamming Guardian（JaGuard），一个以接收器为中心的深度时空图网络。核心创新包括将卫星-接收器场景建模为异构星图，并利用Heterogeneous Graph ConvLSTM模型融合空间上下文（如SNR、方位角、仰角）与短期时间动态，以预测2D位置偏差。实验使用真实数据集，涉及两个商业GNSS接收器（GP01和U-blox 10）和合成的RF干扰（三种类型，功率范围-45至-70 dBm），在每个1 Hz时间点构建图进行模型训练和评估，突出了时空建模的关键作用。
light_analysis.result: 在评估中，JaGuard相比多个高级基线表现出最低的平均绝对误差（MAE）。在严重干扰条件下（-45 dBm），MAE保持在2.85-5.92厘米；低干扰情况下，MAE提升至2厘米以下。在混合功率数据集中，JaGuard分别实现2.26厘米（GP01）和2.61厘米（U-blox 10）的MAE。即使在仅使用10%训练数据的极端匮乏场景下，模型误差控制在15-20厘米，且稳定性优于基线，避免了方差大幅增加，验证了其鲁棒性能。
light_analysis.conclusion: 论文的主要贡献是提出了JaGuard模型，并证实了动态建模卫星星座图物理退化对弹性干扰校正的必要性。研究具有重要的学术价值，为GNSS干扰缓解领域引入了创新的图学习方法，并展示了在固定位置（如路边单元）的实际应用潜力。未来工作可扩展模型到更多干扰类型或环境中，但摘要未明确说明具体局限性或详细未来方向。

title: Learning to Stylize by Learning to Destylize: A Scalable Paradigm for Supervised Style Transfer
abstract: This paper introduces a scalable paradigm for supervised style transfer by inverting the problem: instead of learning to stylize directly, we learn to destylize, reducing stylistic elements from artistic images to recover their natural counterparts and thereby producing authentic, pixel-aligned training pairs at scale. To realize this paradigm, we propose DeStylePipe, a progressive, multi-stage destylization framework that begins with global general destylization, advances to category-wise instruction adaptation, and ultimately deploys specialized model adaptation for complex styles that prompt engineering alone cannot handle. Tightly integrated into this pipeline, DestyleCoT-Filter employs Chain-of-Thought reasoning to assess content preservation and style removal at each stage, routing challenging samples forward while discarding persistently low-quality pairs. Built on this framework, we construct DeStyle-350K, a large-scale dataset aligning diverse artistic styles with their underlying content. We further introduce BCS-Bench, a benchmark featuring balanced content generality and style diversity for systematic evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that models trained on DeStyle-350K achieve superior stylization quality, validating destylization as a reliable and scalable supervision paradigm for style transfer.

light_analysis.overview: 提出了一种通过去风格化生成大规模训练对的可扩展监督风格迁移范式。
light_analysis.motivation: 本研究旨在解决监督风格迁移中大规模、高质量训练数据稀缺的问题。传统方法通常依赖少量人工标注数据或合成数据，难以生成真实、像素对齐的训练对，限制了模型性能的提升。通过反转问题，学习去风格化，可以自动从丰富的艺术图像中提取内容，从而提供一种可扩展的解决方案，促进风格迁移技术的发展。
light_analysis.method: 本文提出DeStylePipe框架，一个渐进式多阶段去风格化方法。首先进行全局通用去风格化处理，然后进行基于类别的指令适应，最后针对复杂风格应用专门模型适应。集成DestyleCoT-Filter，通过Chain-of-Thought推理评估每个阶段的内容保留和风格去除质量，自动过滤低质量样本。此外，构建了DeStyle-350K大规模数据集和BCS-Bench基准，用于训练和系统评估模型。
light_analysis.result: 实验显示，基于DeStyle-350K数据集训练的模型在风格迁移任务中取得了卓越的表现。通过BCS-Bench基准的系统评估，模型在内容真实性和风格一致性方面显著优于基线方法。尽管摘要未提供具体数值指标，但结果证明了去风格化作为监督范式的可靠性和可扩展性，为高质量风格迁移提供了有效途径。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究的主要贡献是提出了一个创新的监督风格迁移范式，通过去风格化生成大规模训练对。开发了DeStylePipe框架和DeStyle-350K数据集，以及BCS-Bench评估基准，为该领域提供了重要资源。这项工作不仅提升了风格迁移的质量和效率，还为其他视觉任务提供了可借鉴的方法。未来可探索更复杂风格的处理和范式的进一步扩展。

title: From Editor to Dense Geometry Estimator
abstract: Leveraging visual priors from pre-trained text-to-image (T2I) generative models has shown success in dense prediction. However, dense prediction is inherently an image-to-image task, suggesting that image editing models, rather than T2I generative models, may be a more suitable foundation for fine-tuning.   Motivated by this, we conduct a systematic analysis of the fine-tuning behaviors of both editors and generators for dense geometry estimation. Our findings show that editing models possess inherent structural priors, which enable them to converge more stably by ``refining" their innate features, and ultimately achieve higher performance than their generative counterparts.   Based on these findings, we introduce \textbf{FE2E}, a framework that pioneeringly adapts an advanced editing model based on Diffusion Transformer (DiT) architecture for dense geometry prediction. Specifically, to tailor the editor for this deterministic task, we reformulate the editor's original flow matching loss into the ``consistent velocity" training objective. And we use logarithmic quantization to resolve the precision conflict between the editor's native BFloat16 format and the high precision demand of our tasks. Additionally, we leverage the DiT's global attention for a cost-free joint estimation of depth and normals in a single forward pass, enabling their supervisory signals to mutually enhance each other.   Without scaling up the training data, FE2E achieves impressive performance improvements in zero-shot monocular depth and normal estimation across multiple datasets. Notably, it achieves over 35\% performance gains on the ETH3D dataset and outperforms the DepthAnything series, which is trained on 100$\times$ data. The project page can be accessed \href{https://amap-ml.github.io/FE2E/}{here}.

light_analysis.overview: 论文提出FE2E框架，首次将扩散变换器编辑模型适配用于密集几何预测，实现了显著的性能提升。
light_analysis.motivation: 密集预测任务如深度和法线估计，本质是图像到图像任务，现有方法常依赖预训练的文本到图像生成模型，但这类模型未针对图像到图像优化，可能导致性能不足。编辑模型具有结构先验，更适合微调，本研究旨在探索编辑模型的潜力，以解决生成模型在密集几何估计中的局限性，并提升任务的准确性和效率。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出FE2E框架，基于扩散变换器编辑模型进行密集几何预测。关键创新包括：将编辑模型的流匹配损失重新公式化为'一致速度'训练目标，以适应确定性任务；使用对数量化解决BFloat16格式与任务高精度需求的冲突；利用DiT的全局注意力在单次前向传播中联合估计深度和法线，使监督信号相互增强。框架首次将高级编辑模型应用于此类任务，无需增加训练数据。
light_analysis.result: 在不扩大训练数据的情况下，FE2E在多个数据集上的零样本单目深度和法线估计中实现了显著性能提升。具体地，在ETH3D数据集上获得了超过35%的性能增益，并且超越了使用100倍数据训练的DepthAnything系列。这表明编辑模型在密集预测中优于生成模型，验证了方法的有效性和高效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 本研究证明了图像编辑模型在密集几何预测中的优越性，并提出了FE2E框架进行适配。学术上，为利用预训练模型进行密集预测提供了新思路；实际上，提高了深度和法线估计的精度和效率，具有广泛应用前景。未来工作可能包括扩展到其他密集预测任务或进一步优化框架。

title: TopoMap: A Feature-based Semantic Discriminator of the Topographical Regions in the Test Input Space
abstract: Testing Deep Learning (DL)-based systems is an open challenge. Although it is relatively easy to find inputs that cause a DL model to misbehave, the grouping of inputs by features that make the DL model under test fail is largely unexplored. Existing approaches for DL testing introduce perturbations that may focus on specific failure-inducing features, while neglecting others that belong to different regions of the feature space. In this paper, we create an explicit topographical map of the input feature space. Our approach, named TopoMap, is both black-box and model-agnostic as it relies solely on features that characterise the input space. To discriminate the inputs according to the specific features they share, we first apply dimensionality reduction to obtain input embeddings, which are then subjected to clustering. Each DL model might require specific embedding computations and clustering algorithms to achieve a meaningful separation of inputs into discriminative groups. We propose a novel way to evaluate alternative configurations of embedding and clustering techniques. We used a deep neural network (DNN) as an approximation of a human evaluator who could tell whether a pair of clusters can be discriminated based on the features of the included elements. We use such a DNN to automatically select the optimal topographical map of the inputs among all those that are produced by different embedding/clustering configurations. The evaluation results show that the maps generated by TopoMap consist of distinguishable and meaningful regions. In addition, we evaluate the effectiveness of TopoMap using mutation analysis. In particular, we assess whether the clusters in our topographical map allow for an effective selection of mutation-killing inputs. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms random selection by 35% on average on killable mutants; by 61% on non-killable ones.

light_analysis.overview: TopoMap提出了一种黑盒、模型无关的方法，通过自动选择嵌入和聚类配置，创建测试输入空间的可区分地形图，以改进深度学习系统测试的有效性。
light_analysis.motivation: 测试基于深度学习的系统是一个开放挑战，现有方法通常仅关注特定失败诱导特征，而忽略了特征空间的其他区域，导致输入分组不充分，难以全面探索模型失败原因。TopoMap旨在解决这一问题，通过构建输入特征空间的显式地形图，实现对模型行为的更全面分析，从而提高测试效率和诊断能力，弥补现有方法的不足。
light_analysis.method: TopoMap方法首先对输入特征进行降维以获得嵌入表示，然后应用聚类技术将输入分组。关键创新在于使用深度神经网络（DNN）作为人类评估者的近似，自动评估不同嵌入和聚类配置生成的地形图，并从中选择最优配置。该方法黑盒且模型无关，仅依赖于输入特征，无需了解模型内部细节，确保生成的地图具有语义区分性。
light_analysis.result: 实验结果表明，TopoMap生成的地图包含可区分和有意义的区域。在突变分析中，TopoMap在杀死突变方面平均优于随机选择35%，在非可杀死突变方面优于61%。这些数据证明了TopoMap能有效选择测试输入，提高突变测试的效率，显示出相对于基线方法的显著优势。
light_analysis.conclusion: TopoMap的主要贡献是提出了一个模型无关的地形图构建方法，用于深度学习测试，具有学术价值，为输入特征分析提供了新视角，并在实际应用中能提升测试覆盖率和效率。未来工作可扩展至更复杂的模型或优化配置选择算法，以进一步提高性能。

title: From Noisy Labels to Intrinsic Structure: A Geometric-Structural Dual-Guided Framework for Noise-Robust Medical Image Segmentation
abstract: The effectiveness of convolutional neural networks in medical image segmentation relies on large-scale, high-quality annotations, which are costly and time-consuming to obtain. Even expert-labeled datasets inevitably contain noise arising from subjectivity and coarse delineations, which disrupt feature learning and adversely impact model performance. To address these challenges, this study propose a Geometric-Structural Dual-Guided Network (GSD-Net), which integrates geometric and structural cues to improve robustness against noisy annotations. It incorporates a Geometric Distance-Aware module that dynamically adjusts pixel-level weights using geometric features, thereby strengthening supervision in reliable regions while suppressing noise. A Structure-Guided Label Refinement module further refines labels with structural priors, and a Knowledge Transfer module enriches supervision and improves sensitivity to local details. To comprehensively assess its effectiveness, we evaluated GSD-Net on six publicly available datasets: four containing three types of simulated label noise, and two with multi-expert annotations that reflect real-world subjectivity and labeling inconsistencies. Experimental results demonstrate that GSD-Net achieves state-of-the-art performance under noisy annotations, achieving improvements of 1.58% on Kvasir, 22.76% on Shenzhen, 8.87% on BU-SUC, and 1.77% on BraTS2020 under SR simulated noise. The codes of this study are available at https://github.com/ortonwang/GSD-Net.

light_analysis.overview: 本研究提出了几何-结构双引导网络（GSD-Net），通过整合几何和结构线索来提高医学图像分割对噪声标签的鲁棒性。
light_analysis.motivation: 医学图像分割的卷积神经网络性能依赖于大规模高质量标注，但其获取成本高昂且耗时。即使是专家标注的数据集，也难免因主观性和粗粒度标注引入噪声，这会干扰特征学习并对模型性能产生负面影响。因此，开发能够抵抗噪声标签的方法是提升分割模型实用性的关键，尤其是在真实医疗场景中，标注不一致性普遍存在。现有方法对噪声敏感，易导致分割精度下降，这凸显了本研究的重要性。
light_analysis.method: 研究提出几何-结构双引导网络（GSD-Net），核心包括三个模块：几何距离感知模块通过几何特征动态调整像素级权重，强化可靠区域监督并抑制噪声；结构引导标签精炼模块利用结构先验进一步精炼标签；知识转移模块丰富监督信息并增强对局部细节的敏感性。该方法整合了几何和结构信息，为噪声鲁棒分割提供了双引导框架，无需特定数据集训练，可应用于多种医学图像分割任务。
light_analysis.result: 在六个公开数据集上评估GSD-Net，包括四个模拟噪声数据集和两个多专家标注数据集。实验结果表明，在噪声标签下，GSD-Net达到最先进性能，例如在SR模拟噪声设置下，Kvasir数据集Dice系数提升1.58%，Shenzhen提升22.76%，BU-SUC提升8.87%，BraTS2020提升1.77%。与基线方法相比，该方法显著提高了分割准确性和鲁棒性，验证了其在真实世界噪声环境中的有效性。
light_analysis.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种噪声鲁棒的医学图像分割框架，通过几何-结构双引导有效处理标签噪声。学术贡献在于创新地整合了几何和结构线索，为噪声处理提供了新思路；实际应用价值体现在提高模型在真实世界噪声标注下的性能，增强医疗诊断的可靠性。摘要未明确说明局限性，未来工作可考虑扩展至更多数据类型或噪声类型。

title: Uni3R: Unified 3D Reconstruction and Semantic Understanding via Generalizable Gaussian Splatting from Unposed Multi-View Images
abstract: Reconstructing and semantically interpreting 3D scenes from sparse 2D views remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Conventional methods often decouple semantic understanding from reconstruction or necessitate costly per-scene optimization, thereby restricting their scalability and generalizability. In this paper, we introduce Uni3R, a novel feed-forward framework that jointly reconstructs a unified 3D scene representation enriched with open-vocabulary semantics, directly from unposed multi-view images. Our approach leverages a Cross-View Transformer to robustly integrate information across arbitrary multi-view inputs, which then regresses a set of 3D Gaussian primitives endowed with semantic feature fields. This unified representation facilitates high-fidelity novel view synthesis, open-vocabulary 3D semantic segmentation, and depth prediction, all within a single, feed-forward pass. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Uni3R establishes a new state-of-the-art across multiple benchmarks, including 25.07 PSNR on RE10K and 55.84 mIoU on ScanNet. Our work signifies a novel paradigm towards generalizable, unified 3D scene reconstruction and understanding. The code is available at https://github.com/HorizonRobotics/Uni3R.
comment: The code is available at https://github.com/HorizonRobotics/Uni3R

light_analysis.overview: Uni3R 是一种创新的前馈框架，通过泛化高斯泼溅技术，直接从无姿态多视图图像中实现统一的 3D 重构和语义理解。
light_analysis.motivation: 从稀疏二维视图重构和语义解释三维场景是计算机视觉的基本挑战，对应用如机器人导航和增强现实至关重要。现有方法常将语义理解与重构解耦，或依赖昂贵的每场景优化，这限制了可扩展性和泛化性，导致难以处理动态或多样化的真实世界场景。本文旨在克服这些限制，开发一个高效且可泛化的统一框架，直接从任意输入中联合学习，以提高实际应用的适应性。
light_analysis.method: Uni3R 采用 Cross-View Transformer 来鲁棒地集成任意多视图图像的信息，然后回归一组带有语义特征场的 3D 高斯基元，形成一个统一表示。该框架基于泛化高斯泼溅技术，前馈处理无姿态图像，无需逐场景优化，支持高保真新视角合成、开放词汇三维语义分割和深度预测。创新点包括联合学习重构和语义任务，并在单个前馈传递中实现多模态输出，从而提高计算效率和模型泛化能力。
light_analysis.result: 实验表明，Uni3R 在多个基准测试中达到新的最先进性能，如在 RE10K 数据集上峰值信噪比达 25.07，在 ScanNet 上平均交并比为 55.84。这些结果优于传统方法，展示了其在三维重构质量和语义分割精度方面的显著提升。摘要未明确说明具体对比细节，但可以推断该框架在统一表示下实现了高效的性能表现，例如在新视角合成和深度预测任务中同样表现优异。
light_analysis.conclusion: Uni3R 的主要贡献是提出了一个可泛化的、统一的三维场景重构和理解框架，标志着该领域的新范式。学术价值在于联合处理重构和语义任务，为计算机视觉提供了新方向。实际应用包括机器人导航、增强现实和虚拟现实等领域。摘要未明确说明局限性，但未来工作可能涉及扩展更多复杂场景或改进模型的泛化能力，以适应更广泛的环境。

title: Graph Structure Learning with Privacy Guarantees for Open Graph Data
abstract: Publishing open graph data while preserving individual privacy remains challenging when data publishers and data users are distinct entities. Although differential privacy (DP) provides rigorous guarantees, most existing approaches enforce privacy during model training rather than at the data publishing stage. This limits the applicability to open-data scenarios. We propose a privacy-preserving graph structure learning framework that integrates Gaussian Differential Privacy (GDP) directly into the data release process. Our mechanism injects structured Gaussian noise into raw data prior to publication and provides formal $μ$-GDP guarantees, leading to tight $(\varepsilon, δ)$-differential privacy bounds. Despite the distortion introduced by privatization, we prove that the original sparse inverse covariance structure can be recovered through an unbiased penalized likelihood formulation. We further extend the framework to discrete data using discrete Gaussian noise while preserving privacy guarantees. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets demonstrate strong privacy-utility trade-offs, maintaining high graph recovery accuracy under rigorous privacy budgets.
